subject: We need to be honest

body:
| | | Peter,
_We need to be honest with you._

Right now, Josh’s opponent is outraising us, and we’re starting to worry that we can’t catch up.

_And the more money they raise, the more confident they are that they can take this seat and flip Missouri blue._

We’ve put in too much work to let that happen, and as a critical member of our team, we want YOU to be a part of our mission to defend this seat.

**Our mid-month deadline is[TOMORROW NIGHT at MIDNIGHT,](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=0da3197b3b49455f958b63516c0ab94e&_e=hHzMuU6EgHr6E_YsMHBv1xs6prYiXU74ls3JVWsfspkfdBiJ5MjLLTvf7ECSV1JX1q75JFCZ8Il3Q1H17VGDohzOx68rP1tCo73fN8AUtEIr62NsVhHjx8iFJtK_1bgLL_6UXZuD80zVQJRf9guveNTFBLF4aeQSR5a49jeM9B_FoI4zdqhJLOGJ34Y5kMQJdTGtakEXuNYdbrW5JBzd-JWVuikxrV6pPvDBZqomNuBYQWV78k6v2Yi_zq47OsWN7Rdxc4F2kKWN5OdVbdN-xB-g-2RwLnseAgLkCkNqARq4QjW__QumazbDBUtspzd6GbjLRJla3KQwb9JDiuTgKZ9swmVUhueMpPXwoeO9ZPoQHzjnh1LGQKKnpYKDWGOi) and right now, we’re still not at our goal.**

Your contribution, no matter the amount, will make a difference in our efforts to elect Democrats to office. We can support campaigns from city council seats to the presidential race and everything in between. The resources we raise with this fundraising drive will ensure our Democratic candidates have the resources they need to run successful campaigns and win on Election Day. We are only $5,750 away from reaching our fundraising goal, and with just today and tomorrow left, we are counting on your support to get us there. 📅 We’re just days away from some of the most important special elections we’ve faced this year – and right now, it’s down to the wire. 😬
➡️ In New Hampshire, Democrats are just FOUR seats away from control of the House – **we have a chance to FLIP the chamber this year!** But that means we can’t afford to lose Tuesday’s race.
➡️ In Pennsylvania, Democrats hold a narrow majority in the House – and **if Republicans win both seats on Tuesday, the GOP will take control of the chamber** and shove their extreme agenda through the legislature.
In the final days before these must-win races, grassroots donations play a critical role in fueling our on-the-ground work to reach every voter before Election Day. **Can we count on you to help power state Dems to victory? 💪**
[Will you chip in $7 and join the fight to elect state Dems in states like New Hampshire and Pennsylvania? **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[Medal of Honor Monday: Marine Corps Maj. Henry Courtney Jr.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc54p1a6g72ua4cp3vvaklh6vb6iar424k6vh3hg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chj6eor4cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnk9g64pj7k1imf935cuirac9k66qqfcplk2rr7dtiemirfcth6gqfb9dk69qb7d9lkorr4s3memir8cllk2qj7cjkumj3fdbie5prad7lkap7f8h5u)
World War II Marine Corps Maj. Henry Alexius Courtney Jr. never gave up on his objective as he led a group of battered men up a fire-swept hill in Okinawa. Courtney didn't come off the hill alive, but his courage led to a foiled Japanese counterattack and saved numerous American lives. Those actions earned him a posthumous Medal of Honor.
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2kvlucpu9b60b9iejqucfskrsu64i8h2j9iunj0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f835cui6apt5mkoj8cdlkupjb85nmerr4td5mupr2d1kumir8cjkmeqjb9hnm9o7ctd5mgpbb85l6ep79td66uqn4sbjmkqfb8lieuh238h1e8he4933c3gm8pj7cdi69oh5u)

| May 12, 2023
Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio ☀️ Happy Friday! Welcome to the inaugural edition of The Dolan Download - a concise, weekly newsletter providing the most important updates on the race U.S. Senate in Ohio.
---

3 Things to Know This Week:
* Matt Dolan's [op-ed on border security](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJkVUIU57Q4mZHfZkQZojF6qKIRZhPPj-BCno4G_exibeuLRiOmvz5-eGqrRVhshLe2yhvCJRzcfWwtgxcgQsU3rX76CRrTLm_xobQD9JDlUD901A3Cgj5EKebyamxZumUzhZhKi6OTVG_ZzDYMOoLNoMTiZy5DcsXiuKOANs7rEaNMAVxG7lKLk_3RUMuNx-kFv3ZQH-bgy7_3DLEd7rc_HBVPVtmmxWf_wY8Ngv4s2klRHt-0otgejziRMRrNkxucEFmFyZrKGIVntpbYg2Ai8shMOZfdTF800M97gaouR3IiDf_u81Grw==&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==) and Title 42 ran in more than a dozen papers across Ohio last week.

* The Cook Political Report has Republicans and Democrats [saying](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJsqcSVqD3jDsC_ZrJZ91H0Ao8bw4IFlAwRAmbDq0weXPbSbWA_TETgM_EB2Nj3FHZtNZMsXVCUfrK5XmjFwskedR3TgFvsiw_Dam-06lENAIq3zOO-2JfsDEGM3YMVQZKDxUqOKhtmHetQE-WzMUr9yUSRv5gu3VVL3EEM55vDXoYV0taSp15hdvNeoPH7NM2w8Uf09PQU64=&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==) that Matt Dolan is the GOP's "most formidable" contender to defeat Sherrod Brown.

* Sherrod Brown [was caught](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJd9ciWuMOJ3h2NOP6D338n-2UOVHRVQTOcEumU8cEMgN_mqREw6ybJrWqW6HvKRWnqu3qx5i3cX8NP6OtpOwA_gj4OqJXUwPr1_0ZU0dzLGY9O8nCVioyGD90saYpDmrlwmKsPUnRbNaxkarzJpup14gHy3ApW7viVZ-bNph8h92em7YNE-IIWMhX5kxjp6br&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==) - yet again - failing to pay his taxes.

---

Get up to speed...
---
Matt Dolan's trip to the southern border with Ohio law enforcement continues to make news
In case you missed it, Matt Dolan was out with a new border security focused op-ed that ran in more than dozen papers across Ohio, including the [Columbus Dispatch](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJ3QlquYdNysJJ-vglWZRKHrSYW_Ah5mZQRgH1fhUlwGeUBlK0pUJ2kRytrZR8z-crJw32H21_GTGHvcYwGoCO97MSX3f7uGYmyXWsl3gPWDFiedGgHBN0_QTi-_V075A1&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==), Cincinnati Enquirer and Akron Beacon Journal. Dolan discussed his recent trip to the U.S. southern border, took Joe Biden, Alejandro Mayorkas and Sherrod Brown to task for their policy failures, and outlined multi-faceted solutions that would help to protect America and reduce overdose deaths in Ohio.
Dolan recently joined members of Ohio law enforcement in Athens Ohio for a tour of BuckEye Cam, an Ohio-based trail camera manufacturer that is providing technology and hardware to state and federal agencies on the southern border.
Dolan [used the trip to Athens on Friday](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJ65mPLPtUUpglafzk6Hq5eP4nq7o__UvRM07iSqKeLNcdqt1lAK-fXCSyPIaOEMSIzIMyfPBbhdy9zb1xa-j8AECA5uFy69mwsExMCSLxyg_Y_ztPhL_IMI6DPgKzObZtpk7-6dHhN471NEjvlKkMdVIOF19qbAYRRQicx9Q90G_3Gact4PVt2KVKB2SYq1FY2LY-ti6LECE=&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==) to call on the Biden Administration to "extend Title 42, designate the China-backed cartels as foreign terrorists and take the necessary steps with infrastructure, civilian and military personnel to stop the flow of human trafficking and fentanyl into the country, save American lives and restore our nation's sovereignty."
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJ3QlquYdNysJJ-vglWZRKHrSYW_Ah5mZQRgH1fhUlwGeUBlK0pUJ2kRytrZR8z-crJw32H21_GTGHvcYwGoCO97MSX3f7uGYmyXWsl3gPWDFiedGgHBN0_QTi-_V075A1&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==)
---

Cook Political Report says Dolan is GOP's best bet against Sherrod Brown
The [Cook Political Report](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJo-tkteEmDHRAtA42KF3uxCAXh_BY4se-7zhbdjXcATDFlSilxHy1weh0EFiEOAxLNUHLeyiXFuiebR65ZBqc65u7ZzmT8Xt81Ci9iYUoqCUQrC3pvO5REg==&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==) is out with fresh analysis on the U.S. Senate in Ohio, and it reflects what many Ohio Republicans already know: "Both Democrats and Republicans we talked to agree that Dolan would be the most formidable candidate Brown could face..."
"Dolan would be a low-risk, strong candidate," one veteran Ohio GOP strategist told us.
Race handicappers also noted the fact that Bernie Moreno's Civil War reparations gaffe overshadowed the launch of his campaign: "But Moreno's campaign trail inexperience was on display last week just days into his candidacy. Appearing at a campaign launch, the Cleveland businessman suggested that there should be reparations for descendants of white Union soldiers who fought in the Civil War, alluding to the ongoing debate over reparations for descendants of enslaved Black people. "They talk about reparations. Where are the reparations for the people, for the North, who died to save the lives of Black people?" Moreno said. "I know it's not politically correct to say that, but you know what, we've got to stop being politically correct... Ohio Republicans we talked to saw it as a warning sign he may not be ready for prime time.
"Moreno has never been a real candidate and he could be mistake-prone," one strategist said. "If you're a serious candidate, you don't say those kinds of things tongue-in-cheek," the source added. Another Buckeye strategist told us that while Trump may be able to get away with comments like that, "it doesn't mean somebody else can do that and be successful."
Cook Report also offered the following comments on Frank LaRose, as a self-described "pragmatic moderate," who is also soliciting money from national donors in support of a Senate bid: "LaRose is also expected to join the fray, but the ideological chameleon could have issues competing with two self-funders."
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJo-tkteEmDHRAtA42KF3uxCAXh_BY4se-7zhbdjXcATDFlSilxHy1weh0EFiEOAxLNUHLeyiXFuiebR65ZBqc65u7ZzmT8Xt81Ci9iYUoqCUQrC3pvO5REg==&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==)
---
Sherrod Brown again was recently caught playing games with his personal taxes
According to [NBC News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bDCv6DdGGDFuzorLy1ZMEAuJxIhM7f3oZ6IPFgjb6dF-KY8zCiFISdJicAkONoJJd9ciWuMOJ3h2NOP6D338n-2UOVHRVQTOcEumU8cEMgN_mqREw6ybJrWqW6HvKRWnqu3qx5i3cX8NP6OtpOwA_gj4OqJXUwPr1_0ZU0dzLGY9O8nCVioyGD90saYpDmrlwmKsPUnRbNaxkarzJpup14gHy3ApW7viVZ-bNph8h92em7YNE-IIWMhX5kxjp6br&c=rOTSSz03nSPUqz1RY36hPhVwKE3O4oUu_nC7pgq_sZANN35-005GpA==&ch=AuOjPxlceAl5gL0H9uc0DtN064xbg_5_qkp8ppTRPwjiMAcGi-SC4w==), Sen. Sherrod Brown for years claimed an owner-occupancy tax credit at two properties, public records show -- a potential violation of the state's rules governing such incentives.
Brown was also late paying the tax bill on their Cleveland house at least seven times since purchasing it in 2013, missing a payment deadline as recently as February. At one point in 2015, the county labeled Brown as delinquent after he failed for months to pay a nearly $1,200 bill.
As for late payments, publicly available copies of property tax bills for Brown's Cleveland home show fees for missing deadlines on their 2022, 2021, 2019, 2018, 2015 and 2014 taxes.
In 2012, The Plain Dealer of Cleveland reported on tax delinquencies involving a condo Brown owned in Washington, D.C.
---
|
In recent days, Matt Dolan attended events in Columbus, Toledo, Findlay, Lima, Perrysburg, Gallipolis, Port Clinton, Warren, Athens, Belmont, Ashtabula, Trumbull County, Cleveland and Lewis Center. name: Team Nina for Philly
subject: A Mother’s Vision of a Healthier and Stronger Future for Philadelphia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
Friend,
I hope your Mother's Day was as delightful as my Mother's Day! My most proud introduction is being a mother to our two lovely daughters, who are forging their own successful paths in this world! I strive every day to honor the legacy of my mother who taught me that each human being had intrinsic value and to treat everyone with respect.

Every mother wants their child to thrive. Our upcoming Primary election on May 16th is critical to ensure we elect thoughtful, experienced policy makers who are evidence based in their approach; those who will make sure to create pathways for all Philadelphians including our mothers and children to thrive.
Deeply grateful to all who have supported my journey so far!**I am working till 8:00 pm, May 16 th** till the polls close to win this race for mothers, children and families across Philadelphia!! **Push Button #66**
Please make a [donation to help me across](https://act.myngp.com/el/CuFCISvS3wFoD9VLOHjvCKMLmF8a6OJ_2JK6km3hxNg=/dxcBhAsOGI7XQm8DrGn6Nft4rVBIle2JRgzDDpujZxQ=) the finish line on **May 16 th** and support my vision of a healthier and stronger future for Philadelphia!

> >

Push Button #66 Please make a = the finish line on May 16 th and support my vision of a healthier and stronger future for Philadelphia! > > = Please SHARE this challenge page widely on facebook, twitter, and with your friends and family. Thank you! Paid for by Nina for Philly Nina for Philly PO Box 27339 Philadelphia PA 19118 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Why Government is the Problem
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWBMHHcDvN

The major social problems of the United States-deteriorating
education, lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of
family values, the crisis in medical care-all have one thing in
common.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWBMHHcDvN

Dear
Friend,
The major
social problems of the United States-deteriorating education,
lawlessness and crime, homelessness, the collapse of family
values, the crisis in medical care-all have one thing in common.
They have all been produced by the well-intended actions of the
government.

And yet,
for some reason, more and more Americans look to government as
the solution to their problems.

That's
why I want you to have a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's
Why Government Is the Problem.

In this
eBook, Friedman uses his humble and direct style to:

Analyze the continuing social and economic problems as government
intervention increases in the U.S.
Shed
light on the government and its tilt toward special interests
over citizen interests.

Demonstrate how and why government is the problem.

I really
think you'll get a lot out of this eBook. It's a favorite among
supporters of Hoover. And although some of the particulars have
changed since he wrote this in 1993, I think you'll find the
situation is frighteningly similar today.

Please
use this link to get access to your copy of Why Government Is the
Problem now.

Thank
you,

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

subject: Free NYC Hotels for Immigrants, More Firepower for Ukraine, and the Legend of Doyle Brunson
body:
Shuttered hotels are opening in New York City, but it’s not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to asylum seekers.

Shuttered hotels are opening in New York City, but it’s not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to asylum seekers.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
---
| | |
# Monday, May 15, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we’re covering the conversion of NYC hotels into immigrant housing, increased firepower for Ukraine’s war against Russia, and the passing of a poker legend. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? [Sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGngS3RcQc2HhgqVd7StaN1mCOmwiFyaKq-faWu7f7rl773y3LhUsvt-sa7hJ7bwmsvT1nAnYw7IS2oU8giKKQlmMFb45BGo7dAdmIcfU4REtu4siRPGePE3gElp0tAQAJnnAFL6M9pchSHiWMeEHgkZUFS6e04f7Ry65vk-t2ecpzXtusatt7vD0UvCmeF899E0fzZd0WvFvQR0v2r1Foew6gsXHcu9XfT_1f9BAAA__9Yfk3Z) and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? [ Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? [Follow us on Facebook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FugzAQgOGnsbcg-842MHjowpZ0qdQRHXAObk0cgYWVt6_aufuvX_o-r-OVYoqP-4029iXkkeYSTx6VvWh7ARxBLj4wA6Nkr11ntAVstVy9NmQN9aQMhhmtM6hmcDa0aurs1HYyelCAymqrlUHomqW3OLmepuBAUYvCKF5iyXvzleOjrBzSK5-8N3PeZPJrKc9D4JuAQcBQa20CzTzl_P0bCBg-Vh7S6_3k_cb1EDDI3S_PGlOKh2uFUfeNYvq7lf9xPwEAAP__wA1PVw) and stay in touch. _**Note:_** Happy belated Mother's Day! Flyover country wouldn't exist without our wonderful moms. We hope all the mothers out there had a blessed day.
|
---
## Hotels in NYC Converted to Immigrant Housing
Shuttered hotels [are opening](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL9G6vDAnQ5EQfEad35tSg2CwyJBwiMRe_T3GadOubPNzn7cppvPJW_3_35l11KdfGj5yZMkoUgATtBHl5iBsWen9DgoAjSqX5wFMjYSEQUlIwzRzGgGhRrnWSaFfXYgASUpUnJAGC_REs7a-jlpkN5gN0iOudX98lnz1hZO5axP3i-hrn1xS2uPo8N_HVw7uPrHxq_jrd6wtxwKd3Dd-CXOun-JkNsp1nzf_dYO4Y-zfK9iqY3LIdSIMehEKZDG6O2Y0M-BdLSDMtaGfnfx8cql5EObbpD31efyW9H-nvITAAD__zDyYbU) in New York City, but it's not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to [asylum seekers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOrCAUgOGnwQ4DB0EtKG5jbjO3ucWWBuE4sgGZwJmZ-Pab3Xrrv_nzfdzWm4spnvd_LqOlvazOU3zhKjSXmoNaoQt2RwRUHVpppkFqUKPsDitx0ibsejMgJY46DNooN6CXRojRzV20IEAJLbUUg4KpD7NWm5ndthsQblRsEBgildp_lnjSgXu6ygtr70vukj2IHo2pPwwWBovb_Inv1t_Ld2aw_EWX6GCwvGPF_1TqxWA5L899OV9YqfGjEKbG24GJsDb-qNjasyLP5XlS4877knMJjpC7dqVn5vOs5KRAdNWGxzumFJsZ2SDu2cX080W_M30FAAD__5pjauQ). The Roosevelt Hotel in midtown Manhattan is an example of a once-closed establishment that has a sudden and lucrative source of revenue--immigrants arriving in town with [no place](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAQgOGnwRsRHAbDwNDFW7p2tDA-4quwiQCl8ttXrdSt8zf8-j_uyz1QpvPxHg70PZUlxE4vXITmUnNQCwybT4iAakAvjR2lBjXJYfcW3GQ1RJtWB1bZiAltMKi1FdaJOJAHAUpoqaUYFdjb5rRajQtrMiDCpNgocKNe6u2z0Nl3TPkqL6y3WI4h-733Z2PqjcHMYA5rnM7rhxjM5xX5QY8azt54LaXhC3Pne-mY_4DHSo0ag1kqGI0UjsE8VL89vyhnamZio3gcgfJvr_-__x0AAP__dLBa6Q) to stay. A representative from a Holiday Inn in Manhattan (once closed but now reopened) says that renting rooms to the city brings in "substantially more revenue" than normal operations.
## Western Powers Send More Firepower to Ukraine
The presidents of France and Ukraine held a [surprise meeting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2P3CAUAH8N7rDgAf4oKNJYSrFpUqS0sP1YvywGC7hd-X79aa--bqRpRvPvNt8cBYr3P-5AW32a3VrpibMwXBoOaoZmsx4RUDVoZTdoaUD1stmtfvOqR2M66Z1fpBbjsA1agcZeYNeQBQFKGGmk0AqGdhuNWrrRLb4D4XrFtMCNasrt_0Sx7ujDlZ6Y2zUdTbB7rWdh6heDicHkljXiq7T39NYMpt-xYo6uUoouMJhelPFvTfliMH1iwFge18UP90BePvKZqSB_UqHKT5ep8OrCo3CfMa47PzMW2jBWPo5Kdr2UTbbb-aIQqHQ90-J-OArfZfXnUV8BAAD__zwca2A) in Paris over the weekend. The top item on the agenda? Military aid. France is joining Germany and the U.S. in providing additional weapons and training for Ukraine's coming offensive. Tanks, artillery, ammunition, and cash [are flowing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PhCAUAH8Ndhh8gB-FxTV2e-2VBuWxvlsEA-wa79df9uqrJ5lM5us23wx5CvdPs-NYXJzNWuiFs9C80RzkDJUdHSKgrHBs2l41GmTXVNvYgRY9OtUOcgWrV4tmtSCUWXSrht5VNIIAKXSjG6Ek9LUdtFzawSyuBWE6yZRASyWm-jtSKBs6f8UXpnqNe-XHrZQjM_nBYGIwnedZr2FZ35DB9FYzmIRmMDWKwfR8JEMBM_9BjyE_rouXzYRH5ndMuwkXdzHx_DyOmAqnwF-UqfAS-YLJU6i3svsqjfY4yXvKbceUuO-G_F9O-f_ObwAAAP__V4dm0g) toward Ukraine as Western nations continue to fuel the resistance against Russia's invasion without placing their uniformed soldiers in the conflict. ## Celtics Blow by 76ers in NBA Playoffs
Boston Celtics all-star Jason Tatum [scored 51](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUQNGvwRsWPAw4A0MXtnTtaIF5JETYWEDi5u-rdu58l6vzdV2uLuW03z7dhqbHsri1pxcuTFIuKYgFhmAiIqAY0HA1T1yC0Hy4Gw2eB829WiMHF2evuGTBrZNmEWbwQzLAQDDJJWeTgHkMFym8ujgfFTCnBZkYhtRLHR8l7f2OMb_LC-u4lm3I5t770Yj4IGAJ2PM8R2zH_hsJ2N07Arb1Ut8E7ELApkDACq0kE8AI2Id7t7LT7vpzo6GWo1HJ6Yq5p7XRWp6dtvSNtdGb25DqoZpwnCnn1JQmE7ttLuW_lf6_zE8AAAD__ztQY4M) points against Philadelphia--the most ever scored in game 7 of a playoff series--and sent his team to the Eastern Conference Finals yet again. clean_body: Shuttered hotels are opening in New York City, but it’s not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to asylum seekers. Shuttered hotels are opening in New York City, but it’s not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to asylum seekers. | | | | | | Monday, May 15, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the conversion of NYC hotels into immigrant housing, increased firepower for Ukraine’s war against Russia, and the passing of a poker legend. Is this your first time reading The Flyover? and never miss a thing. How did our Editor do today? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. Note: Happy belated Mother's Day! Flyover country wouldn't exist without our wonderful moms. We hope all the mothers out there had a blessed day. | Hotels in NYC Converted to Immigrant Housing Shuttered hotels in New York City, but it's not because of a wave of tourism. Thousands of immigrants are headed to the Big Apple thanks to the surge at the Mexican border, and the city is mandated by law to provide shelter to . The Roosevelt Hotel in midtown Manhattan is an example of a once-closed establishment that has a sudden and lucrative source of revenue--immigrants arriving in town with to stay. A representative from a Holiday Inn in Manhattan (once closed but now reopened) says that renting rooms to the city brings in "substantially more revenue" than normal operations. Western Powers Send More Firepower to Ukraine The presidents of France and Ukraine held a in Paris over the weekend. The top item on the agenda? Military aid. France is joining Germany and the U.S. in providing additional weapons and training for Ukraine's coming offensive. Tanks, artillery, ammunition, and cash toward Ukraine as Western nations continue to fuel the resistance against Russia's invasion without placing their uniformed soldiers in the conflict. In the U.S., GOP Senators Susan Collins and Lindsay Graham pushed Defense Secretary Llyod last week to deliver tanks as quickly as possible. Celtics Blow by 76ers in NBA Playoffs Boston Celtics all-star Jason Tatum points against Philadelphia--the most ever scored in game 7 of a playoff series--and sent his team to the Eastern Conference Finals yet again. The 76ers' season ended with disappointing performances from its star players: league MVP Joel Embiid and James Harden combined for just 24 points. "It 's a movie," Tatum's teammate Marcus Smart said about watching his the game. "It 's a big movie. Being able to just sit back, eat your popcorn and watch." The Celtics will now try to punch their ticket to The Finals against the Miami Heat. ➤ Ron DeSantis took advantage of Donald Trump's canceled rally in Des Moines, Iowa, and made a timely appearance near the rally's planned location. The 2024 hopeful took questions and said that governing is "not about entertaining or building a brand or talking on social media. It is about winning and producing results." () ➤ Turkey 's authoritarian president Recep Tayyip Erdogan is locked in a close election with challenger Kemal Kilicdaroglu. Erdogan's competition has focused his campaign on the struggling economy and the government's culpability for and response to the recent earthquake disaster that shook the nation. () ➤ James Comer(R-KY) hints that the informant for the recent whistle-blowing against the Bidens may be missing. The information pointed to influence-peddling abroad while Joe Biden was the Vice President. () ➤ A Russian news outlet is reporting that four Russian military planes were shot down over the weekend—including two advanced fighters and two attack helicopters. The attack was apparently a well-timed ambush that took down all four aircraft quickly. () ➤ GOP Senators have introduced a bill that would ban taxpayer-funded drag shows. Sen. Steve Daines (R-MT) calls the practice “a threat to our national security and gross misuse of taxpayer funds.” () Flying together with: You love a good glass of wine. But do you love choosing a bottle at the liquor store? There are hundreds of options, but you only recognize a few and you don't have all day to search for reviews. Bright Cellars has figured out to buy wine. Instead of choosing the prettiest label or trusting an arbitrary rating placed by the distributor (they all seem to be rated very high, don't they?), you can that zeroes in on your palate and provides scientific recommendations. Next, choose a subscription level and have your custom-picked bottles shipped right to your door. Flyover readers get $100 off their purchase; just . If you want to extend your Mother's Day celebration, wine is a for moms (and the whole family!) ➤ Car owner Rick Hendrick had a strong message for Ross Chastain after he caused yet another wreck for Kyle Larson. "If you wreck us, you're going to get it back." He also noted that it's "tough to win a championship" when you make enemies on the track. () ➤ Ja Morant recently completed his NBA suspension and apology tour for brandishing a gun inside a Denver nightclub during a social media live-stream. Shortly after an interview with Jalen Rose in which he promised to make better decisions, Morant appeared in another live-stream--waiving around a handgun. He's likely to face a long suspension. () ➤ WNBA player Brittany Griner played in her first game since being imprisoned for 10 months in Russia. Griner said that the national anthem before the game "hit different" and that it felt like the Olympics. She previously criticized the playing of the national anthem before WNBA games. () Market Report Previous Week | ▲ | Nasdaq Natl. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 12,284.74 | + 0.40% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | S&P S&P Global Rating | 4,124.08 | - 0.29% ▼ | DOW J Dow Jones Industrial Average | 33,300.62 | - 01.11% ▲ | BTC Bitcoin | $27,459.0 | + 2.5% ▲ | FSLR First Solar, Inc. | $231.69 | + 26.48% ➤ Only 58.5 of Americans paid for live TV subscriptions during Q1. That's the lowest number since 1992, and it's almost certainly due to the popularity of streaming services like Netflix. () ➤ The developers of the Ritz-Carlton Residences in Palm Beach Gardens, FL, set a record for a post-rake-hike loan: $340 million to complete the luxury condos. () ➤ Twitter has confirmed that its new CEO will be Linda Yaccarino. She's a veteran advertising executive who will be expected to return advertiser dollars to the platform. () ➤ Google 's Magic Editor allows users to shift objects within photos and uses AI to populate the uncovered backgrounds. () ➤ An antenna was jammed for weeks on a European Space Agency craft headed for Jupiter, but flight controllers were able to jar it loose. () ➤ A Florida man has set the record for the longest consecutive days lived without coming above the sea’s surface. He’s been down there for 75 days and is aiming for 100. () ➤ Poker legend Doyle Brunson died at the age of 89. He's known as the Godfather of Poker and leaves behind a long legacy of winning, teaching, and making the game popular. () ➤ A TikTok** trend has caused Fruit Roll-Ups to fly off the shelves in Israel and created an underground market for the treats. Americans were caught smuggling 720 pounds of them into the country. ---
Marina the matriarch.
Playful, spirited Cappuccino.
Young Ripple -- a symbol of hope.
_**All dead. **_
That leaves only 73 Southern Resident orcas left in the wild. They are starving, grieving, and growing weaker every day. Yet Big Oil is pushing forward with two megaprojects that could very well wipe out Southern Resident orcas forever -- and one has already been approved. That’s why orcas need you to act URGENTLY. [**Help protect the remaining 73 Southern Resident orcas and our planet before their fate is sealed: Donate $27 or more now and help us reach our $4,630 goal by midnight tonight!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772297?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Southern Resident orcas function in close-knit, sensitive family communities known as pods. When they lose a family member, their chances of survival plummet as their grief pushes them further into starvation. The loss of Cappuccino and Marina was incredibly devastating. But now, their pods are again mourning with the recent loss of young Ripple -- whose birth once sparked hope for their survival.
Southern Resident orcas are facing many challenges right now. A chronic lack of food. Constant grief. Debilitating stress. **They are just one major oil spill away from extinction.** But Big Oil and the shipping industry are driving forward two devastating megaprojects through delicate orca habitat. **If they succeed, that’s as good as putting the last nail in the coffin for Southern Resident orcas, Friend.** We can’t let it come to that.
**Don’t let Southern Resident orcas grieve another death. Donate $27 and help us reach our $4,630 goal before midnight tonight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772293?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772294?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772295?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772296?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Southern Resident orcas are the only endangered species of killer whales in the United States. Once thriving in the waters of Washington and British Columbia, this precious species has been on the decline since 2006.
One key contributor is food availability. Orcas rely on Chinook salmon as their main food source. While these fish were once abundant in their ecosystems, they’ve substantially declined in the last decade. In fact, many Chinook salmon runs are now threatened or endangered themselves.
Struggling to find food, orcas are being driven to starvation. They’re under extreme stress and even enduring miscarriages. **Big Oil and Big Shipping’s megaprojects would amplify these threats -- and would ultimately devastate the remaining Southern Resident orca population.**
The proposed expansion of the Trans Mountain Pipeline would increase oil tanker traffic in Southern Resident critical habitat SEVEN-FOLD. This means going from one oil tanker a week through these waters to one per day! Worst of all, it will also be pumping millions of gallons of toxic tar sands oil per day -- _**the dirtiest kind**_ \-- through this already delicate orca habitat.
The Roberts Bank T2 shipping terminal project would significantly increase cargo ship traffic and disrupt Chinook salmon migration patterns. That would drive them further away from orca habitat. The noise pollution from the ships will also disrupt the killer whales’ sonar hunting methods, preventing them from finding the few salmon left in the region. And now, the worst has happened: this shipping terminal has recently been approved by the Canadian government. But we can still fight back!
If we let Big Oil get away with their reckless plans in pursuit of profit, it could be too late for Southern Resident orcas. Between the chronic lack of salmon and the disruption of their hunting methods, orcas will starve to death and be driven to extinction. We have to show Big Oil and the shipping industry that we will not allow them to put corporate profits over the lives of precious wildlife and the ecosystems that rely on them.
**We can’t let Big Oil push vulnerable orcas further toward the brink -- the time to fight back is NOW. Rush your $27 donation today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772293?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772294?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772295?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772296?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that orcas play a part in the air you breathe? That’s right, Friend. Orcas release vital nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. They absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs.
But orcas are just one oil spill away from extinction. And we know that oil spills are not a matter of “if,” but rather “when.” Proposed Big Oil megaprojects like the expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline could be fatal. Orcas can’t detect oil spills. When the next oil spill occurs, they may swim through toxic tar sands oil, leading to**infection, suffocation, and death.** Even the fumes alone can knock out and drown a full-grown whale.
Friend, how long will we let Big Oil and the shipping industry further endanger vulnerable Southern Resident orcas? Your membership support today will go a long way toward stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 73 orcas and protecting our planet.
Orcas are at a tipping point -- and _**if we don’t act soon, we could lose them forever.**_ Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. But we can’t do it without your help. Please, Friend, join us in this fight and rush your $27 contribution today before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures.
**Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $4,630 goal.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1772293?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

Marcie Keever

Orcas release vital nutrients for phytoplankton, which in turn provide half of the oxygen we breathe. But their impact doesn’t stop there. They absorb hundreds of thousands of tons of carbon each year. This flow of nutrients promotes healthy ecosystems and a functioning planet, which is why we must protect these orcas at all costs. But orcas are just one oil spill away from extinction. And we know that oil spills are not a matter of “if,” but rather “when.” Proposed Big Oil megaprojects like the expanded Trans Mountain Pipeline could be fatal. Orcas can’t detect oil spills. When the next oil spill occurs, they may swim through toxic tar sands oil, leading toinfection, suffocation, and death. Even the fumes alone can knock out and drown a full-grown whale. Friend, how long will we let Big Oil and the shipping industry further endanger vulnerable Southern Resident orcas? Your membership support today will go a long way toward stopping these reckless megaprojects that have the potential to wipe out the remaining 73 orcas and protecting our planet. Orcas are at a tipping point -- and if we don’t act soon, we could lose them forever. Friends of the Earth is doing everything we can to fight against greedy corporate interests and save these precious whales and our planet. But we can’t do it without your help. Please, Friend, join us in this fight and rush your $27 contribution today before the clock strikes midnight and we lose any more of these majestic creatures. Don’t let Big Oil and corporate greed exploit our oceans for profit. Donate $27 now to stand up for orcas and our planet and help us reach our $4,630 goal. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Marcie Keever Oceans and vessels program director, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

body:
See what the AG and Team have been doing this week in the Commonwealth!
---
| | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa104e60a8913e230c803a0d9b9a94b54545eb0f20e8ebf9f506a2837f8bfce0f721e3cae20354170f5c721a8034d077240)

---
|
---
|
---
**Attorney General Miyares delivered National Child ID Kits to Chickahominy Middle School in Mechanicsville this week! **
---
|
---
|
---
| | [LEARN MORE ABOUT THE CHILD INITIATIVE KIT](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa186ad46ec3d74c4df1694c8965bf19343b070c69315ebe205cf81888ec23be4ea0fd4d1371001a38e2b78d004cad21a44)
---
|
---
**National Fentanyl Awareness Day**
---
**Attorney General Miyares joined state leaders in Stafford on Tuesday where the Governor signed legislation aimed to help tackle Virginia 's opioid epidemic and fentanyl crisis. **
---
|
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa183ed2356e590d59fef9003493c8dabca412b42c69613aff4bac8a15991d7763931dbdd21f89e99d6b4834079e5282fbb)

|
---
| | [WATCH HERE](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa183ed2356e590d59fef9003493c8dabca412b42c69613aff4bac8a15991d7763931dbdd21f89e99d6b4834079e5282fbb)
---
|
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa1299b0fd02ca7f7a6c656be6256e8e65585c94df031670737020a24bd0b51658687f4c1eeb0f75bfaf437fcd2982ab521)
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa1322c64ce20bb2691b2cc5ec8dbc9055ed4d9cc5d47a96a2eb915e86457ec53b120345119cbedb83d7ec48251797c0296)
---
**Attorney General Miyares also had the opportunity to deliver Child ID Kits to Passage Middle School in Newport News this week!**
---
|
---
|
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa14135b63eb0b94aa52edfddc85c8628d1e1acb8cd89eedd707fe265f87a59a16a6dcde50c47a0035ef41d1c2da7d079d5)
---
**Attorney General Miyares announced that Virginia consumers misled by TurboTax 's owner Intuit into paying for a free tax service will begin receiving checks this month. Virginia received more than $3.6 million for more than 119,000 consumers tricked by Intuit. ** _**" TurboTax misled Virginians, and now they are officially paying the price. Over $3.6 million dollars has been secured for the 119,899 Virginians that were tricked into paying unnecessary fees. I'm proud that my office was able to put that money back into the affected consumers' pockets, where it belonged all along." **_ **- Attorney General Miyares**
---
| | [LEARN MORE ABOUT THE SETTLEMENT HERE](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa1a138643f616c606d8b1089da8ef515f7e2e5dda95aaf4e368682c6253e23f81c2199eb3e6a6a369f9e11723523d98819)
---
|
---
**Hate Has No Home Here**
---
|
---
**This week, AG Miyares joined Governor Youngkin as he signed the working definition of antisemitism into Virginia law. ** **This establishes a uniform precedent and educational tool to help law enforcement, educators, and community leaders recognize acts of antisemitic hate so it can be addressed.**
---
|
---
|
---
**The American Miracle**
---
|
---
** At Red Hill on Friday, AG Miyares was honored to serve as the keynote speaker at a naturalization ceremony where America gained 30 citizens representing nearly 20 countries! **
---
|
---
_**Congratulations to all - we are so excited for you!**_
---
|
---
| [](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa1f38a87e25fcba33e9b4db7f45a257c4426e7f2514bc2955260164950f5b561262a19a0e8c6958b5ab666c64725c423bc)
---
| **Attorney General Miyares announced that his Unemployment Compensation Fraud Unit has produced two indictments this week. ** **Last March, the Virginia Employment Commission asked AG Miyares to help prosecute fraudulent claims for unemployment compensation. This is the fourth round of indictments AG Miyares has announced. ** _**" I'm proud of the work put in by my Unemployment Compensation Fraud Unit, the Virginia State Police, and our federal partners to ensure that unemployment compensation fraud allegations are thoroughly investigated, and that those who attempt to take advantage of Virginians are held accountable for their wrong and illegal actions." **_ **- Attorney General Miyares**
---
| | [LEARN MORE ABOUT THE INDICTMENTS](https://click.email.miyares-for-virginia.com/?qs=f660200a798aafa14a0f63110c487d190cb647a632a6229acc8a5107f6136ce0a5d73d983465344684cc689766ded84ee8f5ff0d60d0277d)
---
|
---
**Cordoza for the 86th!**
---
**AG Miyares joined Delegate A.C. Cordoza in Hampton this week and is thrilled to support him in his race for the 86th District! **
---
|

I'm proud that my office was able to put that money back into the affected consumers' pockets, where it belonged all along." - Attorney General Miyares | | | Hate Has No Home Here | This week, AG Miyares joined Governor Youngkin as he signed the working definition of antisemitism into Virginia law. This establishes a uniform precedent and educational tool to help law enforcement, educators, and community leaders recognize acts of antisemitic hate so it can be addressed. | | The American Miracle | At Red Hill on Friday, AG Miyares was honored to serve as the keynote speaker at a naturalization ceremony where America gained 30 citizens representing nearly 20 countries! | Congratulations to all - we are so excited for you! | | | Attorney General Miyares announced that his Unemployment Compensation Fraud Unit has produced two indictments this week. Last March, the Virginia Employment Commission asked AG Miyares to help prosecute fraudulent claims for unemployment compensation. This is the fourth round of indictments AG Miyares has announced. " I'm proud of the work put in by my Unemployment Compensation Fraud Unit, the Virginia State Police, and our federal partners to ensure that unemployment compensation fraud allegations are thoroughly investigated, and that those who attempt to take advantage of Virginians are held accountable for their wrong and illegal actions." - Attorney General Miyares | | | Cordoza for the 86th! AG Miyares joined Delegate A.C. Cordoza in Hampton this week and is thrilled to support him in his race for the 86th District! | | | | | | | | | | | | | Until next time, Jason Miyares | | | | "JasonMiyares.com" | | DONATE TODAY TO FUEL JASON'S FIGHT TO PROTECT THE COMMONWEALTH! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |

name: AOTL
subject: How did we get here?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Team, we face a critical moment in our fight against gerrymandering. The Supreme Court is set to hand down decisions that could have far-reaching consequences for voting rights. And in states like Alabama, we're up against power-hungry interests that will stop at nothing to maintain their grip on political power.
[**But how did we get here?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63302816/406311940/-1070237729?refcode=20230515_AOTL_F_MvH2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkZDkxYjAxLTE4ZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qsYoIX8zxseWP6aRyc4wp9WU9DIGvY8hTsTmcJ5k_P0=)
**In the 1960s** , civil rights workers and Black voters risked their lives in voter registration drives. They faced violence, intimidation, and even death. **But they knew what they were doing was right and were willing to put everything on the line to fight for justice.**
**In 1965** , The Voting Rights Act (VRA) was passed to protect the voting rights of Black Americans who were systematically disenfranchised. **And it made a real difference, for Black voters and disenfranchised communities across the country.**
**In 2013** , the Supreme Court gutted key provisions of the VRA, and since then, we've seen a wave of voter suppression efforts across the country.
**In January of 2022** , federal district judges issued a decision striking down Alabama’s enacted congressional map for likely diluting the voting power of Black communities in Alabama in violation of the VRA.
**In October of 2022** , the Supreme Court heard oral arguments in _Allen v. Milligan_ (formerly _Merrill v. Milligan_) to determine whether Alabama’s 2021 congressional redistricting map dilutes the voting power of Black communities.
**And in 2023** , the Supreme Court will soon rule on _Allen v. Milligan_ , a case that will determine whether a gerrymandered, congressional redistricting map is constitutional or violates the Voting Rights Act.
[**Black voters in Alabama face the threat of their votes being diluted because of gerrymandering. If this happens, Black Alabamians will be silenced and their political power diminished. Will you chip in $23 today to help All On The Line have the resources we need to remain vigilant in our fight for Black voters in states like Alabama?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63302817/406311941/-1070237729?refcode=20230515_AOTL_F_MvH2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkZDkxYjAxLTE4ZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qsYoIX8zxseWP6aRyc4wp9WU9DIGvY8hTsTmcJ5k_P0=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The outcome of _Allen v. Milligan_ could determine the future of voting rights and fair representation in Alabama and beyond. That’s why we are working tirelessly to ensure we're fully prepared to respond to whatever the U.S. Supreme Court decides.
We are the civil rights workers of our generation, team. Thank you for sticking with us on what's right and fighting to ensure that every voter has a fair shot, regardless of race or politics. **[Rush a donation to All On The Line today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63302824/406311948/-1070237729?refcode=20230515_AOTL_F_MvH2_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkZDkxYjAxLTE4ZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qsYoIX8zxseWP6aRyc4wp9WU9DIGvY8hTsTmcJ5k_P0=)**
\-- All On The Line

**[Morning Greatness: VP Harris Gathers Abortion Allies Ahead of 2024](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._N2TCsmgqQLbGg)**
Good Monday morning. Here is what’s on 46 agenda today: 9:40am: The President and the FIRST LADY arrive in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 4:05pm: The President and The First Lady arrive at the White House News roundup:Dangerous heat wave continues along West CoastScoop: Planned Parenthood calls for major judicial reformVP Harris gathers abortion allies ahead of 2024Paper ..

[ ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._dXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWFjdF9lbmcmc2V5aWQ9NjU3NTcifQ/-4oz1tX7lKX3SV4OPOrmqQ)

name: Team Emerge
subject: Did you see A'shanti's call to action?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | |
---
Peter, Democrats count on Black women to rally, get out the vote, and deliver monumental wins in every election. Now, with the direction of our country at stake, more Americans are choosing Black women to lead!
**But here’s the problem:** Our society _always_ expects Black women leaders to fight the full might of the GOP and defend democracy on a shoestring budget. With extreme Republicans spending millions per race to defeat bold, community-driven candidates, we need to step up for Black women leaders the way they step up for us all.
**Emerge is committed to empowering Black women to run for office, win, and transform politics at every level. But our crucial mid-month deadline is midnight tonight and we’re still falling short of our goal. With time running out:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63304380/406316043/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1206-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwYjU3NWU0LTFjZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NZtIsJD5bYo89jG5gY8127-K0IuterAPFG9l4eTOjZ0=)
**[Will you give $5 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and elect bold Democratic women in every state?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63304381/406316044/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1206-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwYjU3NWU0LTFjZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NZtIsJD5bYo89jG5gY8127-K0IuterAPFG9l4eTOjZ0=)**

---
Right now there are 27 Black women in Congress, 10 in statewide office, 368 in state legislatures, and nine leading as mayors of major cities. **That’s progress, Peter, but it isn’t enough. **
Data shows that Black women running for office receive just ONE-THIRD of the funding compared to white women. We **_must_** do better so that all our communities have a real voice in our democracy.
Emerge is working tirelessly to change the face of politics and ensure that bold Democratic women have the support they need to fight for the rights, dignity, and prosperity of all our communities. **That’s why we can’t afford to miss this mid-month goal, and we need your help now to close the gap. Please: **
**[Donate $5 or more to Emerge now, before our crucial mid-month deadline at midnight, to empower bold Democratic women to lead at every level of government and turn our country around.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63304386/406316049/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1206-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwYjU3NWU0LTFjZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=NZtIsJD5bYo89jG5gY8127-K0IuterAPFG9l4eTOjZ0=)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Democrats count on Black women to rally, get out the vote, and deliver monumental wins in every election. Now, with the direction of our country at stake, more Americans are choosing Black women to lead! But here’s the problem: Our society always expects Black women leaders to fight the full might of the GOP and defend democracy on a shoestring budget. With extreme Republicans spending millions per race to defeat bold, community-driven candidates, we need to step up for Black women leaders the way they step up for us all. Emerge is committed to empowering Black women to run for office, win, and transform politics at every level. But our crucial mid-month deadline is midnight tonight and we’re still falling short of our goal. With time running out: = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | | | = | = | | = | = Right now there are 27 Black women in Congress, 10 in statewide office, 368 in state legislatures, and nine leading as mayors of major cities. That’s progress, Peter, but it isn’t enough. Data shows that Black women running for office receive just ONE-THIRD of the funding compared to white women. We must_ do better so that all our communities have a real voice in our democracy. Emerge is working tirelessly to change the face of politics and ensure that bold Democratic women have the support they need to fight for the rights, dignity, and prosperity of all our communities. That’s why we can’t afford to miss this mid-month goal, and we need your help now to close the gap. Please: = Thank you for being a part of our movement, Team Emerge P.S. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: Is tonight a real fundraising deadline?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Yes and no. Let us explain...
#

Peter -
Tonight at midnight we close the books on an important mid-month fundraising deadline for our campaign. But is it a real deadline?
Yes and no... let us explain.
**No, it’s not a real deadline** in the sense that we are legally required to report our fundraising numbers after tonight.
**But yes, it’s a real deadline** in the sense that it marks the halfway point to our FEC deadline and that makes it a critical and understandable point to mark our progress.
**And what is very real** is that our fundraising has slowed dramatically since our last FEC deadline ended. And we are using tonight’s “deadline” as a moment to reset our goals and spending decisions.
So please. We don’t want to cut. Our budgets are set month-by-month based on what we need to win. So as we get closer to midnight, we’re asking:
[**Can Ruben count on you to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? It all adds up when we’re all chipping-in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=1&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.PGJo9e&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=20&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.WTNOdd&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=21&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.V9nigw&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=22&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.tGte5p&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=23&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.Zk4WIo&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=24&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&refcode=em230515-1-500&t=25&akid=632%2E734936%2Ee2TRpJ)**

We don’t expect anyone to give to every email we send, but we hope you will chip in a few bucks to this one. It’s important.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWo_oWcDaN

Strange...and disturbing.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWo_oWcDaN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

What
strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you
have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries
being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire-all while
authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or
stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic
parishes in the United States?

How about
the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by
up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that
forced many houses of worship to close?

These
news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians
encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it
seems like faith in America is under siege.

That's
one reason we're releasing our latest free online course,
"Ancient Christianity," this month. I hope you'll enroll today
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61805613:Wo_oWcDaN:m:3:2532013465:22045680DA9B5D1DF263E628C1D442A8:r

The
course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians
who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same
time, they shaped the Christian church and established the
foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

Their
examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.

For
instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution
of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin
Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a
lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he
wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and
immorality.

That's
why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting "Ancient
Christianity" to millions of your fellow citizens.

To
achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by
midnight on May 22 to share this important free online course
with as many people as possible.

The
faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online
courses possible. You also allow us to reach and teach millions
through other educational outreach efforts, like Imprimis and our
K-12 education programs.

And every
supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY
PENNY of taxpayer funding-even indirectly in the form of federal
or state student loans and grants.

We must
educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we
can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and
set an example for us to follow.

So, will
you help us reach and teach people just like you-urging them to
enroll in "Ancient Christianity"?

Using
this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our
development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of
$25, $50, or any amount.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61805613:Wo_oWcDaN:m:3:2532013465:22045680DA9B5D1DF263E628C1D442A8:r

Together,
we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for
the next generation of Americans-so they don't have to live
through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm
regards,

Bill
Gray, '01
Vice
President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWo_oWcDaN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

Peter, I have some incredible news to share with you: **A generous group of donors has offered to MATCH all gifts up to $10,000 during this month's mid-month series – _ but ONLY if we get 250 donations by midnight tonight._**
So I'm humbly asking: **[Can I count on you to rush a donation of _any size_ right now to unlock this incredibly rare match? As one of my most engaged supporters, I know I can count on you to be one of the 250 donors I need.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63305094/406319581/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1069-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWE3ODAxNC0yMWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qM79h4gCVh23eUPxIpGCv6oe860H1U6ilCz2nnpVjM=)**

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63305096/406319586/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1069-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWE3ODAxNC0yMWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qM79h4gCVh23eUPxIpGCv6oe860H1U6ilCz2nnpVjM=)
**This match could not have come at a more vital time.** 2023 has been nothing short of devastating for millions of Americans as attacks on reproductive freedom have continued to ramp up, mass shootings have continued to claim more lives, and the mere existence of transgender people has continued to be debated and threatened.
Peter, I vow to _never_ waver in my fight for reproductive rights, commonsense gun reform, and LGBTQ+ rights. But I'm counting on top supporters like _you_ to join me. name: Felix Frisch
subject: a 24,000-mile father-son road trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Hey there. It’s Felix Frisch – Adam Frisch’s son.
When my dad told us that he was going to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, I did what most 16-year-olds would do: I took a year off from school to be involved in the campaign.

Technically, I went “online” for school – and yes, I definitely missed all my friends. But I wouldn’t go back and change it for the world.

My dad and I hitched a trailer to our red pickup truck and crisscrossed the entire district, taking turns at the wheel. He shook hands with voters, while I organized 130 interns virtually to make 700,000 phone calls for the campaign.

It felt like a 24,000-mile father-son road trip; just my dad, me... and the thousands of people we met at every stop along the way.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63305207/406320209/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2578-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc4MDE0LTIxZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vf8iGsDuyH-krNfhR1gwT87HA4VgBAdt7JadX7TIV48=)
The campaign was hard. My sister and I knew they’d probably make up and say a lot of false things about our dad. But hearing and seeing the lies all over TV and social media is another thing entirely.

It was all worth it, though. We made hundreds of stops, met so many people, ate so much good food... And Dad came so close to winning and defeating Boebert! It was an experience I’ll never forget.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63305208/406320237/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2578-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc4MDE0LTIxZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vf8iGsDuyH-krNfhR1gwT87HA4VgBAdt7JadX7TIV48=)
Now, Dad’s running again, and I know that, with your help, he _will_ defeat Lauren Boebert this time.

**[It means a lot to our entire family that people like you have got his back. So if you can, please split a donation now between my dad Adam Frisch’s campaign and American Bridge PAC and help him defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63305209/406320238/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2578-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc4MDE0LTIxZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vf8iGsDuyH-krNfhR1gwT87HA4VgBAdt7JadX7TIV48=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63305210/406320239/-321553144?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2578-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU5YTc4MDE0LTIxZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Vf8iGsDuyH-krNfhR1gwT87HA4VgBAdt7JadX7TIV48=)

name: Joe Shepherd, President of URD
subject: I'm home, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Thank you for the warm welcome back.

| |
---
Hi Peter, I'm back at the helm of URD, and I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for the warm welcome and for continuing to support United Rural Democrats. **While I took a brief leave of absence from my role as President of URD, I never stopped working toward our mission – ensuring that rural folks are at the forefront of building a better country for us all.** In fact, I spent much of my time over the past few months working with and speaking directly to leaders in Washington and making sure rural perspectives were heard. **I continued to forge relationships with some of the most important figures in rural politics. Leaders like Sen. Jon Tester, Sen. Tammy Duckworth, and Sen. Bob Casey.** In Washington, I had an opportunity to work on Social Security and Medicare policy that directly affects both me and my family. **Now, I'm ready to take the lessons from my time on the Hill and put them to work where I call home – in rural communities.** On my first day back, my team wasted no time telling me how important your support has been in keeping our URD operation going, Peter. In Washington, I saw how truly divided our government is, but I also saw how courageous leadership, allyship, and hard work can get things done. [**_We need your support to ensure rural districts can elect Democratic leaders in 2023/2024 and get things done for our communities. clean_body: Thank you for the warm welcome back. | | Hi Peter, I'm back at the helm of URD, and I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for the warm welcome and for continuing to support United Rural Democrats. While I took a brief leave of absence from my role as President of URD, I never stopped working toward our mission – ensuring that rural folks are at the forefront of building a better country for us all. In fact, I spent much of my time over the past few months working with and speaking directly to leaders in Washington and making sure rural perspectives were heard. I continued to forge relationships with some of the most important figures in rural politics. Leaders like Sen. Jon Tester, Sen. Tammy Duckworth, and Sen. Bob Casey. In Washington, I had an opportunity to work on Social Security and Medicare policy that directly affects both me and my family. Now, I'm ready to take the lessons from my time on the Hill and put them to work where I call home – in rural communities. On my first day back, my team wasted no time telling me how important your support has been in keeping our URD operation going, Peter. In Washington, I saw how truly divided our government is, but I also saw how courageous leadership, allyship, and hard work can get things done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = I'm reinvigorated to lead the charge in electing Democratic candidates in rural America. Thank you for joining me. \- Joe Shepherd, President of URD | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . United Rural Democrats PO Box 44 Tampico, IL 61283 United States

name: Ann
subject: This is hard for me to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Let me explain everything:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I come to you today with a heavy heart. I just met with my finance team, and our fundraising numbers aren't looking too good.

Each and every day, I am reminded of how much of a tremendous honor it is to represent MO-02 in Congress. I have met many great people and pride myself on all my work for Missourians.

I was born and raised in Missouri and am proud to be a loyal Conservative. I am a dedicated Christian and a former Ambassador. Additionally, I am a proud mother and grandmother. Since taking office, I have been focused on strengthening our economy, fixing our healthcare system, securing our southern border, and everything else in-between.

_But I can 't continue to fulfill my promises without some help._

So, I'm asking you this: _**[Can you chip in just $5 (yes, JUST $5!) to help me keep my promises? Anything you can give, no matter how big or small, will make an incredible difference in my fight.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z81p6m6caj9oahqf409j40bkpg4pd827dhnb71p0_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm0p72c9h2bs "Can you chip in just $5 \(yes, JUST $5!\) to help me keep my promises? Anything you can give, no matter how big or small, will make an incredible difference in my fight.")**_
---
| | | [SUPPORT ANN WAGNER](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmpihiopp24k3m5p6kbtgih34kdlsd009cd9jfho_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm0p72c9h2bs "SUPPORT ANN WAGNER")
---
I don't guarantee much, but I can guarantee you this - with your help, every promise I made to you in November will be advanced, and each bill I sponsor will be fought for, Friend.

_So please, chip in and support my fight for you. It will mean the world to me._

Sincerely,

Ann Wagner

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zppcson92aatqj7k9eo6fn2thml1ekj4cmm2mdf8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm8pb4c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1lv6e5kvq0a9816rft4413hb74glhk6rn9coj8g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm8pb4c3h2bs)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z775c57b4jveoec4bpkeb5ikcvno2q7k5hp0c6v8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm8pb4c3h2bs)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2h27ag8kbu19i7omo7fmcfgio434jhbrpq6d46o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshi60pj4shh648d245p25oh4cdge2p37chim8o724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlcelusmaes8lvaobl2pkk53hhept23rslbgfj4g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm8pb4c3h2bs)_

name: Great America Update
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79236%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GFP7JgAjizTOv9S9uPesPw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we’ve produced our newest online course, “Ancient Christianity,” which we’ll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79237%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ODsZgr4hT4wkQ44mHKODUw&sysid=1)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79238%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q3mWwIau43br6eV7aasHjw&sysid=1)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

President Trump recently invited you to become a Founding Member of his PRESIDENT’S TRUST. | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST INVITATION : dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: TONIGHT at 11:59 PM | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST was formed in February of 2023 once it became clear that the Left’s 2024 game plan would be to launch endless witch hunts to destroy our movement. Your membership will support our America First movement in the midst of the most vicious witch hunts concocted by the Deep State. | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Fri, May 12, 2023 Subject: Re-authorized To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | Friend, The fate of our Republic rests in your hands. If America’s elections can now be decided through vicious and baseless witch hunts, then we will have lost our Republic for good. 2024 is our final chance to save America – and I need YOU to peacefully stand by my side to save it. Because the recent wave of witch hunts has inspired a record number of first-time donors to join our movement, I’ve decided to re-authorize enrollment in my PRESIDENT’S TRUST – and I’m inviting YOU to become a Founding Member. These Founders will go down in history as having defended our movement at thePEAK of the most vicious witch hunts ever witnessed in our country. These patriots refused to surrender our country to the radical Left – and I hope you’ll want to join them. | | THE PRESIDENT’S TRUST FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP INVITATION FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com STATUS: PENDING DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT | The Deep State has wanted to destroy me ever since I first vowed to fight for the American people. And now they see that our movement is stronger than ever before. We’re winning the Republican primary by 40-50 points! Our lead against Biden is so massive that even the Fake News can’t deny it! So now, they can only resort to abusing the system to try and sabotage the only political movement that promises to put power back in the hands of the people of our country. But I trust you won’t let them get away with it. We need to save America – and 2024 is our final chance. Thank you, | Donald J. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story.
