name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach another fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18956?t=1001&akid=3238%2E346206%2EOGrhWm ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18956?t=1002&akid=3238%2E346206%2EOGrhWm ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230515-3238-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3238_346206_OGrhWm&akid=3238%2E346206%2EOGrhWm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3238%2E346206%2EOGrhWm

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

Finn, who has vowed to block the permitless carry of guns to protect our kids. We must fight to ensure liberty doesn't die in the very state where it began._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tecd49d65-e07a-4161-9323-b45cd9b8e533/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Boyd & Finn to fight for our basic rights and stop the authoritarian policies of MAGA Republicans._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1740d3d-635e-43d3-8079-31e2f5c85a74/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting this fight everywhere it's required!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: BOMBSHELL PRESS RELEASE: Chesterfield County Chair Only Invites Sturtevant Campaign to Certify Early Voting Equipment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Complete Conflict of Interest Appearance of Collusion
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WoBTKvp5qBowlaoJL3b0k-GQKClZ8uY28WMevYZiZC_pmPgzyV0Dukw3EDFmIPDUcTYGvDP5T34LXT3o00IMyrGssQBExMmHoGk8LTfn4Y4LgiKGhLH5WpDGYRmL2IEEyZUDJrTqCAQoekOQ-kQh8VwcQG6S5R305YLr54H8cZM=&c=w6cnrekGELUTMR50Bh9e0q3bhkPUArj8Oo9dW-keesuTiOs1UZ_MHw==&ch=AwUukyk6YNTnVZRuaeao3QPdfbB783tKbk56aYwZLfb2T66YM-90dg==)
---
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
May 15, 2023

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Documented Appearance of Election Collusion Between Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley and Sturtevant Campaign

Chesterfield GOP Chair Only Invites Sturtevant Campaign to Certify
Early Voting Equipment Prior to the Election

CHESTERFIELD, VA- Senator Amanda Chase, Chairwoman of the National Election Integrity Caucus and Incumbent Senator seeking the Republican nomination for Senate District 12 in a Republican Primary, requested and now has received documentation from the Chesterfield Country Registrar's Office to confirm suspicions of collusion between the current GOP Chair and the Sturtevant campaign.

The Chesterfield County Registrar's office has confirmed through documentation that Chesterfield GOP Chair and attorney Leslie Haley did indeed authorize Lauren Fulcher, the Campaign Manager of the Sturtevant campaign to be the sole campaign representative representing the Chesterfield GOP to witness the certification of early voting machines in Chesterfield County. No other campaigns were invited. At first she submitted the name "Lauren Fuller" but when pressed by the Chesterfield Registrar's office correctly admitted it was indeed "Lauren Fulcher."

The Chesterfield GOP Chair Leslie Haley was asked by the Chesterfield Registrar's office to provide one name to serve as the Republican representative witnessing the certification process of the early voting election equipment. She chose Lauren Fulcher, the Campaign Manager and largest donor for the Glenn Sturtevant campaign, instead of a neutral observer, which is a complete conflict of interest and the appearance of clear and convincing documentation that the Chesterfield GOP Chair is colluding and coordinating with the Sturtevant campaign to ensure victory in the Republican Primary, in which early voting began on Friday, May 5.
"This documentation appears to confirm what our team has suspected all along, collusion between the Sturtevant campaign and the Chesterfield GOP Chair to influence the SD12 race in favor of Sturtevant. It appears we have caught them red handed and have now have the documentation to support what appears to be an underhanded effort in favor of Sturtevant," stated Senator Chase.
"At a time when voter confidence in our election process is at an all-time low, we should be working diligently to restore that confidence of voters by ensuring all processes are transparent, fair and above reproach. All campaigns should have been invited to view the certification of the voting equipment, not just one. If only one representative could have been chosen, they should have been a neutral party member, not the campaign manager of one particular campaign."
"I am deeply disturbed by this egregious and obvious conflict of interest by Chairwoman Leslie Haley who we know has already endorsed Glen Sturtevant and demand her resignation immediately. It is clear she is not neutral and appears she is actively working to help Sturtevant. Leslie Haley and Glen Sturtevant are both attorneys and know better. They are without excuse."
"This is an arrogantly blatant conflict of interest and a complete failure in judgment on the part of both the party chair and the Sturtevant campaign, creating at the vey least an appearance of collusion between the Chesterfield GOP Chair and the Sturtevant campaign. Chesterfield County Chairwoman Leslie Haley needs to step down immediately," stated Senator Chase.
"Clearly this is a case of the fox guarding the hen house. I'm deeply disturbed and outraged that the Sturtevant campaign who falsely professes to be a champion for election integrity, has engaged in compromising and unacceptable behavior that further undermines the confidence of voters in a fair, transparent and uncompromised election."
Please see the documentation below submitted to Senator Chase by the Chesterfield Registrar's office and made available on the Virginia Access Project.
---
|
---
|
---
Initially, Chesterfield Chairwoman Leslie Haley submits the name, "Lauren Fuller" instead of "Lauren Fulcher." Was this misspelling intentional and was it an intentional attempt to hide the fact that the chair was going to have the Campaign Manager of the Sturtevant campaign to be the only GOP representative to view the certification of the voting equipment?
---
|
---
|
---
| Lauren Fulcher is not only the official Campaign Manager for the Sturtevant campaign, but she has donated thousands to Glen Sturtevant's campaign and yet she was the only Republican invited and present to certify the voting equipment. Documentation from VPAP.
---
|
---
| This endorsement letter shows the clear intent of the Chesterfield GOP Chair to support Glen Sturtevant. While this endorsement was made prior to her serving as the Chesterfield County Chair, it clearly demonstrates she is not a neutral party.
---
|

She chose Lauren Fulcher, the Campaign Manager and largest donor for the Glenn Sturtevant campaign, instead of a neutral observer, which is a complete conflict of interest and the appearance of clear and convincing documentation that the Chesterfield GOP Chair is colluding and coordinating with the Sturtevant campaign to ensure victory in the Republican Primary, in which early voting began on Friday, May 5. "This documentation appears to confirm what our team has suspected all along, collusion between the Sturtevant campaign and the Chesterfield GOP Chair to influence the SD12 race in favor of Sturtevant. It appears we have caught them red handed and have now have the documentation to support what appears to be an underhanded effort in favor of Sturtevant," stated Senator Chase. "At a time when voter confidence in our election process is at an all-time low, we should be working diligently to restore that confidence of voters by ensuring all processes are transparent, fair and above reproach. All campaigns should have been invited to view the certification of the voting equipment, not just one. If only one representative could have been chosen, they should have been a neutral party member, not the campaign manager of one particular campaign." "I am deeply disturbed by this egregious and obvious conflict of interest by Chairwoman Leslie Haley who we know has already endorsed Glen Sturtevant and demand her resignation immediately. It is clear she is not neutral and appears she is actively working to help Sturtevant. Leslie Haley and Glen Sturtevant are both attorneys and know better. They are without excuse." "This is an arrogantly blatant conflict of interest and a complete failure in judgment on the part of both the party chair and the Sturtevant campaign, creating at the vey least an appearance of collusion between the Chesterfield GOP Chair and the Sturtevant campaign. Chesterfield County Chairwoman Leslie Haley needs to step down immediately," stated Senator Chase. "Clearly this is a case of the fox guarding the hen house. I'm deeply disturbed and outraged that the Sturtevant campaign who falsely professes to be a champion for election integrity, has engaged in compromising and unacceptable behavior that further undermines the confidence of voters in a fair, transparent and uncompromised election." Please see the documentation below submitted to Senator Chase by the Chesterfield Registrar's office and made available on the Virginia Access Project. | | Initially, Chesterfield Chairwoman Leslie Haley submits the name, "Lauren Fuller" instead of "Lauren Fulcher." Was this misspelling intentional and was it an intentional attempt to hide the fact that the chair was going to have the Campaign Manager of the Sturtevant campaign to be the only GOP representative to view the certification of the voting equipment? | | | Lauren Fulcher is not only the official Campaign Manager for the Sturtevant campaign, but she has donated thousands to Glen Sturtevant's campaign and yet she was the only Republican invited and present to certify the voting equipment. Documentation from VPAP. | | This endorsement letter shows the clear intent of the Chesterfield GOP Chair to support Glen Sturtevant. While this endorsement was made prior to her serving as the Chesterfield County Chair, it clearly demonstrates she is not a neutral party. | | | | | | | | | | == | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | | | | Senator Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112 | | == Sent by mailto:amanda@chaseforva.com powered by == ==

body:
| | | Peter, Yesterday I reached out to you about our $5K mid-month goal and the importance of our mission.

So many patriots stepped up, but unfortunately, we’re still not at our goal.

**If we’re going to make this deadline, we have to raise $2092 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, and I’m counting on the most trusted members of my team.**

**[Please pitch in before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT so we can meet our mid-month $5K goal and UNLEASH American potential!](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=209186583ec9431db13ee2f8c0dc4ac3&_e=VUb3n1T4LQthpG5OilX7GlPD91ipYA_QfgYsfCvldAzTxUEK1bVfE7Qi6yL4TrWP-qPUMmZuhNnIAAAyBd7xjrUPFpBLss2pzF7lwNmjitBkvyC1wmk3q0EVSEbgOb0JSwuKZMJBHcFPG6fyskjt8BgWSTrMtPCfDq74g2FR55Pia-GtCwI3paxrVRaodcAExjoH7JblxXg9Z7-QHJDKQsINgDRLDyYfpekkDbclfqX0bQWkKFTffD9HOZk5A5K0L8QkiOVpxmlV3LHsLIvC5cIcwEfCP2SjMUk_D1vABZxNDFMYH7eCxF7qxCZDkGQ_Mim9Dbl14Iv1trwgybnVyQ4CBA1nRqhNJiMuB2GJOdQ%3D)**
Whether it’s on the battlefield or at the ballot box, no good battle can be won alone. I know we can do this, but I need you to step up before it’s too late with the secure link below.

**[https://secure.winred.com/unleash-america-pac/mid-may-deadline](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=209186583ec9431db13ee2f8c0dc4ac3&_e=VUb3n1T4LQthpG5OilX7GlPD91ipYA_QfgYsfCvldAzTxUEK1bVfE7Qi6yL4TrWP-qPUMmZuhNnIAAAyBd7xjrUPFpBLss2pzF7lwNmjitBkvyC1wmk3q0EVSEbgOb0JSwuKZMJBHcFPG6fyskjt8BgWSTrMtPCfDq74g2FR55Pia-GtCwI3paxrVRaodcAExjoH7JblxXg9Z7-QHJDKQiwkJ1PX0m8py8c5X_g7E1D0B3d6gmKANh2FQUNRwPbHB4gYS3eSqYIvGkmxMOD2eoKAqalYAy7kB5MAjKJ3pVhjF_kdIULt-kWT5juknXd-jr0JofZewHJIrJMANiE83ZHVI9DN5n-x0icWPFqG4g0%3D)**

CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)

\-------Forwarded Message-------
From: CAPT Hung Cao
Date: May 14, 2023
Subject: “Non sibi sed patriae”
---
[](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=209186583ec9431db13ee2f8c0dc4ac3&_e=VUb3n1T4LQthpG5OilX7GlPD91ipYA_QfgYsfCvldAzTxUEK1bVfE7Qi6yL4TrWP-qPUMmZuhNnIAAAyBd7xjrUPFpBLss2pzF7lwNmjitBkvyC1wmk3q0EVSEbgOb0JSwuKZMJBHcFPG6fyskjt8BgWSTrMtPCfDq74g2FR55Pia-GtCwI3paxrVRaodcAExjoH7JblxXg9Z7-QHJDKQqFd_5GA922TCLXxL0KeV1pNhtRXz3oecivjzPRf9koGUaDGUrDJ33m4V1ZaPJKoTVW6Jq1YIIBRb-vjMoLaC5TMoUufoIX1jhmLUFiQsYurvt7kSHYtMpuxTG5Gwk85HK3bUofZxCKVYXLZEbl_Fus%3D)
---
Peter, “**Non sibi sed patriae**.” It’s a Latin saying we have in the Navy, and it means “**not self but country**.”

As a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line every day executing missions and performing deep dives in the most dangerous corners of the world.

I didn’t do any of it for fame or glory - I did it for the country that I owe my life to.

Now that my combat career is over, my missions look a lot different, but I still live by the same motto, and now, I’m calling on YOU to put our nation’s future first.

**I’m on a mission to UNLEASH American potential, and we have a $5K deadline TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT to do it.**

_**Just a few dollars could make all the difference, Peter. Your small act of selflessness could change the course of our great country.**_

Serving as a Navy Special Operations Officer, I had to make a lot of sacrifices. Whether it was time away from my family or missing the comforts of home, there’s a lot I missed out on.

**But I wouldn’t trade my experience defending the greatest nation on Earth for anything.**

My family escaped a kill list in communist Vietnam to come to America, Peter. If it wasn’t for our nation’s freedoms, I may not be here today - and I’ll NEVER take those freedoms for granted.

_**That’s why when I see Democrats encroaching on our liberties today, I’m absolutely _furious._**_

**I’ll do whatever it takes to stop the Left from eroding our freedom, but I can’t do it alone. I need YOU on my team, and with just a few dollars, you can UNLEASH America from the chains of the socialist Democrats.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, Yesterday I reached out to you about our $5K mid-month goal and the importance of our mission. So many patriots stepped up, but unfortunately, we’re still not at our goal. If we’re going to make this deadline, we have to raise $2092 before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, and I’m counting on the most trusted members of my team. Whether it’s on the battlefield or at the ballot box, no good battle can be won alone. I know we can do this, but I need you to step up before it’s too late with the secure link below. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) \-------Forwarded Message------- From: CAPT Hung Cao Date: May 14, 2023 Subject: “Non sibi sed patriae” Peter, “Non sibi sed patriae.” It’s a Latin saying we have in the Navy, and it means “not self but country.” As a U.S. Navy Special Operations Officer, I put my life on the line every day executing missions and performing deep dives in the most dangerous corners of the world. I didn’t do any of it for fame or glory - I did it for the country that I owe my life to. Now that my combat career is over, my missions look a lot different, but I still live by the same motto, and now, I’m calling on YOU to put our nation’s future first. I’m on a mission to UNLEASH American potential, and we have a $5K deadline TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT to do it. Just a few dollars could make all the difference, Peter. Your small act of selflessness could change the course of our great country. Serving as a Navy Special Operations Officer, I had to make a lot of sacrifices. Whether it was time away from my family or missing the comforts of home, there’s a lot I missed out on. But I wouldn’t trade my experience defending the greatest nation on Earth for anything. My family escaped a kill list in communist Vietnam to come to America, Peter. If it wasn’t for our nation’s freedoms, I may not be here today - and I’ll NEVER take those freedoms for granted. That’s why when I see Democrats encroaching on our liberties today, I’m absolutely furious. I’ll do whatever it takes to stop the Left from eroding our freedom, but I can’t do it alone. I need YOU on my team, and with just a few dollars, you can UNLEASH America from the chains of the socialist Democrats. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Friend,
---
Customs and Border Patrol was apprehending more than 10k illegal aliens a day, but this number is expected to multiply tenfold.
---
So far, 6.3 million illegal crossings have occurred and in March alone, the equivalent of 645 million lethal doses of fentanyl was seized by border control.
---
_Now that Title 42 has officially ended, the world will see the true nature of the Biden regime’s plan to overwhelm our nation as migrants flood our border._
---
**We have a Commander-in-Chief who has failed to protect our country and a Secretary of Homeland Security who refuses to secure our border.**
---
But House Republicans are using every device in our power to hold the Biden Administration accountable for the disaster they have inflicted on this country and we need your help.

clean_body: Biden continues to refuse to address our growing border crisis. | Friend, Customs and Border Patrol was apprehending more than 10k illegal aliens a day, but this number is expected to multiply tenfold. So far, 6.3 million illegal crossings have occurred and in March alone, the equivalent of 645 million lethal doses of fentanyl was seized by border control. Now that Title 42 has officially ended, the world will see the true nature of the Biden regime’s plan to overwhelm our nation as migrants flood our border. We have a Commander-in-Chief who has failed to protect our country and a Secretary of Homeland Security who refuses to secure our border. But House Republicans are using every device in our power to hold the Biden Administration accountable for the disaster they have inflicted on this country and we need your help. A poll from last month shows that Americans are finally seeing what we’ve been saying for months now: The poll from Global Strategy Group says that 52% of voters believe Biden is ignoring problems at the border, while 50% said he is ignoring the situation around undocumented immigrants. By ignoring this problem and encouraging open-border policies, Biden and the radical Left have created the most devastating border crisis this country has seen in history that threatens our national security. Biden and Mayorkas’ claims that the border is secure are not fooling anyone. We are about to experience a mass migration event of at least 700,000 migrants, a foreign population larger than Boston, Massachusetts, rushing into our country. And Biden is prepared to welcome them with open arms. In addition to ending Title 42, Biden is expanding the catch-and-release network to quickly move border crossers and illegal aliens into the U.S. That includes deploying 1,500 U.S. troops to the border only to process illegal migrants as they arrive,NOT to secure the border. The Biden Administration created this illegal immigration and humanitarian crisis that will continue to overwhelm our nation as long as the Left’s open-border policies remain. It’s time to hold Biden’s feet to the fire and DEMAND he works on securing the border. We must enforce existing laws, finish the wall, and impeach Alejandro Mayorkas for his failures in order to secure our border and protect this country. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Congressman (TX-38) U.S. Army Captain 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
As Speaker of the House, I need to know.

| |
---
| | | Biden renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants in his State of the Union speech - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.
As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

---
| | [OPTION 1](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z584ol4mgnf5l5rhd4ng5m67k1ktc0afti86cai8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm2pb2clh2bs)
---

**Option 2: We stand strong against Open-Borders Biden, and SECURE the border once and for all!**

---
| | [OPTION 2](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zamcgra5oi904fhdkt4c8jp3lg5fuvehmcbj1in8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm2pb2clh2bs)
---

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z11gifjor79v10jn8b5tc9k9sjpvc1eg6stbv6pg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm2pb2clh2bs "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

---
| | [REJECT BIDEN'S AMNESTY PLAN](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znsddfsmmqkmfmbq12n298rc5kpo0j12m54dc340_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm2pb2clh2bs)
---

Thank you for your time and patriotic support,
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrbnrpdblp4ls8jvnh2v2l8u0frv3r9127jkdn7o_rp22sh2s8i66o71chjm2pb2clh2bs)

Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country. In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure. But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking. But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?" | | | We can't stress this enough: Our success REQUIRES your support. name: John Fetterman
subject: Warning: this might get a liiiiittle cheesy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi, Derek. 😊
I just wanted to send a personal note. (Warning: this might get a liiiittle cheesy.)
The thing is, this team means the world to me. Without your love + support, I just wouldn’t be where I am today — fighting like h*ll for yinz guys in the Senate.
I might be the one casting votes, but it’s folks like you from 18326 and all over the country who make our movement *so* powerful.
**[You’ve had my back from the start, so I’m respectfully asking: can you chip in any amount right now, before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline tonight? Your support will fuel our work, and I’m just so deeply grateful for this team.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230515-1?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20230515-1-8375&refcode2=8375_434096_UatyCg&akid=8375%2E434096%2EUatyCg)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230515-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230515-8375&refcode2=8375_434096_UatyCg&akid=8375%2E434096%2EUatyCg)**
I’ll be grateful if you can kick in even a few bucks to give us a boost. Either way, thanks for being here, Derek.
Lots more soon,
💛 John
John Fetterman
U.S Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230515-8375-footer&t=1&refcode2=8375_434096_UatyCg&akid=8375%2E434096%2EUatyCg)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

subject: This guy…
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63311751/406346001/-53242616?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230515_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZjNzc1MC0yZGYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2gSZ3Cb40Wcht_dMuFul6f12Tj6p-YhYpLzeE4PGfY=)
---
Peter, a few days ago, this guy, House Speaker Cameron Sexton, said we were no longer tolerating the failed status quo and protecting our communities from violence. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63311753/406346005/-53242616?amount=3&refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230515_AM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDZjNzc1MC0yZGYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U2gSZ3Cb40Wcht_dMuFul6f12Tj6p-YhYpLzeE4PGfY=)_via Tennessee Lookout_ And yet, he and his party REFUSED to pass any legislation before session ended that would keep guns out of the hands of dangerous individuals, all because they’d rather finance their campaigns from the warchest of the NRA and the rest of the gun lobby. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Did you catch this, Peter?
body:
The Virginia primaries are just around the corner, but many Virginia communities don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)
Hey Peter, we wanted to make sure that you caught this message our team sent yesterday.
**The Virginia primaries are just around the corner, but many Virginia communities don’t have access to trustworthy local news coverage.** That leaves many voters either unaware that there’s an election happening or without trustworthy coverage to help them make an informed decision at the ballot box.
**That’s where Courier Newsroom comes in.** Our local news team at _Dogwood_ is working tirelessly to fill in this information gap with straightforward, accessible news stories. But to keep up this important work and cover the costs of resources, we need your help to reach our mid-month goal.
[**Right now, we’re $3,250 away. Can we count on your $5 before midnight to get us there?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3707?refcode=em-20230515&t=2&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)
— Courier Newsroom
P.S. We’ve also included our original message below, so you can see how this race will impact all of us.
* * *
Peter — we’re coming up on some of the most important state elections of 2023: **the Virginia state primaries.**
[**We’ll explain more about the consequences of this election in a moment, but if you’re short on time: will you chip in $5 now to help us reach our $7,000 mid-month goal so we can mobilize Virginia voters and spread accurate information about the candidates?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3707?refcode=em-20230515&t=3&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)
Virginia is one of a handful of states holding major elections this year, with all 140 members of their General Assembly up for reelection.
With Republicans holding a narrow majority in the House of Delegates, and Democrats with a tight lead in the State Senate, every single race can have a big impact on which party ends up in control of the state government — **and its policy agenda.**
Virginia Republicans have been ramping up their attacks on public education and abortion rights. Their actions set a serious, grave precedent for state and local governments across the country, **which is exactly why this primary election will impact all of us.**
Knowing that, our reporters at _Dogwood_ have jumped right into covering **everything Virginians need to know to vote in next month’s primary election** — from when the voter registration deadline is to all the ways they can cast their ballot:
[](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3707?refcode=em-20230515&t=4&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)
The work of our _Dogwood_ team — the articles, the amplified posts, and the ad placements — is only possible with support from people like you. **That’s why we’ve set a $7,000 mid-month goal to ensure they have all the resources they need ahead of next month’s election.**
[**Will you chip in $5 now to power their work and help us spread accurate, factual information to as many voters as possible?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3707?refcode=em-20230515&t=5&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3707?refcode=em-20230515&t=6&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)**
Thanks for your support,
Everyone at Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=988_120351_c9QKJG&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=988%2E120351%2Ec9QKJG)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Hey, Fellow American,

I know I’ve been reaching out a lot, but it’s been a while since I heard back from you. Is everything okay?

You see, I know how crazy things get, but let me take a moment to explain why your support is so critical, even more than a year out from the election.

Democrats are raising millions to defeat me, in fact, I’m one of their top targets to unseat in the 2024 election. This is the most purple district in the country and was held by a Democrat just three years ago. **Not to mention, the Left is more motivated than ever to take back the majority.**

So, now you see why I have to keep emailing you... # About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

subject: I hate asking you for money

body:
The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63314694/406355705/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230512-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMxMDE2NS0zMWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YJrPokYhZDR2R2ZP2_jurPV3WZmR6NDIVkVD4oanh4=)
---
Hey Peter,

I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields.

I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families.

But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway.

**The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters.**

All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:

[_**May is off to a way slower start than we predicted, and we’re at risk of falling short of our weekly goal. Could pitch in a split donation of any amount between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC to get us back on track? It would mean a lot to me.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63314695/406355706/1999187487?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230512-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMxMDE2NS0zMWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YJrPokYhZDR2R2ZP2_jurPV3WZmR6NDIVkVD4oanh4=)

clean_body: The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. | = Hey Peter, I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields. I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway. The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask: = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = Appreciate anything you can give. — Jon * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I’m not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
These final 24 hours ahead of our mid-month deadline is crucial to making sure our movement has the tools and resources to support our collective work and fight off our opposition.
#
Today is our last chance to reach our 150 contributions goal, Peter.
And with just 47 contributions left to raise to close the gap, I’m really hoping that our grassroots supporter base will show up in these final hours. [**Can I count on you to make a contribution of any amount today to help us reach our goal before midnight?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42014?refcode=em20230515-2478&t=1&akid=2478%2E420207%2ER7wuov)
**[Donate](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42014?refcode=em20230515-2478&t=20&akid=2478%2E420207%2ER7wuov)**
Our entire progressive movement is up against a lot, Peter. From climate change and Big Oil lobbyists to anti-trans legislation and Speaker McCarthy holding our economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt ceiling — there’s a lot at stake. But I'm not backing down because I know how critical bold leadership is needed to combat the crises we face.
I know how important it is to have a democracy that truly represents the people, and not just the wealthy 1%. And I know that the work we do today will set future generations ahead of us up for success, safety, and security.
**These final 24 hours ahead of our mid-month deadline are crucial to making sure our movement has the tools and resources to support our collective work and fight off attacks from the GOP.**
**The truth is: potential challengers and Republicans look at our campaign to determine the strength and stability of the progressive movement. And if we don’t have the finances and collective power to fight back, we might lose out on key opportunities to make change for our movement.**
[**We need 47 more contributions to close the gap on our goal and demonstrate the true strength of our movement. If you’re ready to stand with us, please chip in a donation of any amount today to help keep us on track.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42014?refcode=em20230515-2478&t=21&akid=2478%2E420207%2ER7wuov)
Thank you,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230515-2478-footer&t=22&refcode2=2478_420207_R7wuov&akid=2478%2E420207%2ER7wuov)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: We're seeing evidence of huge amounts of leftwing money flowing into TX... | | | Fellow Conservative, This is urgent. I am asking for help. The left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to try to take me down. It's only been a few days since far-left Dem Colin Allred announced he's running against me in 2024. But the massive Democrat fundraising machine is already churning out millions. There is a massive wave of cash flooding into his campaign in the 36 hours since he's announced. He's raised over $2 million in a day and a half. That is indicative of the tidal wave of cash that is going to come in- and we 're just getting started. The message is clear - Democrat donors are hellbent on flipping Texas Blue next year, and they'll spend whatever it takes to make it happen. Please send an emergency donation today to help me FIGHT BACK and Keep Texas Red! The corporate, mainstream media is already running cover for Allred. They're describing him with words like "moderate," "bipartisan," and "middle-of-the-road." But here is the truth: Look, if you're a leftist in Manhattan, San Francisco or Chicago, you're giving money to this guy, they all are... Why? Because Allred is a hardcore Democrat who voted with Pelosi 100% of the time. He voted for 87,000 new IRS agents to audit middle-income Americans. He voted for Biden 's assault on the U.S. oil and gas industry. He repeatedly voted for open borders. Colin Allred is too extreme for Texas, and I need your support RIGHT NOW to stop him. Thanks for your help at this crucial moment. For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Cherise Trump; Mrs. Trump; C. Trump; Trump
subject: Trinity University Censors My Free Speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Speech
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWPOLccDNl

Trinity University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and
forced me to pay "special liability insurance" because my last
name is Trump.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPOLccDNl

Friend,

Trinity
University in Texas labeled me "an elevated risk" and forced me
to pay "special liability insurance" because my last name is
Trump. Will you stand with me now and demand the university
reverse this?

That's
right... before I could step foot on campus for my event
promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was
forced to pay for special liability insurance.

The Young
Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they
have NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before.

Will you
join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they
should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our
open letter right now.

Stand
with Speech First

Friend,
even if I were related to President Trump (I'm not related),
Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and
setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent.

Not only
is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous
political conservative … but it also caters to the "Woke"
student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom
far-left students might find objectionable.

Put
simply, when school administrators let "Woke" student protestors
hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation -
and our educational system - ends up: A small number of far-left
student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and
free thinking suffer!

After
all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were
Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?

I don't
think so!

Friend,
add your name to Speech First's open letter right now to tell
Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision …
and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.

They want
you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a
dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need
you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the
Leftist administrators at Trinity University.

Thank you
for your support!

Cherise
Trump
Executive
Director
Speech
First

Stand
with Speech First

Paid for by Speech
First.

1300 I St
NW Suite 400E

Washington, DC 20005

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

I ran for president in 2020 to restore the soul of this nation, rebuild the middle class, and unite the country. Thanks to the dedication of supporters like you, we won -- and we’ve made historic progress that we must continue to build on.
We created 12 million new jobs in two years, passed the largest investment in America’s infrastructure since Eisenhower, and made the biggest investment in tackling the climate crisis in our history.
But MAGA Republicans want to take this country backward. We can’t let that happen.
Here’s the truth: I am counting on your support right now to build a winning campaign. **Every contribution from grassroots supporters like you in these first few weeks will have an enormous impact on our ability to share our message with voters across the country in 2024.**

name: VoteVets
subject: Humbly asking you to make a $3 donation before our mid-month deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We hope you’ll let us explain why
#
Derek, hope you’re doing well.
Here at VoteVets, we’re coming up on our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight. But this one is a little different.
If you have a minute, we hope you’ll let us explain why.
VoteVets runs in large part thanks to tons of support from people like you. Your support has helped us build a specialized voter database, and we use that to send out organizers and target ads in some of the toughest races in the country.
So for everything you do, from all of us here: Thank you.
But in just two weeks, we’re going to observe Memorial Day. VoteVets goes dark on social media, on our advertising, and our fundraising to honor the fallen. It’s a solemn day for us, and it’s important to do.
What that means is, we can’t count on our end-of-month deadline push to close the gap if we start to fall behind on our goals.
And we have to hit our goals, or we can’t fund the critical programs we run. It’s as simple as that.
That makes this mid-month deadline extremely important. So please:
**[We’re humbly asking you to make a $3 donation before our mid-month deadline tonight. $3, or whatever you can afford. Hundreds of people are already chipping in, so join them and make your first today.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230515-1-15&t=1&akid=8440%2E3013755%2EgUrpxm)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $10 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2934?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.ZXPMi_&refcode=em230515-1-15&t=20&akid=8440%2E3013755%2EgUrpxm)**

If you have a minute, we hope you’ll let us explain why. VoteVets runs in large part thanks to tons of support from people like you. Your support has helped us build a specialized voter database, and we use that to send out organizers and target ads in some of the toughest races in the country. So for everything you do, from all of us here: Thank you. But in just two weeks, we’re going to observe Memorial Day. VoteVets goes dark on social media, on our advertising, and our fundraising to honor the fallen. It’s a solemn day for us, and it’s important to do. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80f1b953eb964886b6b8b068178c8661&_e=4EoyJYsYMiczuQcrGRd39MzqNkrz-amlXKIFlRndkO208nJIRn71LyLIQ8i0Axsr3e7dWIutAx6OCwkguBODnMbtUsczD79e4R9UYsJYQpNZTDqn-1l23yeTou75UmYXcL_wI_ayN4ougmcFm7VLho-Y7QKIdnn986DH0ZJ-x57N6G1nMcup4AhbLoL4XI9wnE3vDqjWH76KJzl5R4r31Qi9qsKrhTKjC9RrZX6ZSwMjRGYOGoqQGtl2V7PylX6H1vOVJJm4qRz3JqLRXsksjKQxbdpILxLY1LMjt76QEx_6PeoQ1loxVs7fZqsL0HC5iFG8unoBXqwcmwkTqf-XiBJA-kVsEHsktFN2a75mGELbZm5uFAifEQc0fCqy_mgDYklAWzvuKLwLt4RHeeXk64ACu-TrXtsWQ8fGEqXOFyu9t4lXEOGUkrC5L1oeSytP)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80f1b953eb964886b6b8b068178c8661&_e=4EoyJYsYMiczuQcrGRd39MzqNkrz-amlXKIFlRndkO208nJIRn71LyLIQ8i0Axsr3e7dWIutAx6OCwkguBODnMbtUsczD79e4R9UYsJYQpNZTDqn-1l23yeTou75UmYXcL_wI_ayN4ougmcFm7VLho-Y7QKIdnn986DH0ZJ-x57N6G1nMcup4AhbLoL4XI9wnE3vDqjWH76KJzl5R4r31Qi9qsKrhTKjC9RrZX6ZSwMjRGYOGoqQGtl2V7PylX6H1vOVJJm4qRz3JqLRXsksjF0Nh5jNmsVHomJjg3lplbey_wBHvIFiQZpSCngUojJ8imvzgc2HmL2B598iJruMf5r6_IHXc48Gs_JOSdCAfBNEiMNXdSM5eIoWtTDZvJEpHgufYbfAqLyao1BCW4h-exOSZtOpXjIg3jySzIi2At767DLeletEi4_7mfoSJPN2)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=80f1b953eb964886b6b8b068178c8661&_e=4EoyJYsYMiczuQcrGRd39MzqNkrz-amlXKIFlRndkO208nJIRn71LyLIQ8i0Axsr3e7dWIutAx6OCwkguBODnMbtUsczD79e4R9UYsJYQpNZTDqn-1l23yeTou75UmYXcL_wI_ayN4ougmcFm7VLho-Y7QKIdnn986DH0ZJ-x57N6G1nMcup4AhbLoL4XI9wnE3vDqjWH76KJzl5R4r31Qi9qsKrhTKjC9RrZX6ZSwMjRGYOGoqQGtl2V7PylX6H1vOVJJm4qRz3JqLRXsksjLsrT7a9l2qEVp9OzFJkvz3ojIJU8YJCY45Pq_8ZP07hSoT1teL_3_6Eguwb4yn9OctJupG71G0ws_NZSie-8VvEV5KlAOwxtmRCgQydzboELj8nrk_Jj-xSeTmX-bUbeAcupAGbhytY9r7y4Cuswjo8hYbHbPA90U_7bFfIsKIN)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
I’m emailing you today to ask for your help. To be as direct as possible, our April fundraising numbers have us extremely concerned.

|
---
Derek, I’m emailing you today to ask for your help. To be as direct as possible, our April fundraising numbers have us extremely concerned. If we lose control of the Senate this November, there is no telling how far backwards GOP lawmakers will take our Commonwealth. In order to prevent that, we have to be all in. [Can you rush a donation right now and help us get back on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63318350/406363630/264155582?refcode=dpva-em-051523&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzcwNWJmZi0zNGYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlnRzo3lMI9W_Qqwr36iri4lx1w5MwSOBJDIlGbwWIc=) These aren’t normal times. clean_body: I’m emailing you today to ask for your help. To be as direct as possible, our April fundraising numbers have us extremely concerned. | Derek, I’m emailing you today to ask for your help. To be as direct as possible, our April fundraising numbers have us extremely concerned. If we lose control of the Senate this November, there is no telling how far backwards GOP lawmakers will take our Commonwealth. In order to prevent that, we have to be all in. = These aren’t normal times. We are living in a political climate where civility, truth, and reason have been replaced with violent rhetoric and conspiracy theories. Instead of moving the needle forward, we’re playing defense as the GOP rips apart reproductive freedoms and thinks that more guns are the solution for school shootings. Virginia Democrats have a long history of showing up. When we work together we have the capacity to elect leadership that reflects the values of our Commonwealth. = Susan Swecker, Chairwoman, Democratic Party of Virginia | ************=********** **********=********** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Patty Murray
subject: My friend Kirsten
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63319433/406365655/-1112368941?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk18-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY5ODYwYS0zNmYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8FTv7VqqbOHsK8k895eeksZTgIewH_aMpDvpuMYuz8=)
---
Hi, Peter.

I'm so grateful to have Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand fighting alongside me on the issues that matter most to working families, like lowering costs, expanding access to paid leave and making child care affordable.

**We've still got so much work left to do together – but first, she needs your help to win reelection.

[That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation between me and Sen. Gillibrand's reelection campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63319434/406365656/-1112368941?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk18-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY5ODYwYS0zNmYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8FTv7VqqbOHsK8k895eeksZTgIewH_aMpDvpuMYuz8=)**
When Sen. Gillibrand first took office in 2009, I was so thrilled to have another strong, pro-choice woman in the Senate. Her leadership has been instrumental in the fight for working families, and she’s been a true and consistent partner to defend a woman’s ability to make her own health care choices after Roe was overturned.
The thing is, Sen. Gillibrand's seat can't be taken for granted. Republicans won more races in New York state last year than they have in two decades – enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, the GOP has put a huge target on Sen. Gillibrand's back.
With the GOP already working against her, Sen. Gillibrand needs your support to kick off her campaign right. **[Can we count on you to make a split contribution today? Your donation will help me and Sen. Gillibrand continue fighting for working families, reproductive freedom and the rest of our progressive Democratic agenda.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63319435/406365657/-1112368941?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk18-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMGY5ODYwYS0zNmYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O8FTv7VqqbOHsK8k895eeksZTgIewH_aMpDvpuMYuz8=)**
Thanks for your support,

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=pCDqL9JkEXR0%2FZq2YBqq5Jjxcosp%2FMrLpokqlHkBx06E7Mjdhqia890finVfPW9DBLnbNozcvQ5VjvWhxzNx6eiITMORxmtZmx4uhpjRFvRvsum2PgTDDEtDPkZf%2BW1Pv79KXAg7kS7vD7Qy8KbWIvxJStyomC8jsU4HvqINt57RaI%2B4wGokfXeRxGHr9xWVKoF1zFNFWe0hqBgbWCm4Huh3yhgvW9K9HCtQbR%2BTrEwCbTgPSQVlLYD5%2B3BhSLk5tN0meipMqLwpjE2188j2Hw4OqC9XTxP6TAXu1M5qmu%2FgP5ch%2FW5mQfCcQ2RA%2FbRAXTTlwKocqx3eue2uylJWEc5NJyb4BnRjz%2F3VtVOFobC7nJMN2oHZnCxT6QXhPD275H%2F41ocUQ8Kmapv6L4%2BdUiY9wxkjkTyzchO8ZeU8aLeyyfNNXhf9tJcE3HxHn2EC) People for Patty Murray

The only way we can defend this critical seat is with grassroots contributions from supporters like you. = Thank you! = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
Let me explain everything:

| |

| | | Friend,

I come to you today with a heavy heart. I just met with my finance team, and our fundraising numbers aren't looking too good.

Each and every day, I am reminded of how much of a tremendous honor it is to represent MO-02 in Congress. I have met many great people and pride myself on all my work for Missourians.

I was born and raised in Missouri and am proud to be a loyal Conservative. I am a dedicated Christian and a former Ambassador. Additionally, I am a proud mother and grandmother. Since taking office, I have been focused on strengthening our economy, fixing our healthcare system, securing our southern border, and everything else in-between.

_But I can 't continue to fulfill my promises without some help._

So, I'm asking you this: _**[Can you chip in just $5 (yes, JUST $5!) to help me keep my promises? Anything you can give, no matter how big or small, will make an incredible difference in my fight.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c5b5e5d6fd34ceea8ca802ceda4d313&_e=CpmBcS6WSHcjPLrSnV2nVzKhrzcTG8C7ymyiSgqpUo2BElJVLpSS04WtxQFTuQJML8KxEN_cTLhtIJOamtVnQb-Prl9iqpilENQlZlBpyJhM-mzTcEDPS8E0_QXZjQ1FjV1J8XneX8NMbLhNRp-JRLMQNFBfdZ_GHTnUOZfagnTCHS840HsnO5Oo3bpzY3IVahWDiygkrqMgEh_Mk2B7OK2Nh4-igMmtbLG07WqAnJAf3mCI_paWyNmqlLJH2q3rPdmzEBVytWqD2NNLoaM1g1GSDkn4NF33fMAw_9r0mq4oOXfqVwhzX_eUlHDG5QE8eHIQSigFUAOb8xlPSbl3zRGcsK9mNAiTR-RH2S4S2mGr15Ob9SPS0i3GxjrkJCvtH7F1AJ2LMjytikW98Jmhx-o-p3EcOVR-vXN6fbHFYz4QPhErE0o2tK_NSzmAxY4QpQR3ss39K74u6YR7y6CGfQ%3D%3D "Can you chip in just $5 \(yes, JUST $5!\) to help me keep my promises? name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Peter, the House just passed a dangerous resolution to increase support for Israel’s occupation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The U.S. House of Representatives recently passed a resolution to
encourage deepening support for Israel and expanding the Abraham Accords,
Trump-backed agreements between Israel and Arab countries that ignore
Palestinians and enable human rights abuses in the Middle East and Africa.

Members of Congress who voted for the resolution noted that their votes
were in honor of the 75th anniversary of Israel’s founding as a state. But
they ignore the reality of how the state of Israel was founded 75 years
ago: by killing and displacing two-thirds of the Indigenous Palestinian
population, in a brutal campaign that Palestinians call the “Nakba,” or
catastrophe.

We have to end U.S. military aid to Israel’s apartheid regime, not double
down on uncritical support for Israel’s human rights abuses.

U.S. military funding supports the Israeli government’s war crimes, to the
tune of billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars each year. In Congress, the
bipartisan support for unconditional funding of Israel’s military shows
how far we still have to go in the struggle for Palestinian freedom.
However, 18 Democrats stood up for Palestinian rights by opposing the
recent House resolution—an increase that reflects a huge shift in U.S.
public opinion in favor of Palestinian rights.

As the only Palestinian-American in Congress, I know my advocacy in
Congress disrupts the unjust status quo. I will continue to speak up until
we achieve safety and justice for all.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134449?refcode=em20230515-28956&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]Will you split a $3 donation between myself and Justice
Democrats to support our work to grow the U.S. movement for Palestinian
liberation?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134449?refcode=em20230515-28956&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]Contribute $3

The passage of House Resolution 311 shows just how out of step Congress is
with the ongoing shift in American public opinion towards support for
Palestinians and against the Israeli government’s extremism. Unlike prior
versions of this resolution, this Republican-drafted version fails to even
mention Palestinians or attempts at peace.

Instead, the resolution encourages expanding the Abraham Accords, which
were pushed by the Trump administration and signed in 2020 to establish
ties between Israel and Arab countries. These deals further enable
Israel’s impunity and U.S. weapons sales while undermining human rights.
One leader in the negotiations that led to the Accords even admitted that
the intent was to marginalize Palestinians.^1

As the top supporter of the Israeli military, the U.S. has the leverage
needed to demand equal rights for Palestinians. It's our responsibility to
keep pushing for change. U.S. taxpayer dollars fund Israel’s apartheid
regime, which restricts basic resources and freedoms from Palestinians, in
an ongoing attempt to erase an entire people.

We must urgently grow our movement to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s
ethnic cleansing, military occupation, and apartheid. And we need your
support to do so.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134449?refcode=em20230515-28956&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]Please contribute what you can today to Justice Democrats and my
campaign so we can keep fighting for Palestinian rights.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134449?refcode=em20230515-28956&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1040&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]Contribute $3

Thank you.

In solidarity,

Rashida

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

1 - [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134448?t=1041&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]imeu.org

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1042&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1043&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230515-28956-footer&t=1044&refcode2=28956_1203867_MQUjaC&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1045&akid=28956%2E1203867%2EMQUjaC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: Pennsylvania Settles Voter Roll Lawsuit with Judicial Watch

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced today it settled its federal election integrity lawsuit against Pennsylvania and five of its counties. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 15, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | “Pennsylvania’s election rolls are cleaner – and will remail cleaner – thanks to Judicial Watch. This federal lawsuit settlement is good news for voters in Pennsylvania who want to ensure that only eligible voters are on voter rolls,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Judicial Watch’s remarkable run of litigation successes resulted in well over 2 million ineligible registrations being removed from voter rolls across the nation in the last two years!” ---|--- | | | | | With the busy summer season approaching for air travel, the Biden administration is once again compromising aviation security by plucking Federal Air Marshals (FAM) from their congressionally mandated duty of protecting the nation’s transportation system to help on the Mexican border. The highly skilled law enforcement agents will not be performing work related to their training, but rather babysitting illegal immigrants, conducting welfare checks, hospital watch and transportation services, according to Homeland Security sources interviewed by Judicial Watch. ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch uncovered the record thanks to a FOIA lawsuit filed in September 2022, against the State Department for records related to travel costs, calendars, and organizational charts for the Office of the Special Presidential Envoy for Climate (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of State (No. 1:22-cv-02844)). The Biden agency is releasing responsive records in batches to Judicial Watch every six weeks. ---|--- | | | | | Cleaning up dirty voter rolls is not easy or quick work. Exhibit A: Colorado. Nearly three years ago, Judicial Watch filed a federal lawsuit in Colorado after gathering evidence that the state was a serial offender in failing to comply with the voter list maintenance requirements of the National Voter Registration Act. Why does this matter? The possibility of ineligible voters at the ballot box creates opportunities for fraud and corruption. As JW President Tom Fitton puts it: “Cleaner voter rolls mean cleaner elections.” ---|--- | | | Timcast “Tennessee authorities have cited no credible reason for hiding the killer’s ‘manifesto’ about this deadly school shooting of three young children and three school employees,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton in a press release. “Politics shouldn’t trump transparency and the public safety. The public has an urgent right to know the details of this manifesto. That a public records lawsuit is required to try to access this key document is a scandal.” The Daily Caller Daily Caller News Foundation reporter Megan Brock secured a victory last week after she was sued by Bucks County, Pennsylvania, in 2022 to prevent the release of documents she requested related to the county’s school reopening plans and COVID-19 restrictions. Breitbart According to records requested by Judicial Watch, Texas A&M; University received nearly $500 million in grants and contracts from the Qatar regime. Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton commented, “Now we know why terrorist-linked Qatar has fought us in court to hide its financial support for Texas A&M; — which we just found out is nearly a half billion dollars.” | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

| | Enough is enough. The United States has mourned the loss of hundreds of thousands of adults and children to gun violence. It's shameful that our children live in fear because of the gun violence epidemic in this country.

Josh stands with all Americans who are tired and frustrated by the ideological gridlock in Washington that's preventing gun safety reforms. Common sense gun laws are not a partisan issue — _they’re a human issue._

**American lives are at stake.**

The NRCC isn’t wasting time defending their House majority, and they’re going to have millions of dollars of NRA money to flood into campaigns across the country. If we fall behind we may not be able to make up ground.

It's shameful that our children live in fear because of the gun violence epidemic in this country. Josh stands with all Americans who are tired and frustrated by the ideological gridlock in Washington that's preventing gun safety reforms. Common sense gun laws are not a partisan issue — they’re a human issue. Help keep Josh right where he’s supposed to be: = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = The only way to create a future where people are safe going to the mall, the movie theater, the grocery store, and schools is to pass gun safety policies, and to do that — we HAVE to take back the House. American lives are at stake. The NRCC isn’t wasting time defending their House majority, and they’re going to have millions of dollars of NRA money to flood into campaigns across the country. If we fall behind we may not be able to make up ground. = = —Team Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4a5acb49ebb40858ef5887dfbe6ba36&_e=Ym0VWx_Fv40O7CNwhMFSZuW5nniSBNNuTcRaQpRQgBz6vV0qc5RHhVRe4Qyzrdh38Atg0ua5t-l_ExfplH8hSkRz3-841gnSGgDfzwJCfDBgYM9FljiVXWZqehShYYyyrd5bVFsh6Yz31wc252AO_1bUepRByRVn7subnzN41Y1AskK62Zkq3iB9-rINAaRntDcigG727hK4v5dpzQVFY5L2X3AMi-sU_IduQpsPtJAmusIXEhH2UqF8lGJrgnbfnDWvIEshUMZc4rsDlJiv4H9ufumjdUQQBfs1i3Ci0h8Ero8ly1wECldawWxuxfzDzRGmJygBVZQYJWpwo7KJRN94cDwBQ489H33aLoMaVyab9vUetInnrKCd4R_yc4RyJx32KgLUgcBURJNQBgX1BLmfPB7nR9xTIukO56UfxmQ%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4a5acb49ebb40858ef5887dfbe6ba36&_e=Ym0VWx_Fv40O7CNwhMFSZuW5nniSBNNuTcRaQpRQgBz6vV0qc5RHhVRe4Qyzrdh38Atg0ua5t-l_ExfplH8hSkRz3-841gnSGgDfzwJCfDBgYM9FljiVXWZqehShYYyyrd5bVFsh6Yz31wc252AO_1bUepRByRVn7subnzN41Y1AskK62Zkq3iB9-rINAaRntDcigG727hK4v5dpzQVFY5L2X3AMi-sU_IduQpsPtJAmusIXEhH2UqF8lGJrgnbfnDWvIEshUMZc4rsDlJiv4BNp1b2mpWNwv8pMDVgL3Xrxz1CStnNWC-rzjs0p-hOuo5nwSKaozzQ0xkNFYphjRIDJ3TDAOUDiiPw1cuUTbZZpI2-NcKwegKrArUGgM7ma6EdMBwAja-mduDFON6NGKL7OWJsWTpvR7hw6UhDy9U4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4a5acb49ebb40858ef5887dfbe6ba36&_e=Ym0VWx_Fv40O7CNwhMFSZuW5nniSBNNuTcRaQpRQgBz6vV0qc5RHhVRe4Qyzrdh38Atg0ua5t-l_ExfplH8hSkRz3-841gnSGgDfzwJCfDBgYM9FljiVXWZqehShYYyyrd5bVFsh6Yz31wc252AO_1bUepRByRVn7subnzN41Y1AskK62Zkq3iB9-rINAaRntDcigG727hK4v5dpzQVFY5L2X3AMi-sU_IduQpsPtJAmusIXEhH2UqF8lGJrgnbfnDWvIEshUMZc4rsDlJiv4Gkokazg43WSEt8UfCu8ZCrkkYXOmBIElYsRY_WT2EuxXLdzIfpclyAaIZewJyucytjdR2mCFd7mvy1KnflP6ShJh8H3xFl2O953Z2-UARwNj7jumFNokGgT9xsjzjgCMeRwVhpuz7PaeNZhLgUtQB4%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4a5acb49ebb40858ef5887dfbe6ba36&_e=Ym0VWx_Fv40O7CNwhMFSZuW5nniSBNNuTcRaQpRQgBz6vV0qc5RHhVRe4Qyzrdh38Atg0ua5t-l_ExfplH8hSkRz3-841gnSGgDfzwJCfDBgYM9FljiVXWZqehShYYyyrd5bVFsh6Yz31wc252AO_1bUepRByRVn7subnzN41Y1AskK62Zkq3iB9-rINAaRntDcigG727hK4v5dpzQVFY5L2X3AMi-sU_IduQpsPtJAmusIXEhH2UqF8lGJrgnbfnDWvIEshUMZc4rsDlJiv4F1IfR10X0BxnacopdGZtPv2d1slGuEfDZNoVrd91Jf_4pHmhvX50j_3GHWxrHkte8kPUxKsnckAQj2doOA2QQTlomOGEgVGn8JsVHRG8FM1A8ZyRbT_m8uPJRoUEirbYfGOwlDKU-1C2QvH-mdlsUQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Team – We need your help.

Washington Republicans just launched a massive, misleading attack ad campaign against Greg and other House Democrats – __and they are targeting voters in our district.__

**We’ll explain more in a moment, but first: This smear campaign is nothing short of a political stunt intended to deceive Southwest Ohioans.[We can’t allow these attacks to go unanswered, so can you rush a grassroots contribution to help our campaign fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63321878/406369774/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.15_b1_lhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYzZTg0My0zOWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_d3aq8p2RJ06wtGwhZTkbiaG4ptfOItx4Fqnw9iEcAg=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63321879/406369775/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.15_b1_lhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYzZTg0My0zOWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_d3aq8p2RJ06wtGwhZTkbiaG4ptfOItx4Fqnw9iEcAg=) | [Rush a donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63321880/406369776/1921099384?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.15_b1_lhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYzZTg0My0zOWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_d3aq8p2RJ06wtGwhZTkbiaG4ptfOItx4Fqnw9iEcAg=)
---

It couldn’t be more clear that extremist national Republicans are prepared to do whatever it takes to defeat Greg in 2024, even if it means spreading misinformation throughout the district.

And with nearly a year-and-a-half until Election Day, we know the GOP’s bad faith attempts to distort our message and distract from their own dangerous, reckless agenda are only going to intensify.

That's why we can’t allow these attacks to go unanswered. Misinformation like this could be detrimental to our campaign if we don’t correct the narrative quickly.
