Hi there! I'm so glad you're here.

I know it's been a long time since we've spoken, but I just wanted to reach out and see if you'd consider making a donation to my campaign. **As you may or may not know, 2024 is going to be one of the most critical election years we 've had in a while. **

I believe we need to put America First, and if we're going to make that happen, we need someone with a true conservative voice and record of success leading the way.

If you've been following me on Twitter or reading my posts on Facebook, then you already know how much this campaign means to me--and how much of an impact it could have on our country if we succeed in reelection.

The fact is that right now, there are people who don't have access to good jobs because of our crumbling economy under Biden; people who worry about their kids being brainwashed with CRT at school; people who don't feel safe because of crime rates that are too high; people who worry about America's future.

**_I want to protect this country and I want to protect our conservative values. If we 're going to be successful in 2024, I need your help. _**

name: UTTERLY HUMILIATED
subject: It's hard to express how we feel at this moment...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BILLPAC
body:
Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

| |
---
| | | It's hard to express how utterly humiliated we feel at this moment.

Democrats in their attempt to sabotage our elections rallied millions of their supporters in favor of ERASING Voter ID laws across the country.

_**In response, Republicans started our own petition to protect these laws and ensure every election in the country is safe and secure.**_

But the number of responses we got was embarrassing... and the defeat we may face in the next election because of it will be even more heartbreaking.

But we've got another chance, Friend. This fight is too crucial and our election integrity is too important to quit. **[So we're asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqbiprjibirsfkbuh9nev7s4nuknpr33mmnchnl0_rp22sh2s8i66o71chge0o72c3h2bs "So we’re asking ONE FINAL TIME: will you sign the petition and help us secure our elections right here and now?")**

We can't stress this enough: Our success REQUIRES your support. Democrats are ruthlessly running roughshod over our elections and we can't afford to sit back and watch.

VA medical centers across the country run a program that provides transportation to Veterans who are unable to get to their appointments. It's called the Volunteer Transportation Network, and it's supported by the national Veteran service organization Disabled American Veterans (DAV).
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv1ptqvffqiuq56fkl3k63r5167rjeii274plcl0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f835cui6apt3euorasthekqj4td169qb6t9iepqq7d9l64qj2dd36up7b8rl65qj4t1jmmg78cbkmkpr2tjnk8gq48bi4bh28or0s5i61o30shge49fg)

name: Brandon Johnson
subject: Let’s make Helen Gym Philly’s next mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63323126/406375039/-73022071?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjOTY1My0zYmYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t9eXVqZeutAQ6bzdNjVNWpEeG54RCx6O22PTiz5St0I=)
---
Folks, this is Chicago’s Mayor-elect, Brandon Johnson. **As a former educator, I am proud to endorse my fellow former public school teacher, Helen Gym, for Mayor of Philadelphia.** Helen and I share a vision for building stronger cities by _investing in their people_ , and there’s no doubt in my mind that she is the right person to lead Philadelphia. Teaching isn’t the only thing Helen and I have in common. To win here in Chicago, my team and I had to build a strong grassroots movement to beat back far-right attacks, charter school billionaires, and a crowded field. Helen is fighting to do the same in Philly right now. **In fact, Helen’s primary election is TOMORROW, and she’s being attacked by a far-right billionaire who wants to defund Philly schools.** **[Can you please chip in to help a former teacher, progressive changemaker, and tough Philly mom win tomorrow, May 16? **Chicagoans made it clear that they were ready for change — and I know that Philadelphians are feeling the same.** Folks are ready for leaders who can address big issues like public safety, education, and affordable housing.
Helen has a vision to address these issues with people-centered solutions that invest in communities and address the root causes of the problems. Under her leadership, Philadelphia will be a safer, more prosperous, and more inviting place for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.
As Helen says, “we get the city we fight for,” so please join her and me in fighting to ensure Philadelphia is a place where everyone can be safe and joyful. body:
What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders?

| | | Friend, What kind of nation would we live in if we couldn't criticize politicians and elected leaders? I'll tell you. **We 'd live in a nation like the Soviet Union, communist China, or North Korea.** One of the greatest freedoms that we as Americans enjoy is the freedom of speech, including the freedom to speak out against leaders and policies we disagree with - all fully protected by the First Amendment. But, as you know, the radical left is doing everything it can to trample those rights. Recently, a leftist district attorney in Massachusetts retaliated against her critic by filing a criminal complaint against him after he publicly questioned the district attorney's incompetency. We're fighting back with a massive new lawsuit - but we need your help urgently. [**Which is why I 'm asking you for an emergency, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center for American Liberty today as we prepare to wade into a legal war to defend the freedom of speech. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze08u47amme6kvr054khfcff5nlubb2p9ekmjd00_rp22sh2s8i66o71chge0o72c3h2bs) You see, last year Joao DePina, a resident of Boston, Massachusetts, publicly questioned then-Suffolk County District Attorney Rachel Rollins about gun violence and the incompetence of her office to respond to his brother's murder. Rollins openly mocked Joao and continued her press conference. But then, just three days later, Rollins caused a criminal complaint to be filed against Joao, accusing him of attorney intimidation. It was crystal clear to anyone looking at the complaint that the charges were a direct violation of Joao's right to free speech and multiple District Attorneys refused to prosecute the case. _**However, the Worcester District Attorney decided to prosecute the case to fullest extent and sought a maximum penalty of 10 years in prison for Joao.**_ Thankfully, a judge ruled in favor of Joao's motion to dismiss the case citing the clear and obvious First Amendment issues. But no punishment or consequences of any kind were given to Rollins or the Worcester County DA for this malicious prosecution of Joao. In fact, Rachel Rollins essentially got a promotion - she's now a U.S. Attorney! **That 's why we're stepping in and suing Rollins and the Worcester DA for malicious prosecution, abuse of process, violation of Joao's freedom of speech, and reckless infliction of emotional distress.** But we can't win without you. [**Will you join this critical fight today with a gift of $35 or more right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z663ujuet5avh8puf6d921845r8te1j6a6gs5n78_rp22sh2s8i66o71chge0o72c3h2bs) Because this behavior cannot go unchecked. How can we allow a prosecutor to try to send a citizen to prison just for speaking out against them? That's the kind of thing that happens in China or North Korea. Not here. Not in our Constitutional Republic that was founded on the idea that no man or woman is above the law. **If we cannot peacefully criticize public officials, then the First Amendment is truly dead.** Imagine if Rollins and her cronies are allowed to get away with this. Where will this happen next? Your county? Your state? The federal government?! There must be limitations on the immunity afforded to prosecutors. With your support, we're going to go to the mat fighting to save our Constitution. But we need your help immediately. [**So please, make an urgent donation of $35 or more and help us stop the abuse of power being perpetrated by these leftists.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5h5k0gm016tpts9t8r9jfvtlt7vtfggegfaoj8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chge0o72c3h2bs) Please don't hesitate - the battle for your rights is heating up with each passing day. Thank you in advance four your support.
---
Sincerely,
---

---
|

| | P.S. Joao DePina was threatened with a DECADE behind bars just for standing up to a public official. You and I cannot allow bureaucrats and politicians to use their power to imprison political opponents. name: Becca B.
subject: It’s hard not to take it personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for U
body:
Seeing you stand with me through the difficult moments makes all of my work worthwhile.
Peter,
It weighs on you.
Going toe-to-toe with Lauren Boebert and Marjorie Taylor Greene on the Oversight Committee.
Fielding hateful calls and comments directed at me and my staff.
Watching anti-LGBTQ+ bills pass through the halls of Congress.
I’ve always said that being a middle school teacher was some of the best prep work I could have done before choosing to run for Congress, and I still stand by it. It helped me build a thick skin, learn how to think quickly on my feet, and diffuse arguments among peers.
But some days, this work can be extremely difficult. It’s hard not to feel personally impacted when your humanity and the dignity of those that you love is being put up for debate. Today’s political environment is not for the faint of heart, but I’m honored to be a voice for reason and respect through it all.
Knowing that you’re still standing with me makes all of this work worthwhile, Peter. And ahead of tonight’s mid-month deadline, it would mean the world to see a donation come in from you on ActBlue.
Here’s the link to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-May2023-FR-Midmonth?refcode=deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63323559/406377053/-1824634921?refcode=resend&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGZlZmYwNy0zZGYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0fUBvwjh8S_I9v-pRhAy8HhaDUfDXmH5rt7vkAXGjtU=)
A little reassurance that my grassroots supporters stand behind me while things intensify in Washington means a lot.
As always: Thank you, thank you, thank you.
– Becca B.

Burlington, VT 05302

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: just let me explain (running out of time)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, my mid-month deadline is just a few hours away, and I'm still $4,196 short. Please, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain why this deadline is so important and what exactly your $5 donation would mean?
I first ran for office in a deep-red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since:**_Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time._**
At the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. **_All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day._**
Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time, too. If you make a donation to help us hit our mid-month deadline tonight, you can give us the resources to knock on one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. And, if enough people like you chip in, we'll hit that mid-month goal. We'll be one step closer to having the grassroots resources it's going to take to win this campaign.
**New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote, every single donation and every single grassroots goal will make all the difference for my campaign.** That's why I'm personally asking: _[Please, if you have anything to spare, will you invest in this people-powered campaign before tonight's midnight deadline? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so I truly rely on grassroots support from people like you, especially during crucial moments like this one.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63324021/406378772/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4141-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTc2NWY2Yy0zZWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=crQqkQAB56EHeDkgzxSHQFM5U49Tr9_lAWQh1v0_2YE=)_

clean_body: | | | Friend, my mid-month deadline is just a few hours away, and I'm still $4,196 short. Please, will you give me just 30 seconds to explain why this deadline is so important and what exactly your $5 donation would mean? I first ran for office in a deep-red district in upstate New York. When we flipped that seat blue against all the odds, I learned a fundamental truth about politics that has guided me ever since:Campaigns are won one voter, and one donation, at a time. At the end of the day, photoshoots and consultants don't win elections. Votes do. And all the ways that we win those votes is what really matters — a mailer that offers solutions for the issues an undecided voter really cares about, a five-minute long phone call from a volunteer, a text that helps a busy mom vote by mail or a TV ad that reaches the right house at the right time. All those little moments add up to victory on Election Day. Building the resources to power that kind of campaign happens one grassroots donation at a time, too. If you make a donation to help us hit our mid-month deadline tonight, you can give us the resources to knock on one more door, send another batch of GOTV texts or put up one more yard sign. And, if enough people like you chip in, we'll hit that mid-month goal. We'll be one step closer to having the grassroots resources it's going to take to win this campaign. New York Republicans just had their best election in decades, and with control of the Senate on the line in 2024, every single vote, every single donation and every single grassroots goal will make all the difference for my campaign. subject: Fighting like a mother

body:
The next generation deserves leaders who will work to preserve the environment, protect their rights and keep our communities safe.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63324084/406379023/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230515-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTM5Y2JmYy0zZWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUvbzAxo7Yp6Cq4BLuuvK84xrc4fq7EDW5arop9ItRg=)

| Yesterday was Mother’s Day – and I want to start by saying thank you for all the kind wishes I received!

I am so honored to be the first mom in history to represent West Michigan in Congress. As I advocate for our communities, I make sure that supporting our kids and their parents is a top priority. I am proud to be a member of the Black Maternal Health Caucus and to have led groups of moms in Congress opposing anti-family legislation.

The next generation deserves leaders who will work to preserve the environment, protect their rights and keep our communities safe. As a mom of two young kids myself, this is what motivates me every day.

**I will never stop fighting like a mother to protect the next generation in West Michigan and across the country.[_If you’re with me, I hope you’ll show your support with a contribution to my re-election campaign today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63324085/406379024/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230515-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTM5Y2JmYy0zZWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUvbzAxo7Yp6Cq4BLuuvK84xrc4fq7EDW5arop9ItRg=)**

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

My name is Riley Gaines. I’m a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas – down the _hundredth_ of a second – I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That’s why I’m taking a stand against Democrats’ attacks against women’s sports.**

_The “Party of Science” doesn’t believe in biological differences.
The “Party of Women” doesn’t support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we’re making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite – to cement into law the destruction of women’s sports...

So, I’m humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big – **[will you stand with me?](http://trk.secureandprosper. "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | | My name is Riley Gaines. I’m a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky. After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women’s Swimming Championship. It gets worse: When I tied with Lia Thomas – down the hundredth of a second – I was told that the NCAA hadn’t planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes... My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition. That’s why I’m taking a stand against Democrats’ attacks against women’s sports. The “Party of Science” doesn’t believe in biological differences. The “Party of Women” doesn’t support women. Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness. Fortunately, Republicans in the House introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we’re making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite – to cement into law the destruction of women’s sports... So, I’m humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big – "will you stand with me?" If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it... | | | | | | * | Paid for by McCarthy for Congress PO Box 12667 Bakersfield, CA 93389 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Indiana Republican Party
subject: Defend, don’t defund the police
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Sign our card to honor and thank our brave heroes in blue.
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/38aa9f62e330a36b/fc3f674dfa9696a4c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, It’s National Police Week — a week-long tribute to celebrate our brave heroes in blue and honor those that made the ultimate sacrifice in the line of duty to protect their fellow Hoosiers.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/38aa9f62e330a36b/be249e85a5b6185bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
[**SIGN THE CARD TO THANK OUR POLICE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/38aa9f62e330a36b/7ca2bf306307ff7bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Over the last few years, **we’ve heard countless cries from the far Left to defund the police.**
It’s an _insult_ to our brave men and women in blue who have made the ultimate sacrifice to protect and serve our communities.
**That’s why we must put an end to the “defund the police” movement and show our law enforcement that they are truly appreciated for all that they do.**
So please, take a moment to **[sign our thank you card](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/38aa9f62e330a36b/f28d58e888960499c3d6b838967d376c/40313) **today.
And be sure to share this with your family and friends and ask them to add their names as well!
— Indiana Republican Party

subject: Will you join the 184,474 people who have contributed to this campaign?

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
Friends -
If there's one thing that sets me apart from most of my colleagues in the House, it's that I don't rely on corporate PACs and powerful special interest groups to fund this campaign.
Instead, I rely on people like you.
Since I first announced I was running for Congress back in 2018, a total of 184,474 people have contributed to this campaign. That support means the world to me.
Given that this is a grassroots campaign funded by lots of people contributing what they can, that means I need to ask you to chip in from time to time. And today is one of those days because our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight.
Every donation we receive today will help ensure we stay on track to meet our goals. And with your support, I will continue fighting for our progressive values in Congress.
So please:
**[Can I count on you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive ends at midnight? It's very important that we stay on track toward our fundraising goals.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=2&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-may23.WumOwJ&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=21&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
[Express Donate: $10](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/771?c0=io-em-may23.QmVUL3&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=22&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
[Express Donate: $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-may23.wfrcZD&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=23&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-may23.ZdvrGw&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=24&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-may23.LgMmv-&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=25&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=26&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)
I cannot tell you how much I appreciate knowing that we are all in this together. Because the strength of our movement comes from the number of people who are ready to fight for a better future for all of us.
In solidarity,
Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may23.dqks1K&refcode=em230515-1-t2&t=27&akid=166%2E791427%2E_58ZNP)**

subject: Marcy Kaptur cares about THIS country...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
In over 40 years of serving in Congress, I have never heard Marcy Kaptur speak as passionately about the people she represents here at home as she... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8125545?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=424916a8be&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

In over 40 years of serving in Congress, I have never heard Marcy Kaptur speak as passionately about the people she represents here at home as she does about supporting Ukraine “in its battle against tyranny.”
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e6a8dc1209&e=0426928d91)
| [FIRE MARCY KAPTURE AND MAKE AMERICA FIRST AGAIN >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=fb715dd1cc&e=0426928d91)
---
Hardworking Americans are struggling, Peter. I’m speaking with voters daily, and they tell me they hardly see their families because they have to work two or three jobs just to survive in Biden’s economy.

In New York City, _**homeless veterans are being kicked out of their hotels**_ to make room for the surge of immigrants illegally crossing our border daily.

_Why isn’t Marcy Kaptur as passionate about protecting We The People as she is about sending our hard-earned tax dollars overseas?_
**We need leaders in Congress who put the people they represent first. Kaptur is out of touch with our district’s values and has failed to serve Ohio-9 for decades. Join Team Majewski by selecting an option below and help me retire Corrupt Kaptur.

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=41d2730c5d&e=0426928d91)
**We deserve better than Marcy Kaptur.**

We deserve a leader who cares enough about the people of Ohio's 9th District to reach out to them and ask what issues matter to them most.

I can promise you, Peter — voters who are struggling to put food on their tables aren’t lying awake at night thinking about ways we can protect Ukraine from tyranny.

I’m running for Congress because the America-Last agenda is destroying our country and forcing taxpayers into poverty. With you support, we will FIRE Corrupt Kaptur and she can retire to Ukraine!

[**Can I count on your support?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e0c8f06fdd&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=dfdfc46178&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09

name: Mike Lee
subject: Will our kids choose liberty or tyranny?
body:
I know...

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6cnanae4bht6mi2lhtltmctfbkcnmn326tlhopg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I have three kids. I invested a lot of time, money, patience, education, and love into making sure they will be responsible adults who will carry on the torch of liberty to the next generation.

_But do you know who I never trusted to protect our future?_

Politicians in Washington.

I know...

I am a Senator. However, after years in Washington D.C., I am confident that the power is in our hands - not politicians - to educate and protect future generations for liberty.

Here's how: I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise, liberty, and personal responsibility.

How is FEE doing this?

FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar or virtual classrooms across the country. They aren't teaching kids to hate America or that everyone is a secret racist. FEE is equipping a new generation with the economic and philosophical basis for liberty.

[As a supporter of FEE's mission, I am personally asking you to contribute or sponsor FEE in the Classroom. Please send your support by clicking here to donate $10, $35, $250, or more >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf2k90unnd4609kuedp4q637qccjc4c7gjbfcsfo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqp20l7r9dqqokpnhgjcl54m72r0ocjptjliboao_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znuh8hp3kctsngfba9hprrkv1qthf9ui8g8hl6bg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z59lrmovmkqorq5shf2ftvu2nsutoqbjjcgpcqjo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbbsuf3bu5b60ouooeq8koegmfcbjkm6i0kbk8jo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvn31td4qsoki50fua9lsvfimpb85fp2djsuqoa8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvtt14dpl0og1jdokpvs3nb1qtbusfl6q080kk2o_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9q0oo3idc1id6rqqistr94n50u73q2pecmll9so_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjmec60ciqdecpu7ml9p7fckv81mtvfeaqd6dtv8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

[Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2i28k8dabskvs3t0uk4er3rej2pc2nait776e30_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zagale7fsqt6a952he5plah3unt8ben3a285e8h8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

Why FEE?

Since 1946, FEE has introduced millions to the ideas of liberty. You may be familiar with many of the thinkers and writers that played key roles in FEE's work over the decades - Ludwig von Mises, Leonard Read, and Henry Hazlitt. FEE was a part of the intellectual battle to push back against communism here in America.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9sc6am5a06253eulo836u6phtta50ci6qihl5gg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

Now, we face a new rise of socialism in America. It has a new name. It goes by social justice or Critical Race Theory. Instead of saying America is fundamentally evil because we are capitalist, these dangerous philosophies preach to kids that America is evil because we are a "white supremacist" country.

FEE is on the front lines fighting against the "Woke" educators trying to indoctrinate our kids.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. Please send your generous support.

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfb16bj3avvdk5r4u2hnfi9m1ee6psltocsfp120_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrr1a8q8v4mmddfqcc0ur1dq8281k27tgp62mru8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2bu7q3qe3mgdtlqhn2pjk2nvu7cgmucbp6kv7mg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0pf0dg3pdkvjbovi24mkenqdbibhrjiei1qpbho_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znb5acr0a5kg8u8qmshvfjnlan1ih06ul6370h78_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztk8iem9ara88i2ag8dm4o6no2p4nnms1cf4p1ag_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6lbcomdu7c7qn73muak4mljil52405acjhdabeo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6rt7atf02jisobtv9up3b2kga6l7sqmjl8j4r00_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)

I truly believe we need to win the war of ideas against radicals who have hijacked our education system. It's no longer college you have to worry about. They are starting even younger.

FEE is the premier organization on the front lines to win the battle of ideas. I hope you can join me in supporting FEE today.

Thank you

Mike Lee

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6auk8tk84e57c79atf4u2kas5eha5gehek7a0o_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30c5i60pb24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbube0cpaf82nvsuvffln9f278nuh078qk5bt11o_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgecpb7chh2bs)_

Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC ****to help reach our daily goal of $150,000? [Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:__taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63325567/406384464/1711913910?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2590-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiNmRiMDliLTQyZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_3769LpYExxgcimk8iK0Fk2whgjqmS3tuOBGo3EBrkw=)**

clean_body: Together, we can defeat Ted Cruz | | | | | = ---|--- Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas. Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country! That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help reach our daily goal of $150,000? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Colin Allred and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: = Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

And all entries have an equal shot of winning, unlike Crooked Joe’s preference for special interest donors... | | Thank you and GOOD LUCK! | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "JUNEDINNER" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between May 5, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on May 15, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a June 13, 2023 dinner event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the dinner event featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $5,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: I’ll get straight to the point.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Defeating Jim Jordan has never been so important
| Hi there, it’s Tamie. I’m reaching out to our campaign’s top supporters before tonight’s Mid-Month deadline expires at midnight.

I’ll get straight to the point: **The events of this past month prove just how crucial it is for us to defeat Jim Jordan and save the House from MAGA destruction.**

While the American people count on Congress to lower skyrocketing healthcare costs and fight for working families, _traitor Jim Jordan is too busy launching witch hunts against anyone who holds him or Donald Trump accountable._

_It’s absolutely disgusting!_

[I’m more determined than ever to send Jordan — and the entire MAGA majority in Congress — packing. But we can’t flip this seat unless we hit EVERY last deadline: So please, can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project by MIDNIGHT? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45118?t=6&akid=7707%2E878179%2ErFmrg1) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tamie Wilson and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/45119?t=7&akid=7707%2E878179%2ErFmrg1)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7707%2E878179%2ErFmrg1). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7707%2E878179%2ErFmrg1).**

name: Ann
subject: This is hard for me to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ann Wagner for Congress
body:
Let me explain everything:

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I come to you today with a heavy heart. I just met with my finance team, and our fundraising numbers aren't looking too good.

Each and every day, I am reminded of how much of a tremendous honor it is to represent MO-02 in Congress. I have met many great people and pride myself on all my work for Missourians.

I was born and raised in Missouri and am proud to be a loyal Conservative. I am a dedicated Christian and a former Ambassador. Additionally, I am a proud mother and grandmother. Since taking office, I have been focused on strengthening our economy, fixing our healthcare system, securing our southern border, and everything else in-between.

_But I can 't continue to fulfill my promises without some help._

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Be A Voice for Your Community: Candidate Filing Week is here!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Candidate Filing Week is here!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================
** View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/filing-week-2023?e=6a281f566d)
Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved.
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

Our mailing address is:
Washington State Republican Party
11811 NE 1st St Suite 306
Bellevue, WA 98005
USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=2188a40288)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=2188a40288)
.
Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1^st St, Bellevue, WA 98005.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
** www.wsrp.org (http://www.wsrp.org/)

Friend,
America is in serious trouble.
Our justice system has been HIJACKED by corrupt political forces who use their power, money, and connections to destroy anyone who stands in their way.
I have once again become the target of a disgusting witch hunt that lacks _ANY_ EVIDENCE, PROOF, or EYEWITNESSES.
**But my freedom and justice did not matter to the Marxists who orchestrated this witch hunt in a city where the voter registration of the jury pool favors Democrats 7:1.**
_This witch hunt was funded by a Democrat mega-donor who slept at Pedophile Jeffrey Epstein 's private island - with a Clinton-appointed judge presiding over the bogus trial._
Let me be as clear as humanly possible: I did NOTHING wrong.
_So, I 'll tell you what this is all about... _
Everybody has seen the polls. No one honestly believes that Joe Biden - sitting at a 36% approval rating - can beat me in a _**fair**_ election next year.
**So, the Democrats have decided that their strategy is to launch witch hunt after witch hunt to try and bleed me dry.**
But the Democrats don't understand that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. _There is not a single attack on the face of the planet that will break me._
...Because I know that if this left-wing cabal can slander and attack a former U.S. President, they could one day do it to a private citizen like **YOU**.
_I refuse to let that happen. I refuse to let America 's justice system completely collapse._
Together, we will win back the White House and we will SAVE AMERICA.

body:
When we stay silent, injustice thrives. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv8jMqFMYYlvq5r8nQ9hTGeZ1WWQQP39AZKJUWXxVv2hZ3awXIN-9IdAOU7vIBx3ROvLdWrX9iAdgXTGIfeHRgFpqYjyF9uDXzLWDUIcEvyAbusfBSLTtbZ7WlMDZ9nLiPtr2BAX6Ct_uFBsf9xpFZAXFT9GnLKGyopwBmme_xskGCpLIGCWRibS0zmMt3EKdzYxmYoq28JcOJul49ABZmOONL3q7GSbvwih9IKolfjGA/3w7/QVbWGSqTTlmFPwdSFg5IQg/h0/QstIFgr8tWFQ5ampdXGKDcfPBk8pmoCQ581Frp_gUU0)
---
Friend, Today is the 75th year that Palestinians have commemorated the Nakba (Arabic for “catastrophe”) on May 15. The stories of trauma and pain of Palestinians who lived through the horrific Nakba have rarely been heard. In roughly 18 months beginning in 1948, violent militias in Mandatory Palestine forcibly removed close to 800,000 Palestinians—two-thirds of the Palestinian population, erasing more than 400 Palestinian villages and depopulating Palestinian sections of many mixed cities and towns. And we know the Nakba never ended. **To this day, the Israeli government is still trying to erase an entire people by systematically displacing and dehumanizing Palestinians. And this continues with impunity because of attempts to rewrite history and to silence Palestinians.** **But we will not be silenced.** We will continue to ensure that Palestinian voices are heard and acknowledged—not only for healing, but also to create an honest pathway for peace. For the first time ever, the UN will commemorate the Nakba. The U.S. will not participate and in fact voted to block that event. Similarly, U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy tried and failed to stop a Nakba event on Capitol Hill, which nine organizations organized so we can hear directly from Palestinians who survived the Nakba. **At the Nakba commemoration, a Palestinian American man, now in his 80s, personally told his family's story of pain, trauma and hardship. He was only 8 years old when the violent Nakba began. His story brought other survivors in the room to tears.** **It is critical that we understand that peace and healing will never happen without acknowledging the full lived experience and history of the Palestinian people. This is why I introduced a resolution calling on Congress to recognize the Nakba and the rights of Palestinians.** [**Please support Palestinian human rights today by signing on as a grassroots co-sponsor of my resolution to recognize the Nakba.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuUQ-7jJ1lww1xrWka_rnytysU9xjr3aj1IxSqSXDPBOs2jEJWGFlct03AHuluv-HFRbFiABcF1FHhc3umj6giaqHItHcI_usJUfbEB5DHyHmIVIS0WUVQOOOBQxejKX6TkdNXUPfT0mfKlIW2XYAkYTTalDSBp60FHeGUFj4xjgec-awb__T4z59jSzOQmFsb_zNbH8xXJa-85RMnxye_C0ik50Pd57QT59QW317041fWDHOSFrZxDEVuoML8OWvexkvXkQRUW9Dbz3D7vuOAERw8K8-r0b6F2fjmB7ZHR28_dsuwA3xZ39O9ibZLm2pRBmcHQed5bOoTlo_li2L4OgC61pT13V2L-uA_YcdUPyUmbnhxrfiIJUXXFCN1Z7YG-ruvCQkonOzMMFE-8BTpR5-QgXf1Asq2jZIl3hfCT5rjf26TIWlAlBxaKoqyORYn9PwQM35y4Oe04K0LejNgxihCB0AEkt1kS1vdbIZ78xSjhLb3K_EUCunS3nWvUzbu6q_zaHeYi1G14Z7rOSYYOvfKAUO4NakdIlhE-_fYexQ/3w7/QVbWGSqTTlmFPwdSFg5IQg/h1/TYi4Ntx1eDe7eZU9Z8yOvZcjeed61OzRfEB86vVvH8c) | [Sign On](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuUQ-7jJ1lww1xrWka_rnytysU9xjr3aj1IxSqSXDPBOs2jEJWGFlct03AHuluv-HFRbFiABcF1FHhc3umj6giaqHItHcI_usJUfbEB5DHyHmIVIS0WUVQOOOBQxejKX6TkdNXUPfT0mfKlIW2XYAkYTTalDSBp60FHeGUFj4xjgec-awb__T4z59jSzOQmFsb_zNbH8xXJa-85RMnxye_C0ik50Pd57QT59QW317041fWDHOSFrZxDEVuoML8OWvexkvXkQRUW9Dbz3D7vuOAERw8K8-r0b6F2fjmB7ZHR28_dsuwA3xZ39O9ibZLm2pRceQq6zIapnTCWR8sFyrpO0txmULmXuxT7FOwpGRRUO74Ew80eM3kBQqAbvsm81BVsNoER6-UMTcJZfO0WAPKEWL0iZ3VIZEigfk3kfc5o7NhA36O6MYcb72sLu2Q1zpg1nxzOgAVW9cN4Xp0wnr2LdLq43MkqL3kmzimOhTY2Yrv9GeCW2bEi5E3I0ZntnCVC4MvNTdKtbEDQIU75R9ZSuHXFVcqPpKg6lynuDg1Z6U/3w7/QVbWGSqTTlmFPwdSFg5IQg/h2/nIxPhDIS33XUsFST6q0RwLRfChK1GKP7crrMcfwW9K0)

**The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel, using billions of taxpayer dollars each year to support this apartheid system. As far-right Israeli officials in power call for “another Nakba” and escalate human rights abuses against Palestinians, we cannot look the other way. We cannot allow this unbearable status quo to continue.**
**We must educate U.S. lawmakers and residents about the truth in order to counter propaganda that erases history.**
**That’s the aim of my newly re-introduced resolution.** It also calls on the United States to continue to support the United Nations Relief and Works Agency—which provides social services to millions of Palestinian refugees—and to support the implementation of Palestinian refugees’ rights as enshrined in United Nations General Assembly Resolution 194 and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.
[**As we mark 75 years of an ongoing Nakba, please sign on as a grassroots co-sponsor of the resolution to recognize the Nakba and human rights.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuUQ-7jJ1lww1xrWka_rnytysU9xjr3aj1IxSqSXDPBOs2jEJWGFlct03AHuluv-HFRbFiABcF1FHhc3umj6giaqHItHcI_usJUfbEB5DHyHmIVIS0WUVQOOOBQxejKX6TkdNXUPfT0mfKlIW2XYAkYTTalDSBp60FHeGUFj4xjgec-awb__T4z59jSzOQmFsb_zNbH8xXJa-85RMnxye_C0ik50Pd57QT59QW317041fWDHOSFrZxDEVuoML8OWvexkvXkQRUW9Dbz3D7vuOAERw8K8-r0b6F2fjmB7ZHR28_dsuwA3xZ39O9ibZLm2pRokhwrQQgCFMBKgWhHXD8r0Jnuc7ZLflk2bVC1XLurp3XZgJbUOtppR1F1AXgQeHBXID6S38NhXymOFffX8X4S4SrBZHtgD9a_wh2-Q8kIsM5luex_z9Q0Am00qzfwSTiVWAM2zEl3gc8jzzdKMxAOrEyRMCPGOuF8YBoJrnWDy291MQ-TPoT49_m4dRxRjmr_zmrNQ4TcGEu9bDZxQGJsvMERkukeMmz8D_Y2Lqzork/3w7/QVbWGSqTTlmFPwdSFg5IQg/h3/6IM0UvqviOBjM3tKLs-3-xtacLs4NyFfQHoU3skDDrw)

clean_body: When we stay silent, injustice thrives. | | | Friend, Today is the 75th year that Palestinians have commemorated the Nakba (Arabic for “catastrophe”) on May 15. The stories of trauma and pain of Palestinians who lived through the horrific Nakba have rarely been heard. In roughly 18 months beginning in 1948, violent militias in Mandatory Palestine forcibly removed close to 800,000 Palestinians—two-thirds of the Palestinian population, erasing more than 400 Palestinian villages and depopulating Palestinian sections of many mixed cities and towns. And we know the Nakba never ended. To this day, the Israeli government is still trying to erase an entire people by systematically displacing and dehumanizing Palestinians. And this continues with impunity because of attempts to rewrite history and to silence Palestinians. But we will not be silenced. We will continue to ensure that Palestinian voices are heard and acknowledged—not only for healing, but also to create an honest pathway for peace. For the first time ever, the UN will commemorate the Nakba. The U.S. will not participate and in fact voted to block that event. Similarly, U.S. House Speaker Kevin McCarthy tried and failed to stop a Nakba event on Capitol Hill, which nine organizations organized so we can hear directly from Palestinians who survived the Nakba. At the Nakba commemoration, a Palestinian American man, now in his 80s, personally told his family's story of pain, trauma and hardship. He was only 8 years old when the violent Nakba began. His story brought other survivors in the room to tears. It is critical that we understand that peace and healing will never happen without acknowledging the full lived experience and history of the Palestinian people. This is why I introduced a resolution calling on Congress to recognize the Nakba and the rights of Palestinians. | The U.S. is the top provider of military aid to Israel, using billions of taxpayer dollars each year to support this apartheid system. As far-right Israeli officials in power call for “another Nakba” and escalate human rights abuses against Palestinians, we cannot look the other way. We cannot allow this unbearable status quo to continue. We must educate U.S. lawmakers and residents about the truth in order to counter propaganda that erases history. That’s the aim of my newly re-introduced resolution. It also calls on the United States to continue to support the United Nations Relief and Works Agency—which provides social services to millions of Palestinian refugees—and to support the implementation of Palestinian refugees’ rights as enshrined in United Nations General Assembly Resolution 194 and the Universal Declaration of Human Rights. When we stay silent, injustice thrives. Thank you for continuing to speak up with me as we build a world where everyone can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Mike Lee
subject: Will our kids choose liberty or tyranny?
body:
I know...

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zie0kialagc66ne8v37irbsodibcf4sa5k59q3i0_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

I have three kids. I invested a lot of time, money, patience, education, and love into making sure they will be responsible adults who will carry on the torch of liberty to the next generation.

_But do you know who I never trusted to protect our future?_

Politicians in Washington.

I know...

I am a Senator. However, after years in Washington D.C., I am confident that the power is in our hands - not politicians - to educate and protect future generations for liberty.

Here's how: I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise, liberty, and personal responsibility.

How is FEE doing this?

FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar or virtual classrooms across the country. They aren't teaching kids to hate America or that everyone is a secret racist. FEE is equipping a new generation with the economic and philosophical basis for liberty.

[As a supporter of FEE's mission, I am personally asking you to contribute or sponsor FEE in the Classroom. Please send your support by clicking here to donate $10, $35, $250, or more >>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z78cft2ovodas064l0telfi6kptbhj43vdih2v70_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze9asiqcr9omfj6c1kh422quilede2fba304to1g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8uud3flo82lv3djdgnk8v8s3tsqdreu477lji70_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcdv6ua0sobclhfj948hc646l6piuma17kt620j0_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgn4v7md0pdsfs7afrhhr5bpcvdar8lepqcr2jrg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs2ubmnkmn689t3iei7sc2hhd5jflh0tf8feg2do_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

[Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ziunckr8u7q8jte8fit5374u5c9kli6lj92t1dto_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn81co6kj4i8ploq7stcagg9br1qmo2rqbd3rt4g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

Why FEE?

Since 1946, FEE has introduced millions to the ideas of liberty. You may be familiar with many of the thinkers and writers that played key roles in FEE's work over the decades - Ludwig von Mises, Leonard Read, and Henry Hazlitt. FEE was a part of the intellectual battle to push back against communism here in America.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh083g0kjojhvo5an13p8hubj85koh3d3c84knf0_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

Now, we face a new rise of socialism in America. It has a new name. It goes by social justice or Critical Race Theory. Instead of saying America is fundamentally evil because we are capitalist, these dangerous philosophies preach to kids that America is evil because we are a "white supremacist" country.

FEE is on the front lines fighting against the "Woke" educators trying to indoctrinate our kids.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. Please send your generous support.

[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze7973u210lc5bjuvl0tksm14iij106v9dj7tj8o_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5jr2v7ton6blpp5v6a9daja8he75jfn1hfk3lpo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqd0h42elvf2tpucjg2mosrf98d4s3ahfhg1dv0g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjg94cl1eu9j9qhumu1p45ik5jnvuhkpctr9dja8_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs4d27d6dnus035d9grh9122j80ftpv2fk5besbo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdcc30r12sipi2mt2s00a67r9ktm9rme0jutsorg_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4v5slthmtalur4rrl9pibson5vh0pr6oega3rgo_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvuku2ukrfjosku02ecku34vp3hj4gepirqro73g_rp22sh2s8i66o71chgeapj4clh2bs)

I truly believe we need to win the war of ideas against radicals who have hijacked our education system. It's no longer college you have to worry about. They are starting even younger.

FEE is the premier organization on the front lines to win the battle of ideas. I hope you can join me in supporting FEE today.

Thank you

Mike Lee

Deroy Murdock

I invested a lot of time, money, patience, education, and love into making sure they will be responsible adults who will carry on the torch of liberty to the next generation. But do you know who I never trusted to protect our future? Politicians in Washington. I know... I am a Senator. However, after years in Washington D.C., I am confident that the power is in our hands - not politicians - to educate and protect future generations for liberty. Here's how: I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise, liberty, and personal responsibility. How is FEE doing this? FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar or virtual classrooms across the country. They aren't teaching kids to hate America or that everyone is a secret racist. FEE is equipping a new generation with the economic and philosophical basis for liberty. Why FEE? Since 1946, FEE has introduced millions to the ideas of liberty. You may be familiar with many of the thinkers and writers that played key roles in FEE's work over the decades - Ludwig von Mises, Leonard Read, and Henry Hazlitt. FEE was a part of the intellectual battle to push back against communism here in America. Now, we face a new rise of socialism in America. It has a new name. It goes by social justice or Critical Race Theory. Instead of saying America is fundamentally evil because we are capitalist, these dangerous philosophies preach to kids that America is evil because we are a "white supremacist" country. FEE is on the front lines fighting against the "Woke" educators trying to indoctrinate our kids. Here is our goal: I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. Please send your generous support. I truly believe we need to win the war of ideas against radicals who have hijacked our education system. It's no longer college you have to worry about. They are starting even younger. FEE is the premier organization on the front lines to win the battle of ideas. I hope you can join me in supporting FEE today. Thank you Mike Lee Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Replacing George Santos
| | | | |

| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T19cf3d6a-f779-4f07-826b-99d7334a6e7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Hallelujah! The Justice Department, as you probably know by now, filed 13 criminal charges vs George Santos.** **_Santos was charged with money laundering, wire fraud, theft of public funds & more. _**[_Luckily we have a great candidate ready to take out Santos in this Democratic leaning seat. State Senator Anna Kaplan, who's as real deal as real deal gets._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T16b10b5f-66ba-44be-84ca-7370ee64830c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From her email announcement:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3775554-1aba-4f09-88b8-a2cd50483126/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Kaplan is a compassionate, talented star. **_**_Santos? He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust, mom survived 9/11, worked at Goldman Sachs, ran a foundation that saved thousands of dogs and cats. ALL. LIES._** _Santos is a Pro-Trump, anti-choice lunatic who is such a ghoul, he isn't only pro-assault rifle, but as children were being massacred by them, wore an assault rifle pin to Congress. Sickening. __Kaplan, on the other hand, will take on Trump and others who attack our democracy, anti-choice fanatics, and AR-15 fetishists._ [**_Join us in electing Anna Kaplan and removing this disgrace--and per the Justice Department, criminal--George Santos, by giving Kaplan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to elect her and win back a Democratic House Majority._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4c6789d0-5ad8-4d59-a77d-de07ab7ed387/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This race is as clear and crucial as it gets. Thank you for fighting for what's right._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.
I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.
I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.
But those folks have enough advocates there.
It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.
That’s why I am running.
But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.
I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:
Can I count on you to split $20 between Serve America and our Senate campaign before our fundraising deadline comes to a close? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]Thank you,
Ruben

name: Dan Goldman
subject: The American people deserve answers about Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Supreme Court justices must be held accountable. |
#
---
Peter, Over the past month, _ProPublica_ has published shocking stories that have linked Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his wife, Ginni Thomas, with Harlan Crow, a longtime GOP mega donor. They detail how Crow paid for lavish vacations worth up to _$500,000_ for Clarence and Ginni; how Crow paid the private school tuition of a boy that Clarence Thomas raised “as a son;” how Crow bought and renovated a house for Thomas’s mother; and how Clarence Thomas conveniently omitted all these records from his financial disclosures. We know that Thomas and Crow’s relationship began _after_ Thomas became a Supreme Court justice, and that Crow has had business interests affected by the Court’s rulings. This raises immense concerns about corruption, federal tax violations, ethics violations, and conflicts of interest. And it’s just the latest blow to the American people’s trust in the Supreme Court, which is at an all-time low. **That’s why I’ve just co-sponsored the _Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act_ to finally overhaul American judicial ethics laws.** The Supreme Court is the only federal court without a code of ethics, and it shows. Passing this legislation will move us one step closer to restore faith in our court system by ensuring that _all_ judges are held to the same ethical standards. **[Peter, please add your name to my petition today to urge Congress to pass this deeply urgent legislation. We must restore integrity, transparency, and accountability to the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63328354/406394075/-1790734871?contactdata=5rfMj1jXbqEn8UqnwGTaSc/CL4hDcQVFtOvhPb1EGRYNbv3Vb5tlhiP6TFXo4Mk89zc8B6iISLN7doTonYgTNyY+b65WhRfHkQ5cs7QsEPoJDIUOLnkoSjY8Vhc+Es+Xn9qjV36EjGi4gcg4auF1HQDlbQpiOBShpeey85ZdBqc=&refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjhlMWE5Ny00OWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWKIs4_W2NhX1ncK4Fn0OiXEFw6QU88ehTtMDeBEITQ=&emci=ac35a742-47f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=eb8e1a97-49f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63328355/406394083/-1790734871?contactdata=5rfMj1jXbqEn8UqnwGTaSc/CL4hDcQVFtOvhPb1EGRYNbv3Vb5tlhiP6TFXo4Mk89zc8B6iISLN7doTonYgTNyY+b65WhRfHkQ5cs7QsEPoJDIUOLnkoSjY8Vhc+Es+Xn9qjV36EjGi4gcg4auF1HQDlbQpiOBShpeey85ZdBqc=&refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjhlMWE5Ny00OWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWKIs4_W2NhX1ncK4Fn0OiXEFw6QU88ehTtMDeBEITQ=&emci=ac35a742-47f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=eb8e1a97-49f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13556823)
---
The American people deserve answers about Clarence Thomas and Harlan Crow’s relationship. And we must demand that Supreme Court justices — with lifetime appointments — follow the same rules as any other federal judge.
Thank you for making your voice heard with me on this critical issue today.
— Dan
Dan Goldman for New York

New York, NY 10008

name: Sherrod Brown HQ via Team ODP
subject: Senate control could all come down to Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

The tough fight ahead

| | Peter, Crime across our country is skyrocketing, and Maryland is no exception. We're seeing violent crime move its way from DC to our own neighborhoods. Our police officers are working overtime in Western Maryland to keep us safe. I support our brave men and women in blue who put their lives on the line to protect us and clean up our streets.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=348d299a1e5842b091c576a4d009bfc8&_e=m4XFcuQ91Z580f0bfjUE4aSkLUIRDZeet-Zomne5k2GX4Ydvu1SUiAeGujDy9bA7cFGyRPFdcEAfdxsih3j_PnrOIfZP9l_o9MoiWKW0K883KHbK6q7xxb1AnMN4MxjkN_JIv9ieJZOypUwG36SD1Br_dWYNt3eWXr6u3nK8GVNdaeDinfzOiIzatfJMCq8Ky7W0sqf6dU6nS83_MVJa4GPAkkPrllG4GFBBPJeHD-OnhjPhosfeyUcMTjgFmQcwwMvMzA1zXc9RKe4A_4JMcQ%3D%3D)

The far-left liberals running our largest cities have been anti-police and soft-on-crime for far too long. We're seeing the results in skyrocketing crime statistics and record-breaking homicides this year. It's time we make a change and stand with our police! We can't allow our beloved state of Maryland to fall victim to bad ideas and woke anti-police narratives. name: Team Beshear
subject: Andy's working for you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Andy has made a lot of progress for Kentucky, but there's still work to be done. Peter,

The primary polls close tomorrow night, and we'll soon know who Andy will compete against in the general election. [**So we need your help before all eyes are on Kentucky tomorrow — chip in any amount to help Andy start the general election off strong »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63329044/406396139/96677371?refcode=em23_230515_prmry3_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230515_prmry3_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=cccdb04d-4af3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2NkYjA0ZC00YWYzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqW2RbBhLmaZEt40TFYbIxO7XCNitzFJQoygazQ9hb0=)

In 2019, Andy won the election by just over 5,000 votes. Now, after more than three years of strong economic growth, thousands of new jobs, record-low unemployment, and expanded access to healthcare for over 400,000 Kentuckians, Andy is facing another tough race. **This time, the progress we've made for Kentucky and the future of the Commonwealth are on the line.**

Fellow American,

My name is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'm running for president of the United States. You may know me from appearances on Fox News or from my book _Woke Inc._

At the age of 37, I've lived the full arch of the American Dream. I worked hard, and I got ahead. I'm running for president because I'm determined to help Americans like me, who want to work hard to get ahead - not based on their skin color, but based on merit. **I am launching not only a political campaign but a cultural movement to create a new American Dream.**

| [** JOIN TEAM VIVEK ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=aebca188d7e74e78b6a2bb2a0e1a0100&_e=hUWrzl8vKffIv8wfFtRxDvNs3TVI_NoHoqbrkA-3PVNSxEF00z9rrdgl33CT8HmQAq5fk_oDoVvozRcrWqOnaLrHf46kCgqZq0Qnaa0DogxTJAiAZa4ORJdq_nQ5MvbwPDHTyNVGklWnrB7et2eYUm8oN44hmO2UNAn8Cv1d67KMqa3ORQq10PVx7kw--4NVml6IpVi0mGLyNZBSBU5UleZagTJJu_rn-F7eQVEsIE6gEnNfB8xqHiG-y8hMecdx02SmHv90p2lc8-rdjbDFfYaLanY32w-QA5SdJRXPW4gokmz_m5Cx7XvLjg__qh3eOeQwcst13eJaOLtiUxHHIEM1rluCx1I7aO7HqFJLGXo9m-lRxFiIj9dh54C_m47P)
---

I'm running for president because I have a vision - a firsthand understanding of how to revive our national identity and unify this great nation.

I'm running for president because complex times require a President who actually understands the issues firsthand. Not someone who memorized talking points out of a binder.

I'm willing to say the things that other Republicans believe but are too scared to say out loud. I'm willing to talk openly about the ailments that have brought our country to a halt.

**Campaign Goals Overview**
**
* Embrace, revive & restore merit in the United States
* Provide economic independence from China
* Reclaim global energy leadership
**

---

**We need to stop apologizing for what it means to be American.** We are the greatest nation the world has ever known, but we deeply need to rediscover ourselves.
