**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

You may know me from appearances on Fox News or from my book Woke Inc. At the age of 37, I've lived the full arch of the American Dream. I worked hard, and I got ahead. I'm running for president because I'm determined to help Americans like me, who want to work hard to get ahead - not based on their skin color, but based on merit. I am launching not only a political campaign but a cultural movement to create a new American Dream. | I'm running for president because I have a vision - a firsthand understanding of how to revive our national identity and unify this great nation. I'm running for president because complex times require a President who actually understands the issues firsthand. Not someone who memorized talking points out of a binder. I'm willing to say the things that other Republicans believe but are too scared to say out loud. I'm willing to talk openly about the ailments that have brought our country to a halt. Campaign Goals Overview Embrace, revive & restore merit in the United States Provide economic independence from China Reclaim global energy leadership We need to stop apologizing for what it means to be American. We are the greatest nation the world has ever known, but we deeply need to rediscover ourselves. That's going to require taking woke secular religions to the slaughterhouse. Hi Team —
[**I am writing to humbly ask you to contribute to my campaign before we reach our mid-month deadline at midnight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63330532/406400149/1270846539?refcode2=3e19f4df-4cf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230515-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE5ZjRkZi00Y2YzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RQAUDMf7VbQQujLQkenbOH9CGeaLO_Sz34_oaVIIXI=)
Here’s the thing: running this movement takes a lot of resources and support, and truthfully, we have seen a massive fundraising slowdown this quarter.
Tonight at midnight marks the halfway point of the month, and at this point, we wanted to be about 50% to our fundraising goal. _But, unfortunately, we are only 31% there so far._
That’s not great.
Not reaching our goals means we have to cut back on our most impactful campaign investments — including supporting other House candidates in vulnerable seats — and we, as a country, cannot afford that. Because there will certainly be unprecedented amounts of dark-money attacks in 2024 as Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump try to grow their MAGA majority.
So I am reaching out to you today asking you to support my campaign so we can continue to protect this seat and help other Democrats win races across the country.
[**Will you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress before we hit our midmonth deadline at midnight tonight? Your donation would make a huge difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63330533/406400150/1270846539?refcode2=3e19f4df-4cf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&refcode=em230515-1-t1b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE5ZjRkZi00Y2YzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RQAUDMf7VbQQujLQkenbOH9CGeaLO_Sz34_oaVIIXI=)
I’m so thankful that I can count on you to have my back. Your support is critical to keeping up the momentum of our campaign.
With gratitude,
Robert Garcia

clean_body: = Hi Team — = Here’s the thing: running this movement takes a lot of resources and support, and truthfully, we have seen a massive fundraising slowdown this quarter. Tonight at midnight marks the halfway point of the month, and at this point, we wanted to be about 50% to our fundraising goal. But, unfortunately, we are only 31% there so far. That’s not great. Not reaching our goals means we have to cut back on our most impactful campaign investments — including supporting other House candidates in vulnerable seats — and we, as a country, cannot afford that. Because there will certainly be unprecedented amounts of dark-money attacks in 2024 as Kevin McCarthy and Donald Trump try to grow their MAGA majority. So I am reaching out to you today asking you to support my campaign so we can continue to protect this seat and help other Democrats win races across the country. = I’m so thankful that I can count on you to have my back. Your support is critical to keeping up the momentum of our campaign. With gratitude, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . name: Brandon Presley
subject: Can I give you a call?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign
body:
I am not kidding. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63331046/406402318/17860314?refcode=ea.1f5e327c-4ef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1f5e327c-4ef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY1ZTMyN2MtNGVmMy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3oZ5n0GChuetMiU_7fw1jNWWO6bJmskTg1kiencyL0E=)
---
Peter, Most political candidates only care about their big-shot, rich donors and forget about the grassroots supporters giving $5 or $25 at a time who make campaigns like ours possible.

But that's not how we roll.

I believe in the power of the people and want to show my appreciation for your support.

So, here's the deal: We’re about 35 hours away from a major mid-month deadline and could really use your help. **After this deadline, my team is putting together a list of grassroots donors for me to call and thank.**

[**Is there any chance you could spare us a few bucks before midnight tomorrow? You could end up on my call list, and every dollar brings us closer to our $10,000 goal >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63331057/406402332/-761526316?refcode=ea.1f5e327c-4ef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.1f5e327c-4ef3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY1ZTMyN2MtNGVmMy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3oZ5n0GChuetMiU_7fw1jNWWO6bJmskTg1kiencyL0E=)

This election is about restoring power to the people and challenging the special interests that influence our leaders. But it won’t be easy.

We’re not just up against Reeves — we’re up against his rich and powerful buddies too. And trust me, there’s an army of them out there.

**That's why your support is so important. Tate and his buddies just released a massive fundraising haul. If we’re going to stay competitive, then we need to meet mid-month goals just like this one.**

So what do you say? [**Can I count on your support before our make-or-break deadline? But that's not how we roll. I believe in the power of the people and want to show my appreciation for your support. So, here's the deal: We’re about 35 hours away from a major mid-month deadline and could really use your help. After this deadline, my team is putting together a list of grassroots donors for me to call and thank. = This election is about restoring power to the people and challenging the special interests that influence our leaders. But it won’t be easy. We’re not just up against Reeves — we’re up against his rich and powerful buddies too. And trust me, there’s an army of them out there. That's why your support is so important. name: Team AOC
subject: Are you on some of these other email lists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Are you on other political email lists?
If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating.
It’s bad, and getting worse. **Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect.** Here’s what we believe:
\- Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action.
\- Instead of guilt-tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content.
\- Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help.
\- Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it.
**But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines.** Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful.
[Would you be able to make a $3 contribution to help us reach our $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal? Every single donation will truly make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230515-1.B7jC4O&refcode=em20230515-4321-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230515-1.B7jC4O&refcode=em20230515-4321-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv)**
If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails.
The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here, with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change.
So, maybe you can’t [donate right now.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230515-1.B7jC4O&refcode=em20230515-4321-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv) But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road.
No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230515-1?refcode=em20230515-4321-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=22&refcode2=4321_2526796_yijTIv&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230515-4321-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=23&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4321%2E2526796%2EyijTIv)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: Are you on other political email lists? If so, you probably regularly receive urgent and panicky emails asking for money. Too many politicians and organizations see their grassroots supporters as an ATM machine. They use scare tactics, guilt and shame, and downright misleading language to coax people into donating. It’s bad, and getting worse. Team AOC is determined to rise above that and treat you and our other grassroots supporters with respect. Here’s what we believe: \- Instead of scaring you to donate, we want to inspire you to take action. \- Instead of guilt-tripping you for not donating enough, we want our emails to provide value to you. We try to send out informative, educational content. \- Instead of misleading you about fake 5X matches or faux threats, we’re honest with you about what’s going on and how you can help. \- Instead of only hitting you up when we need money, we’ll also send you opportunities to volunteer or help other candidates and causes who need it. But just like all the other campaigns in your inbox, we do have fundraising goals and deadlines. Everything we raise each quarter is detailed in our public FEC report, and we want to post the biggest possible fundraising numbers. But we’re not going to scare or scam you into donating. We’ll just ask nicely because your donations to AOC are important and meaningful. If you can’t make a donation today, that’s okay too. We still want you here, and we still appreciate you reading our emails. The truth is that this email list is powerful. It’s powerful precisely because you’re here, with so many others. It’s powerful because when so many of us take collective action all at once, we can make real change. So, maybe you can’t But maybe you’ll get something of value from the next email we send. Or perhaps you’ll join us for a volunteer activity down the road. No matter what, we’re glad you’re here. Thanks for being part of this movement, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: Will you make a small donation to protect our Democratic Senate majority?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/144?t=1&akid=54%2E552475%2ElVCeIB)
Peter, we’ll only ask one more time:
[**Will you kick in any amount you can spare to our campaign right now so we don’t fall short of our mid-month fundraising goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230515-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230515-1&refcode2=54_552475_lVCeIB&akid=54%2E552475%2ElVCeIB) This is your last chance to make a direct impact before our midnight deadline.
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230515-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230515-1&refcode2=54_552475_lVCeIB&akid=54%2E552475%2ElVCeIB)**
We know you get a lot of emails, and you might be tempted to tune them out.
But this is a reminder that online donations like yours are going to have a real impact on whether we’re able to re-elect Bob Casey and defend our razor-thin Senate majority in 2024.
We still have a lot more work to do and resources to raise in order to organize across Pennsylvania — which is on CNN’s list of Top 10 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seats.
So before time runs out: [**Will you make a donation to our campaign before our midnight deadline, knowing it could help stop Republicans from flipping the Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230515-1?refcode=em20230515-1&refcode2=54_552475_lVCeIB&akid=54%2E552475%2ElVCeIB) Now is your last chance!
If enough supporters chip in before midnight, we'll stay on track to win — no matter what the GOP throws our way.
Thank you for your support,
Team Casey

name: Mike Lee
subject: Will our kids choose liberty or tyranny?
body:
FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0006bad1c19b4af1bed76fb2376ac449&_e=O7cTw5q3CeN2bBmpkXnQts6n38pICY5NT2JzlpR9Gxuad7mo-9KxsbwN20xfr806ZFqM6_mq3hVqIjqaEkGrITfZqyJ8Jw4RWLY5dmwMq1KCb3l9Ps9LWlO1KYjnFMRwGlqoTqZPJZJWmWFHC12UXb6YN1AB1YnTnnppBoXebNs_bvF17CU9HuvprXuyBGGYDoiFebdfyO7yiBbuw3A-l7wuQRcamTxQ-U3mi0OZK8GCdc_rOsseZZo-wRG1vPL3VOF7xb1UZuhVRVadd5MNFCigkvSGBSZST5Uuuma0SZdv8qchbWnr54FinzxPaYC0)

Hello Friend,

I have three kids. I invested a lot of time, money, patience, education, and love into making sure they will be responsible adults who will carry on the torch of liberty to the next generation.

_But do you know who I never trusted to protect our future?_

Politicians in Washington.

I know...

I am a Senator. However, after years in Washington D.C., I am confident that the power is in our hands - not politicians - to educate and protect future generations for liberty.

Here's how: I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise, liberty, and personal responsibility.

How is FEE doing this?

FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar or virtual classrooms across the country. They aren't teaching kids to hate America or that everyone is a secret racist. FEE is equipping a new generation with the economic and philosophical basis for liberty.

[As a supporter of FEE's mission, I am personally asking you to contribute or sponsor FEE in the Classroom. Please send your support by clicking here to donate $10, $35, $250, or more >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0006bad1c19b4af1bed76fb2376ac449&_e=O7cTw5q3CeN2bBmpkXnQts6n38pICY5NT2JzlpR9Gxuad7mo-9KxsbwN20xfr806ZFqM6_mq3hVqIjqaEkGrITfZqyJ8Jw4RWLY5dmwMq1KCb3l9Ps9LWlO1KYjnFMRwGlqoTqZPJZJWmWFHC12UXb6YN1AB1YnTnnppBoXebNuO0bKX3-1_DiCOHSLs4guVxrFqmBGGetIsBMKUTO75Ds5ne2h-T4FceTzRx7f4ydNbrbfJbFlvAjd8tO8o9lNSX6wPudtUfRQda5i0e_Es0Xvw_sD18LEhASWpguLq0ABs16eGWBFVoUxronA-9Gkq)

clean_body: FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise Hello Friend, I have three kids. I invested a lot of time, money, patience, education, and love into making sure they will be responsible adults who will carry on the torch of liberty to the next generation. But do you know who I never trusted to protect our future? Politicians in Washington. I know... I am a Senator. However, after years in Washington D.C., I am confident that the power is in our hands - not politicians - to educate and protect future generations for liberty. Here's how: I want to introduce you to the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE). FEE is educating high school and college students away from socialism and towards free enterprise, liberty, and personal responsibility. How is FEE doing this? FEE in the Classroom is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar or virtual classrooms across the country. They aren't teaching kids to hate America or that everyone is a secret racist. FEE is equipping a new generation with the economic and philosophical basis for liberty. Why FEE? Since 1946, FEE has introduced millions to the ideas of liberty. You may be familiar with many of the thinkers and writers that played key roles in FEE's work over the decades - Ludwig von Mises, Leonard Read, and Henry Hazlitt. FEE was a part of the intellectual battle to push back against communism here in America. Now, we face a new rise of socialism in America. It has a new name. It goes by social justice or Critical Race Theory. Instead of saying America is fundamentally evil because we are capitalist, these dangerous philosophies preach to kids that America is evil because we are a "white supremacist" country. FEE is on the front lines fighting against the "Woke" educators trying to indoctrinate our kids. Here is our goal: I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. Please send your generous support. I truly believe we need to win the war of ideas against radicals who have hijacked our education system. It's no longer college you have to worry about. They are starting even younger. FEE is the premier organization on the front lines to win the battle of ideas. I hope you can join me in supporting FEE today. Thank you Mike Lee Reclaiming American Freedom 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jon Tester
subject: seeding peas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields.

| Hey Peter,

I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields.

I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families.

But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway.

**The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters.**

All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that. So, here’s the part where I ask:

[_**May is off to a way slower start than we predicted, and we’re at risk of falling short of our monthly goal. Could you pitch in a split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to get us back on track? clean_body: I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields. | Hey Peter, I was back on the farm this past weekend with Sharla, and we spent the days seeding peas and pulling 16-hour days in the fields. I love being a farmer. I knew I wanted to take over my family’s farm since I was eight years old. It gets my hands dirty and keeps me grounded. And reminds me why I fight so hard for Montana’s families. But it also means I have a lot less time to fundraise than all of my colleagues. And trust me, I hate asking for money. I know how hard you work for every dollar—plus I’d rather spend my time out on the tractor anyway. The truth is, this race will be the most expensive Senate election in Montana’s history. Outside groups will pour upwards of $100 million into our state to distort my record and mislead voters. All this to say, we really do need money to combat attacks like that. name: Replace Sinema
subject: BREAKING: Sinema spending scandal continues
body:
Sinema’s using donor money to fund her expensive marathon hobby | | | Peter – More explosive reporting on Sinema’s questionable spending includes the use of campaign funds to pay for travel expenses related to her well-documented hobby of running in athletic competitions, including the Boston Marathon. **On the tab? An $8,000 bill to stay at the Ritz Carlton during the race.**

International vacations... high-end wine... five-star hotels... Michelin restaurants... an expensive athletic hobby, running races across the country. Sinema’s pattern is clear:
She raises money from special interests (like private equity), does legislative favors for those special interests in return (like protecting the carried interest loophole), and then spends their campaign contributions on her own luxury lifestyle, while continuing to ignore the everyday Arizonans who put her in office.
As one ethics expert said, “**It is one thing to ask donors for money to support your campaign and get your message out to voters, it is another to ask them to bankroll your personal life.** ”
Arizona sent Sinema to the Senate to fight for and protect our interests, not run marathons, get massages, and fly in private jets to hobnob with billionaire donors.
Sinema is corrupt–plain and simple. That is why we’re doing everything we can to make sure that her first term in the Senate is also her last. **[Help us get the word out in Arizona so we can elect a Democrat like Ruben Gallego instead of a sell-out like Kyrsten Sinema in 2024 >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xf34-SufcIFY8N3Hkj5Gre8f50ATAOnwaUvHI8VS5-udredcXmLQ3Smf1OriGmw4laW1nNSypEPT0lFjxDfw8IsWdEa2pL5SXCpkY8Htk5m6XQH713LxsurEBQHGnHqanh6Th5sbRxmjhtO-aSYCck3aMMnUiM5hxJTFC3r4_SxBFhtjsVF4LKrSsC_FgqqWVZ2Rdxqja-8qeAnU6ezIegB21LUUssIKcsX3HtYp0iFRLsIUvRIYILDtVpWlZM8qUqTKcrg8YBt3NohYsMxtnvALa9dkcQgjAvohXgPLvMOzTe9PW8hHgxdP9BKVcrfyY6RQzZlFsFMLMxaDtG-0NX/3w7/FJGFf_A3SKWuAPJI8PX9PQ/h8/QNOCduQfk0Mp8HDon6l7AXocpsauRiol3CFd2kUIu1k) **

Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for _just_ $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference.

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

[**So can I count on you to chip in $1, friend? clean_body: I have to ask, folks! | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Friend, Raul Ruiz here. | Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for just $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference. But here’s the difference, team: My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. It’s built by hard-working folks like you. Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves. And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. And it all starts with $1. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for standing with us! Dr. Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566, Indio, CA 92202 Please, consider making a . Peter, our mid-month deadline expires tonight at midnight. We’ll give you three reasons to explain why you should chip in $3 to HER Time right now, [_**but you can skip to the chase by making a donation right here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63333554/406411625/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODczM2FkYzItNTVmMy1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=e2-9Mc0cJJWbMB77sevkNzi1a6PKlBre7fVrcmuXd7E=)
1. **Abortion rights are under attack all over the country.** From state houses to court rooms to pharmacies, extremists are trying to limit safe access to reproductive care everywhere they can. We have to stand up and fight back before it’s too late.
2. **We need to flip the House in 2024.** Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, George Santos, and the rest of the Republican Party has turned the House of Representatives into a circus. We need to get the body back into Democratic control by electing more women and young people who will get to work creating necessary change.
3. **We might miss this mid-month fundraising goal.** Our fundraising deadlines keep us on track with raising the resources needed to power our work. When we miss them, we have to work from behind to catch up, or risk cutting essential initiatives we won’t be able to afford.

When we miss them, we have to work from behind to catch up, or risk cutting essential initiatives we won’t be able to afford. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks in advance for your contribution, — HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Eddie & EJ
subject: Psssst... will you help us surprise Raquel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Raquel Terán for Congress
body:
Hi , it’s Eddie and EJ again! After we sent our Mother’s Day message yesterday, we convinced Raquel to take the day off and told her we'd handle fundraising.
Can you chip in $10, or whatever you're able to give, to make sure Raquel has a great Mother's Day surprise when she checks the numbers? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b]
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Eddie & EJ Terán <info@teamteran.com>
Date: Sun, May 14, 2023 at 9:02 AM
Subject: To my wife, to the best mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b]
Happy Mother’s Day to the most amazing mom that I know, my wife Raquel. I’m reminded each day how lucky I am to have her as my partner, and how lucky our son EJ is to have Raquel as his mom.
To all the moms out there, thank you. For the tremendous work and sacrifices you make, both big and small, for your children and your families.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_051523_MothersDay_b]
Believe it or not, but I first met Raquel when she knocked on my door while canvassing with Mi Familia Vote in my neighborhood. From that day onward I have always admired and loved her tenacity, her passion and her devotion to her work. She is so deeply committed to advancing justice, fighting for working families and ensuring immigrant communities like ours are heard.
On this Mother’s Day, I want to take this moment to celebrate my amazing wife Raquel and all the moms out there who help make this world a better place.
Much love,
Eddie & EJ Terán

| | You’ll always know where I stand, Peter. I believe that protecting our environment is crucial. Climate change is real and it’s a serious threat to our economy and our way of life. When I announced my campaign for Senate, I made a commitment: that I’d listen to YOU and hear about what YOU think. **So I have to ask: Do you believe that we need a Congress that will take immediate action to protect our environment? Take the one question survey right now: ** [**> > YES. name: Team Magaziner
subject: Here’s the deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=E7kfI4VNsdrxejfETWGttokLLen%2BXVMgtjB%2BiQVz4ZHtnuvE%2FaNJo7vciuORQu%2FzY2E5k4yNe1thgaB5P%2FoRidnxK4uxSHzrVBwT5ddgqvfk9feHIiNh9Ae6fFdTn79qt%2FZuTQT2wA%2FFS63qsjUga3c76J6oiwXTYpEjBLO8zW3eJBrIVTO6McLD5Y9IAkxAwyQC7pk%2FC10sTwkJg0pAsDuJZmGvSfliKT%2BCFiq4uN6O%2B2VYiQmvdUbWKzi3DCs17VTnGALRKjYPBT7q%2F2RkCdXPUcnt0Q0YYif5Qxz6Jei5p3DDItum9s9A7wH31T1wyvGsFOLugppTd963Jr2XWvE3CPeOvswgENyCtO1TGv3wvyrUgyM1mJAbt7%2FLc6yDSUGydPZGaOqtTS8ZwL%2BUx7pPvdlykZy%2BJTmwhQG9ZX1JBiaWcANQI%2FFxLV5xuTDo)
---
| |
---
Peter,

Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and we’re close to hitting our $5,000 goal. [If you haven’t chipped in yet, can you join our campaign with a grassroots contribution before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63333965/406413124/2042294413?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230515_FR_mmfr.1.4_0_6MO_teammagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2FjODkxYi01N2YzLWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4iXABR-iOt0xrm9K9tRor5TFthqPMt0rrjrlqABxk8=)

Here’s the deal: We’re gearing up for a tough race in 2024. Republicans nearly won our district last year, and now they’ve labeled Seth a top target going into the next election.

That means they’ll be spending big here in Rhode Island to try and win and expand their slim majority next year. We can’t take back the House majority unless we protect competitive seats like this one, so we need to stay on track with our fundraising benchmarks, even this far out from Election Day next year.

**Abortion access, climate action, voting rights, economic stability... there are so many important issues at stake, and we can’t make any progress on them if we don’t take back the House next year.**

clean_body: I have terrible news: Republicans just launched a brand new five-figure attack ad against me. | = | Hi Peter, I have some really bad news: the National Republican Congressional Committee just launched a brand new five-figure attack ad campaign against me. This is an incredibly large ad buy this early in the cycle. Here is the ad they spending 5 figures to run in my district: = = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- This is the GOP’s first major negative ad blitz of this cycle and an example of the kinds of attacks we are going to face from now all the way until the election next November. If we don’t respond quickly enough, these attacks will seep into voters’ minds and we will lose one of the most competitive seats in the country. We have to win my seat if we’re going to take back the Speaker’s gavel from Kevin McCarthy. That’s why Republicans are already attacking me so early this cycle. = Thank you for having my back! \- Josh *

#

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: re: veterans’ healthcare.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Some thoughts about the latest debate in Congress and a story about why it’s so personal to me
#
Peter — Congress spent 20 years voting to send us out to fight and die in their pointless wars, costing us trillions of dollars.
But now whenever it's time to pay the bill for the care we were promised, the SAME politicians act like we're broke. **It's nothing less than theft.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 toward my campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) But first, let me tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and why this issue is so personal to me.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)**
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger by voting against legislation to protect veterans who were exposed to these toxic burn pits.
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
After serving for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps, I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can get this message in front of Missouri voters and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33069?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33068?refcode=em20230515-3126&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)
---
I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230515-3126-footer&t=13&refcode2=3126_614464_gwvCsm&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=3126%2E614464%2EgwvCsm). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

body:

Derek this is it.

**The Special Election for Pennsylvania’s House of Representatives is TOMORROW – and the abortion rights of every Pennsylvanian are on the line.**

If Republicans win, they’ll take back control of the House and will have another chance to pass an abortion ban.

We can’t let that happen – that’s why Josh Shapiro is doing everything he can to help our Democratic candidate Heather Boyd win.

**[With less than 24 hours to go until polls open, we just need to raise another $1,702 to hit our goal for Heather’s campaign. Here’s some important context to keep in mind as you consider whether or not to help Brittany out today:
* Brittany is fighting every day to protect the right to choose, defend our democracy, protect Medicare and Social Security from far-right attacks, and prevent a catastrophic default on our nation’s debt. This is exactly the kind of leadership we need in Congress.
* The new leader of the Colorado Republican Party recently promised to go on “offense, offense, offense” against Democrats like Brittany. Subtext: We can expect a blizzard of false attacks against Brittany between now and next year’s election.
* We spent almost every cent we had defending against GOP attacks in the last election, and our fundraising has been slower than expected out of the gate to start 2023. We need that to change, and fast, if we’re going to put ourselves in a winning position.

**[The Colorado Republican Party is mobilizing around extremism, friend. So we need to respond by mobilizing around commonsense leaders like Brittany Pettersen who are fighting tirelessly for progress and decency. We need your help to keep this seat and the House Majority safely in Republican hands. My conservative voice and presence in Washington have never been more important than it is right now, Friend . I am actively challenging the most radical presidency in American history, which is why the Democrats have identified me as the Republican to beat. The Left will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any Trump-supporting conservative who stands in their way. By adding your name, you'll show your support for me and my Republican allies in Washington who are fighting for your conservative values. Flipping this Tennessee seat in 2022 was a huge accomplishment that took a lot of hard work and grassroots support, especially from supporters like you. I have President Trump’s support, now I am looking for YOURS. - For Liberty, Andy Ogles P.S. Fellow Conservative - And since I flipped this House seat RED in the last election, the attacks have already begun. We simply cannot wait until 2024, we must fight to defend this seat starting starting TODAY. I can't thank you enough. \- Andy Follow Andy Ogles | | PAID FOR BY ANDY OGLES FOR CONGRESS Andy Ogles for Congress

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My police officer son is facing life in prison
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85CkbOUjODFlPqpeZHy4Xyi2C4RFH55hYy4BUtjsngPiuXEb-CQgEgBwN4S_Gpx5VtwGe7fdwv_OSxkT72TMPXgEpG3K7istj53MNoUH_KjFaGaNgASd1SNIK4UZasNtIX82M169b6i_dA5JDBVmjRJRcPhGEZatwfmwSFg7QBv_k%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85Yb1XMY9Gnxhr7xYM5k0XLtFq9yMhp1CYIzIqPGrAlyZclHJdlOfgMkvH8ZDsEG7p1ewif4bjuCNiD5ifVB-MQ6ZGnlVHw7zPoZfjPajVi_pozQENWP6rQL8o68-oguQ1jOIAjyJf5Tl7TgsH8qd_y0wx3pLsV7QZIjsxO6TepX0%3D) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85t92IKQNxgcmG5jhJWctW58H0QcmZQBU7vZxpRY9Ys2R2mgtRwZVX8UZydIKt8CnkDQuukcP8emRWntnLl3imtM7ClsZLciJvTKqlK5fuRIVF1FRmhJjHlONpL5ULzzUalooeAAFIZSvcWQIN8v-JgsArdREnAxqhzS24qv1fVFA%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO8591ayFRhE9xcHnGfgrLIi4w1863bGvtMZ5kBQPQWla35jEwg6gaSAR2E4Gv3EAMsBfphk4tgi5voZ_yBeIkdBOW0vom8Rs3yVrLZvYdLA3DfolGrc5UYiaV_EAM5dYjFkublUZWg2kX59kAn7fxhY9whdBenyuzEhQhwCt8BbxxA%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85lPAWXfCYs0aUvnqX7X6GADOAHKBb5XZHmK3iHBgJojLFQQn8_BrcFep9I3vuydzPgtzhTyN5uq5Mp3adb-GKCiN4t2GFyLFcxKMTJN8wfyel3OqLod9S5m338BU0cPN_6c2NzFO-sj4YeUnMlI8BnvlsXV_osw8qBc8fRTKrF2M%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85OZI9ZWlLi4G-5oTAvMxGmpR6fpHR8cJ5TpeEepqCmPVp7F2WOy1LYTI5oLi0Lxcigjd9a3Ly9nlY7wQaFkRZWA9zBU7GuUsAy4tBtlxBOpUKH-zz1HJjHmyDy65hv_kPKHhOCSCUWmwLAfca8slb5zf201v9ZN0hCnAjrkW94S4%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85Cz9dOlSOmqMM1fsk5EqK6ZwuUunPjTv4g4gtihA-ERHdGxqX-HDguqmVvkSRwliT-ZqebTD4jt2lawRoblMcbCgYpIuFvAg9sHIZrr51omI_9vCczKfQqJn0Yt1Ix7mtdzHMixyBHhbDW_d-kyOnMX-SEaMbzSyrpnDlgfk3mQc%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO857hni0yPPF5Bk5nhraSMrtzn8ENMUBWFavTcKHezpLsyN6qCs4dMTsTZPj5fKlTA8mresdiEOqnNNimNAiUeZb9AYuMOmutUk_-sM1fUguTPhF9i5TMzurhUk6Nsxf1Ikp4_574m0HA9bgtAEn4XKq8Ww1e-hj78gcMNZ5wyCbKw%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO85pC1HaxBhXLrBfc6dZkNmWzyMJeInJ38dk3lR4-EJkiWFUv3CaL1I7CFD10l_-Ko-6caJoaww4MO9-PQkBfigtJ4MpBLfINvjJe0S1FvyalcNaSHY42b683ECpd7SYPFnPybQ5OJP0AkU6S8bedii8xNJavQvBxSiQUgTwC0y7p8%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=850ae97c14634afdba140c132a60b07b&_e=3K2TfOaZalP5KBloETBiM39bJMwAYeet_ZPFfInYc1lPFn7TU3-6Rri4lwF-fwUHfOuQG0f5YZCaaxFPgXaQf9ukUUQmwm7LaBf1lZkbV9rOnU4P-gTB48X9qXt6LdFafyXJ5RuLwH3a9mpj12UNhO1V12oAWyZ9mS24puPLwwsUh3o3OxsUxS9etZEzsO858j8rB5yF3yWbqFpOT15ePxQ7KOnbCmyLsPSRLEtGbol_YGDYcRq4btTmcLBwq6FnPa6KnqYnqYLs3kzdWOhGnoQ2kkJXUi6j9rJSfI75PssOBRGUAhPvkM_Q5lD9rdF2Iext2aO2qTobl81qWY--oqiFkzPxkZp50BjOAVpIzlo%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Defend the Constitution

name: 2023 Voter Verification via Senate GOP
subject: You have (5) Missed messages:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will you help me restore America’s guiding values?
body:
I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f60f3cfdd0240c181d68478efa75a7f&_e=DuGqMQiVebv_3COG_w2GzHn68m2CnDQrXI8LFE06df0c9gPu0-TYN0yk7hq5dqMFWOhzMyqP0Ym6hxXOKV21InEGbyPklFv40beqi7oDMG66M2Zq6EUptfEZKCZnSYd3VGwyfYfE42nNoS_BKhgNCozw9gnBBRF8-MGQUopCkM2vZ1DkGYhIsXDns_6qtIsuKxuc3IA6ktXakSah_-lnw8m6WvYa5Uml_0y9obtr8fXoVp_KyN7heER9lh9xBx8GmE8BGwWGZGbcr5aH6083o-3Fbd5WKI1Y_eKM2Y86FMUEch7aqHNQqkAw_ExFhXRr-wdrnntFyQ0rsFtkxoX9iVTjYRBNvMoj4-0zzp94I1LlmP6jVAPQBMcIkQxtBSx3Tm2AauUil2MtUi4SfBlPag%3D%3D)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson, and I'm writing to you today because your name is on my list of Americans who **[cherish our nation's guiding values of life, liberty, community, and faith.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f60f3cfdd0240c181d68478efa75a7f&_e=DuGqMQiVebv_3COG_w2GzHn68m2CnDQrXI8LFE06df0c9gPu0-TYN0yk7hq5dqMFWOhzMyqP0Ym6hxXOKV21InEGbyPklFv40beqi7oDMG66M2Zq6EUptfEZKCZnSYd3VGwyfYfE42nNoS_BKhgNCozw9gnBBRF8-MGQUopCkM2vZ1DkGYhIsXDns_6qtIsuKxuc3IA6ktXakSah_-lnw8m6WvYa5Uml_0y9obtr8fXoVp_KyN7heER9lh9xBx8G9MNfLrRcmyU29c48dkQxEfXW6Jobd1fo4OAu4E4Nf_9ISdXZS__7D471vzyXhL_xZoBBaaooR3uTAjn8PAuA2j1HVadL5_Bgy0AZYVkBhyhkkZL8KqbQ8kP5fR0p1nmfsvEM1wIkmd8zfq3A6f-IhA%3D%3D)**

Have you ever stopped to think about how charitable giving is a brilliant reflection of freedom? **[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f60f3cfdd0240c181d68478efa75a7f&_e=DuGqMQiVebv_3COG_w2GzHn68m2CnDQrXI8LFE06df0c9gPu0-TYN0yk7hq5dqMFWOhzMyqP0Ym6hxXOKV21InEGbyPklFv40beqi7oDMG66M2Zq6EUptfEZKCZnSYd3VGwyfYfE42nNoS_BKhgNCozw9gnBBRF8-MGQUopCkM2vZ1DkGYhIsXDns_6qtIsuKxuc3IA6ktXakSah_-lnw8m6WvYa5Uml_0y9obtr8fXoVp_KyN7heER9lh9xBx8GBmt_xHhU03jgL-caqJdgufnQz_LrnBN57609DRDlUEZGqM1cgIb3L0gkQ9R3nAvK8DCe1qAUyqBA4obpDVvf96uGIbLB_17mmjJ39zdgf4sORahURm5Lieo_a7Mjz1PKQuliJOYYAWdQjQbYw5w6BA%3D%3D)** It's a way for every American to use our hard-earned money to freely support the causes we care most about.

This is democracy in action: **[because every dollar you give is a vote for the future you want to see.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f60f3cfdd0240c181d68478efa75a7f&_e=DuGqMQiVebv_3COG_w2GzHn68m2CnDQrXI8LFE06df0c9gPu0-TYN0yk7hq5dqMFWOhzMyqP0Ym6hxXOKV21InEGbyPklFv40beqi7oDMG66M2Zq6EUptfEZKCZnSYd3VGwyfYfE42nNoS_BKhgNCozw9gnBBRF8-MGQUopCkM2vZ1DkGYhIsXDns_6qtIsuKxuc3IA6ktXakSah_-lnw8m6WvYa5Uml_0y9obtr8fXoVp_KyN7heER9lh9xBx8GRwxqtxv2HzuPiMuLXxaTeZtr2vpwxno_2_0aHaBpcWBoTVBjnYUDkGQIAjrlJJHYiWG3l__PC-zcfjAbF04aKZLHR_-HjoVKDcW4WnqWnTnYv6IDJeET_KGEo_Iv-yUOEsf9jH9UBxsmyqf-TS1ORA%3D%3D)**

I'd like to personally invite you to join me in advancing common-sense solutions to our nation's toughest challenges by **[making a generous gift of whatever your budget allows.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9f60f3cfdd0240c181d68478efa75a7f&_e=DuGqMQiVebv_3COG_w2GzHn68m2CnDQrXI8LFE06df0c9gPu0-TYN0yk7hq5dqMFWOhzMyqP0Ym6hxXOKV21InEGbyPklFv40beqi7oDMG66M2Zq6EUptfEZKCZnSYd3VGwyfYfE42nNoS_BKhgNCozw9gnBBRF8-MGQUopCkM2vZ1DkGYhIsXDns_6qtIsuKxuc3IA6ktXakSah_-lnw8m6WvYa5Uml_0y9obtr8fXoVp_KyN7heER9lh9xBx8GOMmD7C_vQLcn_uyD0Y4dcArZAVloiPnKbF68lQE_8eWATDznGeTY-YRgRVP5hL0LXsnVRIiPDVjBt3r9GKLoUxvHB4dZDZ4qh7OsaYtdnMPcLxsWrO_ALzNfOYtF3kQ5wlHsizc_vNZQVW61rkJCbQ%3D%3D)**

Dingell, and healthcare justice leaders to reintroduce Medicare for All!

If you’re near DC, come out and show your support for universal,
single-payer health care in America. This is a chance to show the strength
of our movement and the power of our demand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8650?t=1012&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]JOIN US IN DC
★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8651?t=1013&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

Become a cosponsor to End Medical Debt and advance the fight for Medicare
for All! Help fund our work as we organize people across the country to
take on price-gouging hospitals, predatory debt collectors, and more!

Pitch in $10 or sign up with a recurring donation of at least $5 and get
these new stickers with our gratitude!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8651?t=1014&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1015&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1016&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

As we join Bernie and Pramila in the fight for Medicare for All, we also
just kicked off our new campaign to End Medical Debt on our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1017&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]LIVE Town
Hall Monday with US Rep. Ro Khanna and our brave members who spoke out to
share their stories.

“Progressives are beginning a new offensive on Capitol Hill: Taking on
America’s staggering medical debt,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8653?t=1018&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]The Independent wrote of our
campaign launch. “Headed up by Our Revolution, advocates around the
country are gathering horror stories where lifesaving treatment often
becomes a financial death sentence.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8654?t=1019&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

Our patient activists (read some of their stories below) have been meeting
with Ro Khanna and Bernie’s team as they get ready to introduce the
Freedom from Medical Debt Initiative — and our organizers have big plans
around the country.

“It’s time to wipe the slate clean and cancel all medical debt,” Ro said.
“This would pressure Congress and the White House to protect patients from
the horrendous price-gouging and predatory debt-collecting tactics that
bankrupt hard-working Americans every day.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1020&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]WATCH OUR FREEDOM FROM MEDICAL DEBT TOWN HALL HERE!

★ ★ ★

“The bill will say, if you have medical debt, it’s erased to zero,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8655?t=1021&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Ro
told us Monday. “Hospitals need to wipe it out, they’re making way too
much profit off of it. It’s affordable and it’s the first step to Medicare
for All.”

As OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8656?t=1022&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]explained at the town
hall, we also have the leverage of federal funding, which makes up the
majority of hospital revenue, that can be used to stop the pipeline of new
debt.

“Hospitals are federal contractors who receive hundreds of billions of
taxpayer dollars through Medicare and Medicaid,” Joseph said. “That means
we the people have the power to withhold federal funding from hospitals
that hurt patients.”

“The president could sign an executive order that if you get federal
funding, you can’t engage in price gouging, you can’t engage in predatory
collections from individuals or we’re going to stop the hospital from
getting federal funding,” Ro told us Monday.

“We can stop the most egregious practices with the leverage that we have
with federal funds. That’s why we’ve got to push the president to do it,”
he said [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8657?t=1023&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]in this clip.

“You know, as it turns out with a lot of things, good policy that helps
people turns out to be good politics,” Ro said. “If you do things that
help people's lives, people tend to think that’s good politics.”

"Medical debt is the number one reason for personal bankruptcies in the
United States," Our Revolution executive director Joseph Geevarghese told
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8658?t=1024&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]The Hill. "We can stop that and the president has the power.”

Covid-era Medicaid is drying up for millions, meaning more people will be
pushed into debt, and as Biden gears up for re-election, taking action on
medical debt would be a step toward earning trust and higher approval
ratings. But, mostly, the President should do it because it’s the right
thing.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1025&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be
mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel
medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop
predatory collection tactics.

Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an
invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare
for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1026&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8635?t=1027&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

People are hurting and we know the root causes. An estimated 41% of
Americans are saddled with nearly $200 billion in medical debt. It forces
people to cut back on food and shelter, put off needed care, and put their
lives on credit cards (as you’ll read below).

Berneta Haynes of the National Consumer Law Center [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8659?t=1028&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]talked at our Town
Hall about factors of race, wealth, insurance status, and chronic
conditions, but she also exposed the role of hospitals in America’s
mounting medical debt crisis.

Despite the ACA, hospitals are getting away with price-gouging patients,
failing to inform them about their right to free care and aid, then
resorting to predatory collections practices like placing liens on homes
and wage garnishments.

“Charity care accounts for about 1-4% of expenses at private, tax-exempt,
nonprofit hospitals. We see top hospitals hounding patients for $1800
while raking in billions and sending people into a debt spiral,” Berneta
said. “Then they claim that as part of their charity care - after ruining
people’s credit, maybe their ability to get housing or a job.”

★ ★ ★
OUR REVOLUTION PATIENT ACTIVISTS

“Elizabeth McLaughlin shared her account on the town hall of how treatment
in 2017 put her tens of thousands in debt as she put utility bills and
groceries on credit rather than face medical debt collectors,” wrote
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8653?t=1029&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Independent.

“I got injured, then got sick. I was afraid they’d stop seeing me, so I
paid the doctors and put my life on credit cards,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8660?t=1030&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Betsy told us. “I
pass the debt from one card to another. In the meantime, I’m just grateful
I’m employed, insured, and can keep making the payments.”

“Every time you go it’s going to cost you more money, so it’s been drilled
into all of us not to go to the doctor like we don’t deserve it,” said
Betsy, who’s 62 and lives in Indiana. “It all comes down to one thing:
healthcare costs too much and we can’t all get it.

Denise Lyons, 70, of Michigan, spoke at our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8652?t=1031&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Town Hall of her inability
to retire from nursing or get the care she needs for multiple serious
health issues.

“I was diagnosed with diabetes and the second stage of kidney failure,”
she said. “Now, she’s putting off biopsies and canceled her appointments
with the cardiovascular specialist and the dentist because of high
copays.”

“I know putting off care is dangerous, but I can’t afford treatment or to
go into more debt,” Denise told us.

Kristin Noreen, 59, of Washington, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8661?t=1032&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]told us of her harrowing experience
of being hit by a car while riding her bike in 2010, which led to
traumatic brain injury, getting her hand reattached, and barely survived.

“Like anyone, I thought I would be set for life,” she said. “If I’d have
known how it was going to be, I might have given up. I’m glad I didn’t,
but there’s no end in sight for this debt cycle.”

Insurance failed to cover 100 percent of the $1 million total and
subsequent care, so Kristin racked up $60k on credit cards. “I sold my
home, my retirement account is gone, and I declared bankruptcy,” she told
us.

“I’m back up to $10k in debt, and I can’t work as much as I need,” Kristin
said. “My parents took out a home equity loan, my friend paid for some
dental care I needed. it’s a vicious cycle.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1033&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ][IMG]

“Sharing your stories is so important,” Ro Khanna told our members.
“Congress members across the country need to realize that medical debt
affects real people — it’s affecting their constituents and they should
sign on.”

Do you owe money for medical care that you couldn’t afford? Have you put
life expenses on credit cards to pay medical bills? Share your story!

Our goal is to feature voices from every congressional district in
America. Join the hundreds of people already speaking out through our
survey.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/medical_debt_sv/?t=1034&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]TELL YOUR STORY

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Bernie, AOC, and Our Revolution are all-in for Helen Gym for Philly Mayor!
Our Philly members will join them for a rally for Helen in Philadelphia on
Sunday, hoping to repeat the magic progressives pulled off to elect new
Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson last month.

“Just like we saw in Chicago, this contest in Philadelphia will come down
to big money versus grassroots organizing,” Joseph Geevarghese, executive
director of Our Revolution, told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8662?t=1035&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]The Hill this week.

The Hill noted that Our Revolution is getting to work, putting our
“mobilization muscle of 40,000 members in the city behind Gym.” And now,
Helen is polling in the lead of this crowded race!

“What we know is that progressives’ messaging on issues from public safety
to education to good jobs and housing has resonated with the Democratic
base in key cities, from Chicago to St. Louis,” Joseph said. “We are
confident that this message, championed by Helen Gym, will resonate with
Philadelphians on election day.”

A former public school teacher and community activist, Helen said on our
recent [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8663?t=1036&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Live Call: “When we win on the ground in our cities, that’s the
blueprint, because we cannot wait for Congress.”

It’s time to turn out progressive super voters in Philadelphia, where
we’ll be mobilizing our 42k members and making 300k voter contacts in the
city.

“Our theory of change,” Joseph said, “is if we can get that slice of the
electorate out, through multiple contacts, that can be a game changer.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8215?t=1037&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

Also in Philly, Our Revolution is proudly supporting Amanda McIllmurray, a
working-class organizer who would be the first openly queer Council Member
ever in the city!

In 2016, Amanda was working as a nanny, a law firm clerk, and a softball
umpire when she began organizing for Bernie Sander's presidential campaign
and building local progressive power.

“I’m running to win good jobs, affordable housing, worker’s rights, and
universal family care,” Amanda said. As the daughter of union members, she
knows “everyone deserves the chance to have just ONE job, a
family-sustaining job.”

★ ★ ★

Our Revolution backed Rep. Sara Innamorato in her run for PA House in 2018
alongside now-US Rep. Summer Lee, and now we’re proud to endorse for
Allegheny County Executive - a key seat in Pittsburgh!

With the progressive movement at her back, she’s now leading the
establishment favorite by double digits in the polls, but we’re taking
nothing for granted.

As State Rep, Sara led dozens of bills for affordable housing, higher
wages, environmental protections, reproductive healthcare, and much more.

As County Exec, she’d have the power to directly affect people’s lives —
from county-wide housing to addressing human rights violations in the
county jail to protecting abortion care.

★ ★ ★

VICTORY! With the support of the progressive movement, community
organizers and San Antonio Council Members Teri Castillo (D-5) and Jalen
McKee-Rodriguez (D-3) won their races for re-election!

Teri and Jalen helped pass a $17.50 minimum wage in the city and worked
with the community to secure permanent affordable housing measures that
passed by one vote on the council.

“We’re bringing more people into the process for solutions on housing,
workers' rights, and more,” [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8644?t=1038&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Teri told us.

Also in Texas, Our Revolution-backed ballot measure Prop A passed in
Austin, showing voters want to hold police accountable and deter the use
of excessive force.

★ ★ ★

NEW ENDORSEMENT! Our Revolution is backing Aaron Regunberg for US Congress
in a crowded race to replace outgoing David Cicilline in RI-1.

"I’m proud to have earned the endorsement of Our Revolution, which was
founded by Bernie Sanders and supports progressive leaders with track
records of organizing broad coalitions to make a difference for everyday
people,” Aaron told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8664?t=1039&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]The Boston Globe.

“That’s what I’ve done here in Rhode Island by helping secure passage of
paid sick days, higher wages, harm reduction strategies, and new clean
energy programs — and that's what I'll do in Congress.”

★ ★ ★

We have a chance to elect several great progressives in Virginia on
Election Day June 20th!

For the State Senate, Our Revolution is backing Ben Litchfield (SD-27),
Heidi Drauschak (SD-35), and Elizabeth Guzman; and for the State House,
we’re backing Rozia Henson (HD-19).

★ ★ ★

We have a chance to build out progressive power at the city and state
level where it can directly affect lives. The best way to make an impact
on these races from anywhere in the country is to sign up to make calls
with our team of volunteers.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4329?t=1040&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]PHONEBANK THIS WEEK!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

On Monday of this week, Our Revolution NYPAN activists were arrested
alongside Susan Sarandon and OFW President Saru Jayaraman at an action
calling for New York to raise the minimum wage and end the subminimum wage
for tipped workers.

Our state bill there has 33 cosponsors and growing because of all of you
and your support, so we look forward to seeing NY step up and do what’s
right.

A reminder, if you want to get involved with our [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8222?t=1041&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Raise the Wage Team
to organize state by state for better pay and an end to subminimum wages
for tipped workers.

★ ★ ★

On Monday, Our Revolution will join another global day of action to Make
Amazon Pay. This time, we’re demanding Amazon pay its writers as we
support striking members of the Writers Guild of America!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8665?t=1042&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]Get involved with our global coalition holding demonstrations and
showing solidarity across the internet with the hashtags #MakeAmazonPay
and #WGAStrike.

This struggle highlights how Amazon’s business extends across the global
economy and threatens working conditions everywhere. It can also teach us
the power we can build when allies stand together along supply chains and
across borders.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Become a co-sponsor for our campaign to End Medical Debt, and Stand with
Bernie and Rep. Jayapal in the fight for Medicare for All. Chip in $10 (or
$5 recurring) and we'll send you these two new stickers with our
gratitude. Members get both stickers with any donation of $5 or more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8648?t=1043&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]GET YOUR STICKERS

★ ★ ★

Congress and the White House have the power to act. Our Revolution will be
mobilizing actions on the ground and inside the halls of power to: cancel
medical debt, end price-gouging, guarantee the right to free care and stop
predatory collection tactics.

Sign up to plug into this important work and we’ll reach out with an
invite for the first team meeting Wednesday night following the Medicare
for All reintroduction rally with Bernie and Rep. Jayapal!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8647?t=1044&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]JOIN US IN THIS FIGHT!

★ ★ ★

On Wednesday, we’ll join Bernie Sanders, Reps. Pramila Jayapal and Debbie
Dingell, and healthcare justice leaders to reintroduce Medicare for All!

If you’re near DC, come out and show your support for universal,
single-payer health care in America. This is a chance to show the strength
of our movement and the power of our demand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8650?t=1045&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]JOIN US IN DC

★ ★ ★

Join us next Monday, May 22nd for our LIVE National Organize-to-Win
Broadcast with Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison to discuss his new
book Break the Wheel: Ending the Cycle of Police.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/340?t=1046&akid=4282%2E5885482%2EHhApSm ]RSVP
