name: GallegoforArizona
subject: $20.24 for 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
Our campaign is entirely grassroots funded, which means your response to emails like this is very important
#

Peter -
**Peter - please rush a donation with the link below, and stick around to hear why your contribution is so important:**

[**Please rush $20.24 to get Ruben to the Senate in 2024 >>](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2090?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.NAWQCn&refcode=em230515-2-500&t=1&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK)**

[DONATE $20.24](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2090?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.NAWQCn&refcode=em230515-2-500&t=2&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK) Tonight is an important deadline for our campaign, not because we legally have to report our numbers, but because it is the halfway point to our FEC deadline. That means where we finish tonight will impact important budget decisions we have to make at this point in the campaign. **_And that is very important._** Right now, Krysten Sinema is considering whether to run for Senate or not. And she already has millions in the bank from wealthy GOP donors and hedge fund managers. It also looks like Kari Lake may be close to declaring her candidacy. If she makes it to the Senate, she could continue her conspiracy theories and MAGA lies in Congress on the taxpayers dime. This is what we are up against. Ruben is prepared to fight all the way to 2024 in order to be a voice for working Arizonans. What we lack in wealthy corporate donors, we make up for in impressive grassroots power. But that also means we rely a lot on emails like these, so please: [**Will you donate $20.24 to power Ruben Gallego’s campaign before our mid-month deadline ends tonight? The donations that come in today are crucial to our campaign and will power us all the way to 2024.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2090?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.NAWQCn&refcode=em230515-2-500&t=3&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK) [DONATE $20.24](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2090?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.NAWQCn&refcode=em230515-2-500&t=4&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK) Thank you. Ruben cannot get there without the support of people like you. Ruben Gallego for Arizona
Paid For By Gallego for Arizona This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=634_734936_IbQUIK&akid=634%2E734936%2EIbQUIK)

body:
Peter – we have made incredible progress in our Fightback Fund thanks to supporters like you. But to reach our target, we need one last push before midnight tonight. That's why I wanted to reach out one last time. With just a few hours left before our deadline, we still have $975 left to raise. **Every dollar we raise from now until midnight makes all the difference.** Peter, I am fighting for a better future for Louisiana – one where every person has access to quality healthcare, a good education, and a living wage. I want to make all of this possible. But I need to hit this goal and win this race first. So I'm asking for you to make your first $5 donation to my campaign before midnight tonight. name: Dave Fawcett, Democrats Serve
subject: These problems aren’t unique to Pittsburgh – they’re everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63341536/406441642/787037799?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230515_1_1&refcode2=e28a1519-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=CRantYe52bbLB8N38dpkdJfwztovX9R6puTNAbvMsayMJXgzX/Ma7nfpWSR7n2+EqXjc3XppdmdnrVd4wwDCIw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOGExNTE5LTczZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLpPAPhJGrwY7wn1GsvTeH1LylbuDrQaTqjAUneHyX8=)
Peter,

Democrats Serve was started to support leaders like me, with a history of public service and a passion for creating real change in our communities. I am proud to have their support as my campaign heads into Election Day **_tomorrow_** – but first, I wanted to talk to you about what’s at stake for all of us this year.

I’m running for Allegheny County Executive to take on the challenges we’re facing in cities across the nation – unchecked corporate greed and corruption, persistent gun violence, a lack of affordable housing and an unfair economy that leaves too many families behind.

**These problems aren’t unique to Pittsburgh – they’re everywhere.** That’s why organizations like Democrats Serve, and people like you, are so important.

[Will you make a one-time contribution today to support my campaign and Democrats Serve’s work across the county?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63341537/406441643/787037799?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230515_1_1&refcode2=e28a1519-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=CRantYe52bbLB8N38dpkdJfwztovX9R6puTNAbvMsayMJXgzX/Ma7nfpWSR7n2+EqXjc3XppdmdnrVd4wwDCIw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOGExNTE5LTczZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLpPAPhJGrwY7wn1GsvTeH1LylbuDrQaTqjAUneHyX8=)

We must focus on creating opportunity and fostering fairness and integrity in local government if we’re going to protect the values at the heart of our democracy. I spoke at length about my plan to improve Pittsburgh on the Democrats Serve Podcast this weekend, which you can watch online [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63341538/406441644/-902367138?source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230515_1_1&refcode2=e28a1519-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=CRantYe52bbLB8N38dpkdJfwztovX9R6puTNAbvMsayMJXgzX/Ma7nfpWSR7n2+EqXjc3XppdmdnrVd4wwDCIw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOGExNTE5LTczZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLpPAPhJGrwY7wn1GsvTeH1LylbuDrQaTqjAUneHyX8=&emci=8f6ed832-66f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e28a1519-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282).

Take a listen and then [make a contribution today to support public servants run for public office and win!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63341539/406441645/787037799?amount=10&source=DS_EM_FR_90DO_230515_1_1&refcode2=e28a1519-73f3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&contactdata=CRantYe52bbLB8N38dpkdJfwztovX9R6puTNAbvMsayMJXgzX/Ma7nfpWSR7n2+EqXjc3XppdmdnrVd4wwDCIw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyOGExNTE5LTczZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=RLpPAPhJGrwY7wn1GsvTeH1LylbuDrQaTqjAUneHyX8=)

Dave

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve
55 Beach Shore Drive
Milford, CT 06460
United States
clean_body: | = Peter, Democrats Serve was started to support leaders like me, with a history of public service and a passion for creating real change in our communities. I am proud to have their support as my campaign heads into Election Day tomorrow – but first, I wanted to talk to you about what’s at stake for all of us this year. I’m running for Allegheny County Executive to take on the challenges we’re facing in cities across the nation – unchecked corporate greed and corruption, persistent gun violence, a lack of affordable housing and an unfair economy that leaves too many families behind. These problems aren’t unique to Pittsburgh – they’re everywhere. That’s why organizations like Democrats Serve, and people like you, are so important. = We must focus on creating opportunity and fostering fairness and integrity in local government if we’re going to protect the values at the heart of our democracy. I spoke at length about my plan to improve Pittsburgh on the Democrats Serve Podcast this weekend, which you can watch online . Take a listen and then = Dave | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

Here are five reasons why 2022 was a _seriously_ hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:

**1\. Redistricting.** Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.

**2\. Primaries.** Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. _By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!_

**3\. Marc Molinaro.** Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in _his_ 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. _He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!_

**4\. Crazy GOP Attack Ads.** Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. _It was completely false, and it was sickening._

**5\. Midterm vs. Presidential Years.** 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024?

[**Split a contribution to support Upset the Setup and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63341563/406441686/2120520668?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230515_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzNWNhMzIyLTczZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z0sn62-Zab97CU6qxPMuaobQDrWnmq_mPDgu1EiFY-s=)

clean_body: | = Peter, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did: 1\. Redistricting. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known. 2\. Primaries. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole! 3\. Marc Molinaro. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene! 4\. Crazy GOP Attack Ads. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening. 5\. Midterm vs. Presidential Years. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out! So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Al P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. = | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. subject: today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2228%2E5257348%2EkeKIwP ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Today, you can do something special. You can make your first contribution
to my campaign for U.S. Senate (and all I’m asking for is $3 — yes,
seriously). Here’s why your early support makes a huge difference:

Running a Senate campaign is not easy — especially in the largest state in
the nation. It’s going to take a massive number of resources to hold
events all over California, build a strong campaign team and volunteer
network, scale up our organizing efforts, print campaign literature,
invest in our digital program (👋), and ultimately, get our message out to
voters all over the state.

And while we’re focused on that, extremist Republicans are going to be
attacking me non-stop — they’re already doing it on Fox News nearly every
day. They’re going to do whatever it takes to keep me out of the Senate,
and they’re banking on us not having the resources to respond to the
constant smears and lies. We need to prove them wrong.

With your help, I’m confident we will. We’re running this campaign without
taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and the response so far has been
amazing.

If we’re going to make the major changes our country needs to protect
voting rights, tackle the climate crisis, safeguard our democracy, and
more, then we can’t afford to slow down anytime soon.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=may2023_abs_em.-unVV4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_ND_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2228%2E5257348%2EkeKIwP ]So with that in mind, I’m asking: Will you make your first $3
contribution to my campaign before tonight’s mid-quarter deadline to help
fuel this fight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=may2023_abs_em.S2LdYU&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_ND_20230515_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2228%2E5257348%2EkeKIwP ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[**May 15, 1886:** American poet and literary icon, Emily Dickinson, died in her hometown of Amherst, Massachusetts. After her death, her family found her collection of hand-sewn poetry booklets and proceeded to publish her entire collection posthumously. Her world-renowned collection makes Dickinson synonymous with American Literature.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=27846e81f3e54e7cb197fd20e0d1cba2&_e=yr7ljeNW_Bsx36VNK-N960AvThEaVvoPz_scJxHj3oe2JTDqjulJqVT3o_axv6NokaD4z8QzCiVYSXD-5Sz50CffnBKFPRgLmHpGSKz_cYUvVRBjxAKCR-rvQTwfIp9wruqGwxV0IwukIhDQRCXmgNer39oPO44huqEQJFVX1T_DvaJ5A0y1bvLlK9qZHB1ns4Gf3HuFBfgDK2cqFLzap6GBCxi8j2zMzkNyUyeubotrAzYTntuB53I8S6CKXRiQ) **Source -[poetryfoundation.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=27846e81f3e54e7cb197fd20e0d1cba2&_e=yr7ljeNW_Bsx36VNK-N960AvThEaVvoPz_scJxHj3oe2JTDqjulJqVT3o_axv6NokaD4z8QzCiVYSXD-5Sz50JkjQvYw9wOB69ITa1h2sRcC3LbHHgbJl8sd0gr6cYmdJ5ckzyUI7k4X-qUpFUgTt-WiC9CW8djgDCILHe-vjXV2NBJxuzhWoqVKBjaTvvLrxYejUpfQNDgOJYy-5s_KyzOaEvQpRUV-OEOjs4l3zLIa7XZIGgvF9fZ8pg9Um5lr)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=27846e81f3e54e7cb197fd20e0d1cba2&_e=yr7ljeNW_Bsx36VNK-N961OY1w8Yvzjc8JIbltetrD5JApcr7DYjqB2i2UMv5wsNZqRjqSDgCOlbVGWEaeK-D134hKy_KUAZLI4jvoOwtSeO5DPJ2_M55x8vRkAi6DwHIsLY5m7TDHZGZY0uNru3W5mHKHjynWAtmKWmTSVONb2g9-tG_QbAOF-lsyzWOEriK7IdDZGeX_LDBuiZW7q-YcqnaGmPsm5ZvAPLCyeY_meas-qvrD0uxxWFjCZXEdvd)**

[**May 15, 1928:** Disney’s iconic character, Mickey Mouse, made his debut in the silent film _Plane Crazy_. The theater audience saw a test screening with hopes that a distributor would pick up the film, but that failed to happen. [**May 15, 1969:** Justice Abe Fortas resigned from the Supreme Court of the United States under threat of impeachment for financial violations. Appointed to the court by President Lyndon B. Johnson, Fortas was also nominated by him to become Chief Justice, but he requested to have his name withdrawn from consideration and ultimately resigned after public scrutiny and allegations.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=27846e81f3e54e7cb197fd20e0d1cba2&_e=yr7ljeNW_Bsx36VNK-N965rFvY7mpMGY9T402iZ9-VXvaU9vQkYE_WsLGqljRe3FkmnIIJHtAP6buLo_9nfNguVC-yNvrI32idHidwnacTQz9KZutOBrlUK90ZqE4JPfdsDnxeO1Uweq6tGeXuariz6JVmQ8opYVQAB9aOONRSV97IxRrRiGbLv3gYIFmqTSoNNmTg4xylz3WmzMWXuEXkZ7gT14TFc63E5LEQ8TZDw%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=27846e81f3e54e7cb197fd20e0d1cba2&_e=yr7ljeNW_Bsx36VNK-N965rFvY7mpMGY9T402iZ9-VXvaU9vQkYE_WsLGqljRe3FkmnIIJHtAP6buLo_9nfNgsA0L6QE_HT0-xzlxPMnT2xv8b0XQXrld9pJt20OeomMb3Vlc_2Eow8SKcLwAJQBODmdjlyvzLjUxVm0okzwhIFmU-OCm5b413GzFDKxoD_dC9bpYDB2weoc1RIBdwiVSV69BhiqO0sfOC_liNF8M2s%3D)**

I marched into the lion’s den right after him to defend him 1 on 6. Those 6 CNN anchors had no response to one simple point... President Trump and I just completely DESTROYED the media’s playbook on national television for the entire world to see, Fellow Conservative. When they realized they were losing the debate, the partisan media hacks began rudely interrupting me and trying to talk over me. But I completely humiliated them on their own network and showed them what the America First movement is all about! The Left thought they could use this town hall to DESTROY President Trump’s campaign. But it backfired on them spectacularly. President Trump dominated the stage at the town hall, outlining his vision for America and answering questions directly from voters. The American people are worried about the price of gas and groceries, fentanyl from our wide-open southern border killing Americans, crime in the streets, and a fear of WWIII. clean_body: I won't take too much of your time, friend, but this is important: | | | I won't take too much of your time, friend, but this is important: The Cook Political Report is calling our race in Ohio a toss-up, and Mitch McConnell just declared me a top target for defeat. This race could decide Senate control – the GOP knows it, and I know it too. That's why I have to ask: Please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more before our critical mid-month deadline to help me win in Ohio and defend our Senate majority? Here's the best link to give: = From the bottom of my heart, thank you for your support. – Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Hi Friends,

We are in the final hours of our goal to raise $8,000 – _and I’m asking, before midnight tonight, for your generous support._

Arizona will have some of the most challenging races in the country, and we need to make sure that we do everything we can to win them.

From top to bottom, our ballots on Election Day will be filled with races that will be won if we have the right resources to support these campaigns. That's why I'm asking if you can chip in before time runs out. **Please, can you donate below to step up and help us before the end of the night?**

name: Team AOC
subject: Every single goal matters because this is truly a grassroots campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It’s late so we’ll keep this short:
Every single fundraising goal that we set matters to this campaign. AOC doesn’t take meetings with lobbyists and she doesn’t curry favor with billionaires. AOC also doesn’t host cocktail fundraisers with major donors.
**This campaign relies virtually exclusively on grassroots contributions from people like you.** In fact, our average contribution this month is just $14.97.
This campaign is powered by hundreds of thousands of people across the country who are dedicated to fighting for a brighter future for all with social, racial, environmental, and economic justice.
In order to continue sustaining and growing this movement, we need your help to reach our $125,000 mid-month fundraising goal. [If you can afford it, will you make your first contribution of $3 right now to help us reach this critical goal? Here’s your personal link to donate ⬇️](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230515-2.iE9LFL&refcode=em20230515-4322-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230515-2?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230515-2.iE9LFL&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20230515-4322-P_FND_MMF_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)
Whether or not you can afford to donate today, please know that our entire team is so grateful that you are a part of this campaign.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230515-2?refcode=em20230515-4322-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=3&refcode2=4322_2526796_RW_unC&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230515-4322-P_FND_MMF_GFM&t=4&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=5&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=6&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=7&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=8&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=4322%2E2526796%2ERW_unC)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Friends -
Earlier today, we weren't sure whether we'd meet our fundraising goals before our mid-month drive ends at midnight.
But then Ilhan reached out this morning about the fact that this is a grassroots-funded campaign that relies on lots of small-dollar donations.
The response so far has been incredible.
**But we still need another 127 donations before midnight to stay on track to reach our goals.** Can Ilhan count on you to chip in today?

subject: A whole lotta money to protect entrenched incumbents

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, I’m going to
keep this short because I know it’s late.

The DCCC raised over $16 million dollars in March. That is a whole lotta
money to protect entrenched incumbents.

We’re working each and every day to usher in a new generation of
leadership by electing diverse, working-class candidates who aren’t afraid
of the bold policies we need to address the many crises we’re facing.

We’re facing our mid-month deadline in just a few hours and so I need to
ask:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134457?refcode=em20230515-28969&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV ]Will you contribute before midnight tonight to help us reach our
$23,000 goal? Every single contribution made tonight will have an
immediate impact.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134457?refcode=em20230515-28969&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV ]Contribute $3

As Campaigns Director, I need to make sure we have the resources to
recruit and elect the next AOC, Cori Bush, or Summer Lee.

Thank you,

Geoff Simpson

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230515-28969-footer&t=1023&refcode2=28969_1203867_Vw6TgV&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=28969%2E1203867%2EVw6TgV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: - You're invited! Learn how you can cash in on clean energy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, In 2022, Congress passed the largest climate investment in our history with the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which included what is now the Affordable Clean Energy Plan. It passed because people like you never stop fighting for what we need - a clean energy future that centers racial justice and equity. It will be successful because of people like you, too. **[Join us on Wednesday, May 24th, at 6pm to find out more.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63342797/406446174/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZjFhOWIyLTdhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmHOJdpXX7CkddHHe9U_F03x2-LLureFfTDKZMTM-H8=&emci=341b8686-6bf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7ff1a9b2-7af3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Pres. Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan is a game-changer for climate and clean energy. It will help put us on a path to cut climate pollution nearly in half by 2030, and better protect our communities from further devastation. How? In part, by providing tax credits and incentives so people like you can upgrade to clean energy and better energy efficiency, all while saving money on utility bills. Think: window upgrades, energy efficiency projects, electric vehicles, and more! **[Join us and our West Coast partners next Wednesday for a virtual event going over the incentives coming our way.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63342798/406446175/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZjFhOWIyLTdhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmHOJdpXX7CkddHHe9U_F03x2-LLureFfTDKZMTM-H8=&emci=341b8686-6bf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7ff1a9b2-7af3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63342799/406446176/-338648891?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZjFhOWIyLTdhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmHOJdpXX7CkddHHe9U_F03x2-LLureFfTDKZMTM-H8=&emci=341b8686-6bf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7ff1a9b2-7af3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)****What** : Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate
**When** : Wednesday, May 24, 2023 at 6PM PT
**Where** : Zoom Webinar
**[[REGISTER NOW]](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63342800/406446177/-1273621073?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmZjFhOWIyLTdhZjMtZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XmHOJdpXX7CkddHHe9U_F03x2-LLureFfTDKZMTM-H8=&emci=341b8686-6bf3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7ff1a9b2-7af3-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** A just clean energy transition plan is critical to reduce climate pollution while ensuring all our communities thrive. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, In 2022, Congress passed the largest climate investment in our history with the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which included what is now the Affordable Clean Energy Plan. It passed because people like you never stop fighting for what we need - a clean energy future that centers racial justice and equity. It will be successful because of people like you, too. Pres. Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan is a game-changer for climate and clean energy. It will help put us on a path to cut climate pollution nearly in half by 2030, and better protect our communities from further devastation. How? In part, by providing tax credits and incentives so people like you can upgrade to clean energy and better energy efficiency, all while saving money on utility bills. Think: window upgrades, energy efficiency projects, electric vehicles, and more! : Cashing in on Clean Energy: Save Money and the Climate When : Wednesday, May 24, 2023 at 6PM PT Where : Zoom Webinar [[REGISTER NOW]]() A just clean energy transition plan is critical to reduce climate pollution while ensuring all our communities thrive. The Affordable Clean Energy Plan is the biggest opportunity we have to jumpstart this transition right now. Climate action can’t wait. Our invited speakers, including from national LCV and Rewiring America, will go over the different benefits and offer resources to help you plan your clean energy transition. “See” you there, Lindsey Scholten OLCV Interim Executive Director | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters._ | ---|---

Last night alone, more than a thousand supporters turned out for Helen — by far the largest mayoral rally of the election cycle — despite competing with the Sixers playing Game 7 against the Celtics, a Taylor Swift concert, _and_ Mother’s Day. But this kind of unmatched ground game didn’t just come out of thin air. Every call that’s been made, every door that’s been knocked, and every dollar that we’ve raised has made all the difference — and this level of organizing, backed by grassroots supporters like you, is poised to be the winning factor in this election. [**Will you split a contribution between Helen Gym’s campaign and WFP to keep up the momentum before voters head to the polls tomorrow? 100% of your donation will help Helen reach voters in the final stretch of this race.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSTYKgN0PnSnYzwQjyfEmtb2gux0gB_WpuYXBkugo3UAQB-P8XneeP-9F67E_ve6N8xIPbD7yJVTIw-CukSIZoHF1UTK4Hg6Ej-_66Tp370fgcNQW9WwDHCKYxJWa6TR3OpTI4aEIWud71TZlwAomwunnpkWA-yzdVAZAfpPC9SoqvbRbVP6VXce5OERsX6QlRqPOoBs9Mx8T5ygV7uwPryqs8xXryBPtGDjVLGTlm1hF52o1O1VBbWdFZclFlaRzLYvMotGjcvyZWBxdIjAlm1jFjC-28WZKjU6mTj2TLUy3yJeBmC08mhNtgW7LpzpgsUcaNUwp-ibangn_l6mfzwY9zDogmKUMkBKDeoWfu-2kLAR0OmG-TjqX4nUfzcCS/3w7/wx2aVbz-RmmKMju18JdacA/h3/90izvK6gD38eTY1oPxe5F9zNgcdbkW5Pw1vcO7ug9AE) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUSTYKgN0PnSnYzwQjyfEmtb2gux0gB_WpuYXBkugo3UAQB-P8XneeP-9F67E_ve6NgBLxsuY-GSFTO_ZvalWX1zftiBQwGvtZ_IOMAn7XJmtMIABAFRq-IUoplJd1NIOs3kI3M58RIN9iszEYsbab15uOnqBNANDsopKDkDHoI1jJIIQUfquNJwx9Foh387gvQGNak7kUsJ7LwLhvRHxyyjsdlRPmhiT00BUmeVY16fJj5GXFZW5giSaafWbv9alWf4WEUTwtsT86SW9lShel5LkGioFqueVRMPA_pVZRr6BaWEhryvfEDXcQlBS0UTgi92ut-Sc1YOWO3FfFgW-2fvNuSK75cQd6a7i1CbxXfE4dynHCNXnow81xSI2jMmL9/3w7/wx2aVbz-RmmKMju18JdacA/h4/2IM_Lo3s7s8TQ3gE3A1Qsji0FTIEI4gFlVLjdK2HVu0)** **To locals:** this is our moment to build a Philadelphia where public schools are strong, communities are safe, workers are protected, and young people have a future to believe in.
**To the rest of the country:** this is our moment to build a city that writes a blueprint for the nation. Helen’s laid out a vision that invests in _people_ — that invests in truly affordable housing, vibrant public spaces, safe, fully-funded public schools for our children, and more. She’s the kind of leadership that Philadelphia, and this country, needs. Leadership that’s not afraid to stand up to special interests, put people over profit, to build cities where everyone can thrive and not just make ends meet. We’re confident that the work we do now through tomorrow will send a very loud and clear message to the rest of the country, and that’s that a progressive agenda — an agenda that prioritizes meeting the needs of the community — **is a winning agenda.** [**With only hours left until polls open, split a contribution between Helen Gym’s campaign and WFP to help boost the last leg of organizing clean_body: The work we do now through tomorrow will send a very loud and clear message to the rest of the country, and that’s that a progressive agenda — an agenda that prioritizes meeting the needs of the community — is a winning agenda. | | | Peter, The latest polls out of Philadelphia show that the mayor’s race is going to come down to who has the best ground game. And right now, it’s clear that it's Helen Gym — have a look for yourself: Last night alone, more than a thousand supporters turned out for Helen — by far the largest mayoral rally of the election cycle — despite competing with the Sixers playing Game 7 against the Celtics, a Taylor Swift concert, and Mother’s Day. But this kind of unmatched ground game didn’t just come out of thin air. Every call that’s been made, every door that’s been knocked, and every dollar that we’ve raised has made all the difference — and this level of organizing, backed by grassroots supporters like you, is poised to be the winning factor in this election. To locals: this is our moment to build a Philadelphia where public schools are strong, communities are safe, workers are protected, and young people have a future to believe in. To the rest of the country: this is our moment to build a city that writes a blueprint for the nation. Helen’s laid out a vision that invests in people — that invests in truly affordable housing, vibrant public spaces, safe, fully-funded public schools for our children, and more. She’s the kind of leadership that Philadelphia, and this country, needs. Leadership that’s not afraid to stand up to special interests, put people over profit, to build cities where everyone can thrive and not just make ends meet. We’re confident that the work we do now through tomorrow will send a very loud and clear message to the rest of the country, and that’s that a progressive agenda — an agenda that prioritizes meeting the needs of the community — is a winning agenda. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
